ff_double_dumbbell_devil_press.description: Stand behind two dumbbells on the floor. Do a burpee with hands on the handles, jump or step feet wide, then swing the dumbbells overhead in one smooth motion. Keep the back flat in the hinge and avoid curling the weights slowly.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_devil.description: Place one dumbbell on the floor and stand behind it. Do a burpee with one hand on the handle, step or jump in, then swing and press the dumbbell overhead before switching sides. Keep hips square and avoid twisting as the weight rises.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_z_press.description: Sit on the floor with legs straight and two kettlebells in the rack. Press one bell overhead as the other stays racked, alternating smoothly. Keep the ribs down and avoid rocking backward.

ff_double_plate_lu_raise.description: Stand tall holding a light plate in each hand by the sides. Raise the plates out and up in a wide arc until the arms reach overhead, then lower the same path. Keep elbows soft and avoid using a leg drive.

ff_plate_steering_wheel.description: Stand tall holding one plate at chest height with arms extended. Rotate the plate like a steering wheel from side to side while the torso stays still. Keep shoulders down and avoid letting the plate sag.

ff_suspension_cuban_press.description: Hold suspension handles and lean back slightly with elbows lifted. Rotate the forearms up into a goalpost, press overhead, then reverse the path. Keep tension light enough to move smoothly without shrugging.

ff_barbell_decline_bench_press.description: Lie on a decline bench with feet secured and shoulder blades pulled back. Lower the bar to the lower chest, then press to straight arms. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing the bar.

ff_kettlebell_half_kneeling_alternating_.description: Kneel with one foot forward and hold a kettlebell by the horns at the chest. Circle it around the head, return to the front, then reverse direction. Keep glutes tight and avoid leaning the torso.

ff_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_alternating_.description: Kneel on both knees and hold a kettlebell by the horns. Circle the bell around the head one way, then the other, keeping it close. Squeeze the glutes and avoid flaring the ribs.

ff_bodyweight_rolling_squat_burpee.description: Squat down, roll onto the back, and use momentum to return to the feet. Plant the hands, step or jump to plank, then come back up to stand or jump. Keep the roll tucked and land with knees tracking over toes.

ff_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_alternating_.description: Kneel tall holding a kettlebell by the horns near one hip. Sweep it across the body into a halo around the head, then return toward the opposite hip and alternate. Keep hips still and avoid leaning with the bell.

ff_barbell_seated_overhead_press.description: Sit upright with the bar at the front of the shoulders and feet planted. Press the bar overhead, moving the head through once it clears the face, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs down and avoid bouncing off the chest.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_z_press.description: Sit on the floor with legs straight and press two dumbbells together at the chest. Keep the dumbbells squeezed as you press overhead, then lower to the chest. Sit tall and avoid leaning back.

ff_barbell_half_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel with one foot forward and hold a barbell at the shoulders. Brace the glutes and press the bar overhead, then lower under control. Keep hips square and avoid arching the low back.

ff_barbell_tall_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel on both knees with a barbell at the shoulders. Squeeze the glutes and press the bar overhead, then lower to the front rack. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid sitting back.

ff_barbell_inverted_row.description: Set a bar in a rack and lie under it with hands just wider than shoulders. Pull the chest toward the bar, then lower until arms are long. Keep the body straight and avoid letting the hips drop.

ff_ring_row.description: Hold the rings and walk the feet forward until the body leans back. Pull the chest to the rings, then lower until arms are straight. Keep shoulders down and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase.description: Stand with one foot on a slider and a kettlebell held on the same side as the sliding leg. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull forward to stand. Keep the front foot rooted and avoid tipping toward the weight.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_front_ra.description: Hold a kettlebell in the front rack opposite the foot on the slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the elbow close and avoid rotating the torso.

ff_ring_bulgarian_row.description: Set rings low and place the feet forward so the body leans back under them. Row the chest toward the rings, pause, and lower with arms straight. Keep the body rigid and avoid pulling one ring higher than the other.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_rotatio.description: Rack two kettlebells and stand with feet about hip width. Rotate slightly as you press one bell overhead, return to center, then press the other side. Pivot through the hips and avoid twisting the low back.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_push_pr.description: Hold two kettlebells in the rack. Dip once, drive up, and press one bell overhead, then repeat on the other side. Keep the dip vertical and avoid leaning away from the pressing arm.

ff_cable_tall_kneeling_face_pull.description: Kneel on both knees facing a cable set near face height. Pull the rope toward the face with elbows high, then reach forward. Squeeze the glutes and avoid leaning back.

ff_macebell_ballistic_curl.description: Stand tall holding a macebell with the head offset to one side. Curl the handle toward the chest, controlling the uneven pull, then lower smoothly. Keep elbows close and avoid letting the mace swing your torso.

ff_single_arm_indian_club_outer_heart_sh.description: Stand tall holding one light Indian club at your side. Swing it outward in a heart-shaped path and return to the start with a smooth wrist turnover. Keep the shoulder relaxed and avoid forcing speed before the pattern is clear.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_pullover.description: Hold one clubbell vertically with both hands or one hand as prescribed. Move it from in front of the body up and behind the head, then return along the same path. Keep the ribs down and avoid letting the club pull the shoulder open.

ff_double_clubbell_pullover.description: Hold a clubbell in each hand with arms in front of the body. Arc the clubs overhead and slightly behind the head, then bring them back forward. Keep elbows soft and avoid losing control of the heavy ends.

ff_clubbell_pullover.description: Hold the clubbell securely in front of the chest or hips. Arc it overhead and behind the head as far as you can control, then return to the start. Keep the path smooth and avoid flaring the ribs.

ff_clubbell_front_flag_press.description: Hold the clubbell handle near the chest with the heavy end pointing outward. Press it forward and slightly up until the arms are long, then pull it back with the lats. Keep shoulders packed and avoid rushing the levered weight.

ff_single_arm_indian_club_inner_heart_sh.description: Stand tall holding one light Indian club. Swing it inward through a heart-shaped path and guide it back to the start with a smooth wrist turn. Keep the motion relaxed and avoid muscling it with a stiff elbow.

ff_single_arm_ring_dead_hang.description: Grip one ring with one hand and step or jump into a hang with the other arm free. Let the shoulder stay active by gently pulling it away from the ear. Keep the body still and step down before grip or shoulder position fails.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_deadlift.description: Stand with a dumbbell beside one foot like a suitcase. Hinge and bend the knees to grip it, then stand tall by pushing the floor away. Keep shoulders square and avoid leaning toward the weight.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_front_ra.description: Hold a kettlebell in the front rack on the same side as the foot on the slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then return to standing. Keep the rack tight and avoid collapsing toward the kettlebell.

ff_clubbell_torch_press.description: Hold the clubbell in a guard position with the heavy end angled up. Brace and press it forward and upward, then pull it back to the guard. Keep the shoulder packed and choke up if the club wobbles.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_torch_press.description: Hold one clubbell in the working hand at the guard position. Press it forward and up on a diagonal, then draw the elbow back down with control. Keep the wrist firm and avoid letting the club drift outside the shoulder.

ff_double_clubbell_torch_press.description: Hold two clubbells in the guard position with elbows close. Press both clubs forward and upward, pause, then pull them back to the guard. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the heavy ends flare apart.

ff_barbell_conventional_deadlift.description: Stand with the bar over midfoot and hands just outside the legs. Hinge down, brace, and push the floor away until hips and knees lock out together. Keep the bar close and avoid yanking before the back is set.

ff_barbell_sumo_deadlift.description: Stand wide with toes turned out and the bar over midfoot. Grip inside the knees, brace, and drive the floor apart as you stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_barbell_rack_pull.description: Set the bar on rack pins around knee height and stand with it close to the thighs. Hinge to grip, brace, and stand tall by driving the hips through. Keep lats tight and avoid leaning back at the top.

ff_barbell_snatch_grip_deadlift.description: Stand with the bar over midfoot and take a wide snatch grip. Brace, push the floor away, and stand while keeping the bar close to the legs. Keep the chest proud and avoid letting the hips shoot up first.

ff_alternating_double_clubbell_torch_pre.description: Hold two clubbells in the guard position. Press one club forward and up, bring it back, then press the other side. Keep the nonworking club quiet and avoid rotating the torso.

ff_stability_ball_hyperextension.description: Lie face-down over a stability ball with feet braced against a wall or floor. Fold over the ball, then lift the chest until the body is straight. Keep the neck long and avoid over-arching past neutral.

ff_barbell_seated_good_morning.description: Sit on a bench with a barbell across the upper back and feet planted wide. Hinge forward from the hips, then squeeze the glutes to sit tall again. Keep the spine long and avoid rounding to reach lower.

ff_barbell_good_morning.description: Stand with a barbell across the upper back and knees softly bent. Push the hips back until the torso inclines forward, then drive the hips through to stand. Keep the bar pinned to the back and avoid bending the knees into a squat.

ff_bodyweight_wall_sit.description: Stand with your back against a wall and walk the feet forward. Slide down until the knees are bent, then hold the position. Keep knees over ankles and avoid letting the low back arch away from the wall.

ff_bodyweight_wall_slide_squat.description: Stand with your back on a wall and feet slightly forward. Slide down into a squat, then press through the feet to slide back up. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid bouncing off the wall.

ff_stability_ball_wall_slide_squat.description: Place a stability ball between your mid-back and a wall. Walk feet forward, squat as the ball rolls, then stand tall. Keep pressure even through both feet and avoid letting knees collapse inward.

ff_suspension_squat.description: Hold suspension handles and stand with feet about shoulder width. Sit the hips down and back, then use the legs to stand while the straps guide balance. Keep the chest tall and avoid pulling yourself up with the arms.

ff_suspension_alternating_reverse_lunge.description: Hold suspension handles and stand tall. Step one foot back into a reverse lunge, return to standing, then alternate sides. Keep light tension on the straps and avoid leaning backward.

ff_bodyweight_squat_to_bench.description: Stand in front of a bench with feet about shoulder width. Sit the hips back until you lightly touch the bench, then stand without rocking. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid fully relaxing onto the bench.

ff_bodyweight_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width and toes slightly out. Sit the hips down between the heels, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_bodyweight_hand_assisted_split_squat.description: Stand in a split stance near a support you can hold lightly. Bend both knees to lower straight down, then press through the front foot to stand. Use the hand for balance only and keep the front knee tracking over toes.

ff_bodyweight_walking_lunge.description: Stand tall and step forward into a lunge. Lower until both knees bend, then push through the front foot and bring the back leg forward into the next step. Keep the torso tall and avoid the front knee diving inward.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_squat.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at chest height with feet about shoulder width. Sit the hips down between the heels, then drive through the whole foot to stand. Keep elbows near the ribs and avoid tipping forward.

ff_miniband_romanian_deadlift.description: Stand on a miniband or loop it under the feet and hold the other end at the hips. Push the hips back with knees softly bent, then stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the band close and avoid rounding the back.

ff_superband_resisted_skater_jump.description: Anchor a superband around the waist and stand in an athletic stance. Bound sideways against the band, land softly on one foot, then return or repeat. Keep the knee over the toes and avoid collapsing at the hip.

ff_cable_prone_single_leg_hamstring_curl.description: Lie face-down with an ankle strap attached to a low cable. Bend one knee to curl the heel toward the glute, then straighten the leg slowly. Keep hips on the bench or floor and avoid lifting the pelvis.

ff_bodyweight_candlestick_roll_up_tuck_j.description: Squat down and roll onto the upper back with legs reaching toward the ceiling. Roll forward to the feet, then jump up and tuck the knees toward the chest. Land softly in a squat and avoid throwing the head forward.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_front_flag_press.description: Hold one clubbell at the chest with the heavy end forward. Press it forward and slightly up until the arm is long, then pull it back under control. Keep the shoulder packed and avoid letting the club twist the wrist.

ff_double_clubbell_front_flag_press.description: Hold two clubbells at chest height with heavy ends forward. Press both forward and slightly up, then draw them back to the chest. Keep the torso braced and avoid rushing the levered load.

ff_barbell_block_pull_deadlift.description: Set a barbell on blocks so it starts below or around the knees. Hinge to grip, brace, and stand tall while dragging the bar close. Keep the back set and avoid bouncing the plates off the blocks.

ff_barbell_box_back_squat.description: Set a box behind you and hold the bar across the upper back. Sit back to lightly touch the box, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep tension on the box and avoid rocking backward.

ff_barbell_deficit_deadlift.description: Stand on a small platform with the bar over midfoot. Hinge down, brace, and push the floor away to stand with the bar close. Use a modest deficit and avoid losing back position at the start.

ff_barbell_front_rack_squat.description: Hold the bar in the front rack with elbows high and feet about shoulder width. Squat between the heels, then drive up while keeping the elbows lifted. Avoid letting the bar roll forward.

ff_barbell_glute_bridge.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and a padded barbell across the hips. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, then lower to the floor. Keep ribs down and avoid over-arching at the top.

ff_barbell_halting_deadlift.description: Start a deadlift with the bar over midfoot and brace hard. Pull the bar to just below the knees, pause with lats tight, then return to the floor or finish as prescribed. Keep the bar close and avoid relaxing during the pause.

ff_barbell_high_bar_back_squat.description: Set the bar high on the upper traps and stand with feet about shoulder width. Squat down with the chest tall, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid letting the elbows flare back.

ff_barbell_low_bar_back_squat.description: Set the bar across the rear shoulders and grip it tight. Sit the hips back and down, then drive up while keeping the bar over midfoot. Keep the chest from collapsing and avoid shifting onto the toes.

ff_alternating_double_clubbell_front_fla.description: Hold two clubbells at the chest with heavy ends forward. Press one club out and back, then repeat on the other side. Keep the nonworking club stable and avoid rotating the torso.

ff_barbell_power_clean.description: Stand with the bar over midfoot and hands just outside the legs. Push from the floor, extend the hips hard, and catch the bar on the shoulders in a partial squat. Keep the bar close and avoid pulling early with bent arms.

ff_barbell_power_snatch.description: Stand with a wide grip and the bar over midfoot. Push from the floor, extend violently, and catch the bar overhead in a partial squat. Keep the bar close and avoid swinging it away from the body.

ff_double_indian_club_lateral_internal_a.description: Stand tall holding a light Indian club in each hand at the sides. Rotate the clubs inward and outward through small lateral circles. Keep shoulders relaxed and avoid forcing speed or range.

ff_barbell_romanian_deadlift.description: Stand tall holding a barbell against the thighs with knees softly bent. Push the hips back as the bar slides down the legs, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the spine long and avoid chasing depth by rounding.

ff_single_arm_indian_club_lateral_intern.description: Stand tall holding one light Indian club at your side. Rotate the club inward and outward through a small smooth arc. Keep the elbow soft and avoid letting the shoulder shrug.

ff_barbell_back_rack_split_squat.description: Place a barbell across the upper back and stand in a split stance. Lower straight down until both knees bend, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep the front knee tracking over toes and avoid tipping forward.

ff_barbell_stiff_legged_deadlift.description: Hold a barbell in front of the thighs with knees only slightly bent. Hinge at the hips and lower the bar close to the legs, then stand tall. Keep the back long and avoid locking the knees hard.

ff_barbell_sumo_back_squat.description: Set the bar across the upper back and take a wide stance with toes turned out. Squat between the knees, then drive the floor apart to stand. Keep knees in line with toes and avoid collapsing inward.

ff_bodyweight_pistol_squat.description: Stand on one leg with the other leg reaching forward. Sit the hips down into a single-leg squat, then press through the standing foot to rise. Keep the heel down and avoid letting the knee cave inward.

ff_bodyweight_skater_squat.description: Stand on one leg with the other knee bent behind you. Reach the free knee toward the floor as you squat, then drive through the standing foot to return. Keep hips square and avoid pushing off the back foot.

ff_cable_pull_through.description: Face away from a low cable with a rope held between the legs. Hinge the hips back, then drive them forward to stand tall. Keep arms as hooks and avoid turning it into a squat or shoulder pull.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_bulgarian_sp.description: Hold dumbbells at the sides with the rear foot elevated on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid drifting onto the front toes.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_step_up.description: Hold dumbbells at the sides and place one foot fully on a box. Drive through the box foot to stand tall, then step down with control. Keep the working knee over the toes and avoid pushing off the floor leg.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_deficit_spli.description: Stand in a split stance with the front foot on a small plate or step and dumbbells at the sides. Lower straight down, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep the heel heavy and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_alternating_.description: Hold dumbbells at the sides and step forward into a lunge. Push through the front foot to return to standing, then alternate legs. Keep the torso tall and avoid the front knee collapsing inward.
Hold dumbbells at the sides and step one foot back into a reverse lunge. Drive through the front foot to stand, then alternate legs. Keep shoulders level and avoid swinging the weights.

ff_double_indian_club_overhead_arm_circl.description: Stand tall holding a light Indian club in each hand overhead or just forward of it. Circle the clubs smoothly around the shoulders, then reverse direction. Keep ribs down and avoid forcing the clubs behind you.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_split_squat.description: Hold dumbbells at the sides in a split stance. Bend both knees to lower straight down, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid leaning toward one dumbbell.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_alternatin.description: Hold two dumbbells at the shoulders and place one foot fully on a box. Drive through the box foot to stand, step down, then alternate sides. Keep elbows high and avoid pushing off the trail leg.

ff_bodyweight_face_the_wall_squat.description: Stand close to a wall facing it with feet about shoulder width. Squat down without touching the wall with your knees, chest, or hands, then stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid folding forward.

ff_bodyweight_feet_elevated_glute_bridge.description: Lie on your back with heels on a bench or box and knees bent. Press through the heels to lift the hips, then lower to the floor. Keep ribs down and avoid over-arching the low back.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_.description: Hold a bottoms-up kettlebell in the front rack opposite the foot on the slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then return to standing. Keep the wrist vertical and avoid rushing the balance challenge.

Hold a bottoms-up kettlebell in the front rack on the same side as the sliding foot. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull forward to stand. Keep the elbow close and avoid letting the bell tip.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead.description: Hold a kettlebell overhead opposite the foot on the slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then return to standing. Keep the bell stacked over the shoulder and avoid leaning away from it.

Hold a kettlebell overhead on the same side as the foot on the slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the weight drift forward.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_slider_kettlebell_goblet_reverse_lung.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_miniband_thigh_monster_walk.description: Place a miniband around the thighs and stand with feet hip width. Sit into a small squat and step sideways or slightly forward while keeping band tension. Keep the knees tracking over the toes instead of caving inward.

ff_bodyweight_quadruped_hip_extension.description: Start on hands and knees with hands under shoulders and knees under hips. Brace the trunk and drive one heel toward the ceiling without twisting the pelvis. Lower the knee under control and avoid arching the low back.

ff_suspension_pistol_squat.description: Stand on one leg holding the suspension handles. Sit into a single-leg squat while the free leg reaches forward, then press through the working foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and avoid pulling with the arms.

ff_suspension_skater_squat.description: Balance on one leg holding the suspension handles. Reach the other knee behind you toward the floor, then press through the standing foot to rise. Keep the chest tall and avoid twisting the knee inward.

ff_bodyweight_tuck_jump.description: Stand tall with feet about hip width and arms ready to swing. Dip quickly, jump straight up, and pull the knees toward the chest before landing softly. Land with knees tracking over toes and avoid stiff-legged landings.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_single_leg_wal.description: Sit against a wall with knees bent and feet flat under the knees. Brace the trunk, lift one foot a few inches, set it down, then alternate sides. Keep the hips level and avoid sliding up the wall.

ff_bodyweight_single_leg_romanian_deadli.description: Stand on one leg and hinge forward as the free leg reaches behind you. Drive the hips through and hop lightly off the standing foot, then land back in balance. Keep the back long and avoid twisting during the hinge.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_walking_lung.description: Stand tall with two dumbbells overhead. Step forward into a lunge, drive through the front foot, and continue into the next step. Keep the torso stacked over the hips and avoid pushing off the back foot too hard.

ff_stability_ball_double_dumbbell_suitca.description: Set the rear foot on a bench or ball with dumbbells at your sides. Bend the front knee and lower the back knee toward the floor, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_bodyweight_reverse_nordic.description: Kneel tall with hips extended and feet anchored as needed. Lean the body back from the knees, then use the thighs to pull upright. Keep the ribs down and avoid bending at the hips.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_lateral_bench_.description: Stand beside a low bench or box with knees slightly bent. Jump laterally over or onto the bench, land softly, then repeat to the other side. Regain balance before the next jump and avoid stiff knees.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width with one dumbbell held securely. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_bodyweight_skater_jump.description: Stand on one leg and bound sideways to the other foot. Land softly with the knee bent, then push back to the starting side. Keep the chest up and avoid letting the landing knee cave inward.

ff_slider_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_cable_prone_bench_hamstring_curl.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

ff_bodyweight_bulgarian_split_squat_jump.description: Set the rear foot on a bench or ball using bodyweight only. Bend the front knee and lower the back knee toward the floor, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_cable_standing_single_leg_hamstring_c.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

ff_bodyweight_nordic_hamstring_curl.description: Kneel with ankles anchored and body tall from knees to head. Lean forward as one unit, catching yourself with the hands if needed. Pull back up with the hamstrings and avoid folding at the hips.

ff_superband_assisted_pistol_squat.description: Anchor a superband in front of you or overhead and hold it for light assistance. Stand on one leg, sit into a pistol squat, then press through the working foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and use only enough band help to stay balanced.

ff_slider_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_f.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_walking_lung.description: Stand tall with dumbbells at your sides. Step forward into a lunge, drive through the front foot, and continue into the next step. Keep the torso stacked over the hips and avoid pushing off the back foot too hard.

ff_barbell_back_rack_walking_lunge.description: Stand tall with the bar across the upper back. Step forward into a lunge, drive through the front foot, and continue into the next step. Keep the torso stacked over the hips and avoid pushing off the back foot too hard.

ff_bodyweight_box_pistol_squat.description: Stand on one leg using bodyweight only. Sit into a single-leg squat while the free leg reaches forward, then press through the working foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and avoid pulling with the arms.

ff_barbell_overhead_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width with the bar locked out overhead. Squat down while keeping the load stacked over the midfoot, then stand tall. Press up into the load and avoid letting it drift forward.

ff_slider_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_o.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_landmine_goblet_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width holding the landmine end at the chest. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_stability_ball_hamstring_curl.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

ff_slider_hamstring_curl.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

ff_bodyweight_hamstring_walkout.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and hips lifted in a glute bridge. Walk the heels away a few small steps, then walk them back under the knees. Keep the hips level and avoid letting the low back sag.

ff_slider_dumbbell_goblet_reverse_lunge.description: Start tall with the working foot on a slider. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_bodyweight_dragon_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width using bodyweight only. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_stability_ball_single_leg_hamstring_c.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

ff_barbell_single_leg_romanian_deadlift.description: Stand holding the bar securely with knees softly bent. Push the hips back while the load stays close, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the spine long and avoid rounding to reach lower.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_lateral_lung.description: Stand tall with dumbbells at your sides. Step or slide to one side, bend that knee, and keep the other leg long before pushing back to center. Keep the planted foot flat and avoid twisting toward the load.

ff_barbell_zombie_walking_lunge.description: Stand tall holding the bar securely. Step forward into a lunge, drive through the front foot, and continue into the next step. Keep the torso stacked over the hips and avoid pushing off the back foot too hard.

ff_barbell_overhead_walking_lunge.description: Stand tall with the bar locked out overhead. Step forward into a lunge, drive through the front foot, and continue into the next step. Keep the torso stacked over the hips and avoid pushing off the back foot too hard.

ff_barbell_squat_clean.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width holding the bar securely. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_single_arm_landmine_split_clean_to_sp.description: Stand at the landmine with one hand on the sleeve. Clean the sleeve to the shoulder, then dip and split the feet as you press overhead. Land with both knees soft and avoid pressing before the leg drive finishes.

ff_single_arm_landmine_hack_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width holding the landmine sleeve. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_double_indian_club_lateral_arm_circle.description: Stand tall holding light Indian clubs at your sides. Circle the arms out to the sides in smooth arcs, then reverse direction. Keep shoulders down and avoid using clubs that pull you off posture.

ff_resistance_band_shoulder_dislocates.description: Hold a resistance band wide in front of the thighs with straight arms. Sweep the band overhead and behind the body, then return to the front. Keep ribs down and widen the grip if the shoulders shrug.

ff_suspension_reverse_grip_bicep_curl.description: Stand or lean back holding the suspension handles. Curl by bending the elbows, then lower until the arms are long. Keep elbows near the ribs and avoid swinging the body.

ff_cable_straight_bar_reverse_grip_bicep.description: Stand facing a low cable with a straight bar and palms facing down. Curl the bar by bending the elbows, then lower until the arms are long. Keep elbows near the ribs and avoid leaning back to move the cable.

ff_single_arm_cable_reverse_grip_bicep_c.description: Stand facing a low cable with one handle held palm down. Curl the handle toward the shoulder, then lower until the arm is long. Keep the wrist straight and avoid turning the torso toward the cable.

ff_bar_eccentric_chin_up.description: Start at the top of the bar rep with chest close to the bar. Lower slowly until the arms are straight, then step or jump back up for the next rep. Keep the legs quiet and avoid dropping through the shoulders.

ff_bar_eccentric_pull_up.description: Start at the top of the bar rep with chest close to the bar. Lower slowly until the arms are straight, then step or jump back up for the next rep. Keep the legs quiet and avoid dropping through the shoulders.

ff_landmine_half_kneeling_oblique_twist.description: Set up kneeling or seated holding the landmine sleeve. Rotate the handle from side to side while the hips stay steady. Move from the ribs and avoid yanking with only the arms.

ff_single_arm_bar_dead_hang.description: Grip the bar with one hand and let the body hang with feet clear or lightly assisted. Keep the shoulder active by pulling it away from the ear. Stop before the grip opens and avoid twisting wildly.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_o.description: Kneel tall with one kettlebell racked at the shoulder. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_tall_kn.description: Kneel tall with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Press one bell overhead, lower it, then press the other side while staying upright. Squeeze the glutes and avoid shifting the hips side to side.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_half_kn.description: Set a half-kneeling stance with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Press one bell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides without losing your brace. Keep the front foot flat and avoid leaning away from the press.

ff_stability_ball_single_arm_forearm_pla.description: Place both forearms on a stability ball and step back into a plank. Lighten or lift one forearm while the other steadies the ball. Keep hips square and avoid rolling the body open.

ff_stability_ball_feet_elevated_single_a.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and the forearms on a stability ball. Hold the plank while lightening or lifting one forearm from the ball. Keep the ribs tucked and avoid rotating the hips.

ff_landmine_zercher_skater_squat.description: Balance on one leg cradling the landmine in the elbows. Reach the other knee behind you toward the floor, then press through the standing foot to rise. Keep the chest tall and avoid twisting the knee inward.

ff_single_arm_landmine_front_rack_contra.description: Start tall holding the landmine sleeve. Slide or step one foot back into a reverse lunge, then drive through the front foot to return. Keep the front knee over the middle toes and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_landmine_thruster.description: Hold the landmine sleeve with both hands at chest height and stand with feet shoulder width. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_landmine_romanian_deadlift.description: Stand holding the landmine sleeve with knees softly bent. Push the hips back while the load stays close, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the spine long and avoid rounding to reach lower.

ff_single_arm_landmine_single_leg_romani.description: Stand holding the landmine sleeve with knees softly bent. Push the hips back while the load stays close, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the spine long and avoid rounding to reach lower.

ff_landmine_tall_kneeling_oblique_twist.description: Set up kneeling or seated holding the landmine sleeve. Rotate the handle from side to side while the hips stay steady. Move from the ribs and avoid yanking with only the arms.

ff_landmine_feet_elevated_russian_twist.description: Set up kneeling or seated holding the landmine sleeve. Rotate the handle from side to side while the hips stay steady. Move from the ribs and avoid yanking with only the arms.

ff_single_arm_landmine_thruster.description: Hold the landmine sleeve in one hand at the shoulder and stand square to the anchor. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_double_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_seesa.description: Kneel tall with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Press one bell up as the other lowers, alternating in a seesaw rhythm. Keep the torso quiet and avoid leaning toward either side.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_arm_bar.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_barbell_power_clean_to_overhead_press.description: Start with the bar over the midfoot and hands just outside the legs. Power clean the bar to the shoulders, stand tall, then press it overhead. Keep the bar close and reset your brace before the press.

ff_single_arm_suspension_mid_row.description: Set your torso in the row position holding the suspension handles. Pull the handle or weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Brace the trunk and avoid jerking the torso to finish.

ff_landmine_zercher_curtsy_lunge.description: Stand tall cradling the landmine in the elbows. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the hips mostly forward and avoid twisting the front knee inward.

ff_barbell_back_rack_alternating_cossack.description: Stand in a wide stance with the bar across the upper back. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_barbell_front_rack_alternating_cossac.description: Stand in a wide stance with the bar on the front shoulders. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_slider_double_kettlebell_overhead_lat.description: Stand tall with the working foot on a slider. Step or slide to one side, bend that knee, and keep the other leg long before pushing back to center. Keep the planted foot flat and avoid twisting toward the load.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_alternating_cossack_s.description: Stand in a wide stance holding a dumbbell at the chest. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_cossack_squat.description: Stand in a wide stance using bodyweight only. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_bodyweight_knee_over_toe_split_squat.description: Set a split stance using bodyweight only. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel planted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_barbell_back_rack_knee_over_toe_split.description: Set a split stance with the bar across the upper back. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel planted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_barbell_front_rack_knee_over_toe_spli.description: Set a split stance with the bar on the front shoulders. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel planted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_barbell_overhead_knee_over_toe_split_.description: Set a split stance with the bar locked out overhead. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel planted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_ez_bar_incline_bench_lying_tricep_ext.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_slider_knee_tuck.description: Start in a plank with feet on sliders or in suspension straps. Pull the knees or hips toward the chest, then return to a long plank. Keep shoulders stacked over hands and avoid letting the low back sag.

ff_ez_bar_incline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_decline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_front_raise.description: Set up holding the EZ bar with a tall posture. Raise the arms in the named path, then lower without swinging. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging toward the ears.

ff_suspension_pike.description: Start in a plank with feet on sliders or in suspension straps. Pull the knees or hips toward the chest, then return to a long plank. Keep shoulders stacked over hands and avoid letting the low back sag.

ff_suspension_side_plank_reach_through.description: Set a side plank with the feet in suspension straps and one forearm on the floor. Reach the top arm under the ribs, then rotate back open. Keep hips lifted and avoid rolling onto the low back.

ff_bodyweight_cocoon_crunch.description: Lie on the floor or ball in the named setup. Curl the ribs toward the hips, then lower back with control. Keep the neck relaxed and avoid using momentum to finish the rep.

ff_ab_wheel_standing_rollout.description: Stand with the ab wheel under the shoulders and hands on the handles. Roll forward only as far as you can brace, then pull the wheel back toward the feet. Keep glutes tight and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_cable_fire_hydrant.description: Attach a low cable to the working ankle and stand with support. Lift the bent knee out to the side, then return it under the hip. Keep the pelvis level and avoid leaning away from the cable.

ff_cable_tall_kneeling_pull_through.description: Kneel tall facing away from a low cable with the rope between the legs. Hinge the hips back, then squeeze the glutes to return to tall kneeling. Keep the spine long and avoid turning it into a squat.

ff_stability_ball_bent_knee_reverse_hype.description: Lie face down over the ball or bench with hips supported and knees bent. Lift the thighs until they line up with the torso, then lower slowly. Squeeze the glutes and avoid kicking into a back arch.

ff_bodyweight_bent_knee_reverse_hyperext.description: Lie face down over the ball or bench with hips supported and knees bent. Lift the thighs until they line up with the torso, then lower slowly. Squeeze the glutes and avoid kicking into a back arch.

ff_parallette_tuck_l_sit.description: Support yourself on parallettes, rings, or the floor with arms straight. Lift the knees, one leg, or both legs forward as named and hold the body tall. Push down through the hands and avoid sinking into the shoulders.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_bicep_curl.description: Stand or lean back holding the EZ bar. Curl by bending the elbows, then lower until the arms are long. Keep elbows near the ribs and avoid swinging the body.

ff_ez_bar_overhead_press.description: Stand with the EZ bar at the front of the shoulders and hands on the angled grips. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_parallette_single_leg_l_sit.description: Support yourself on parallettes, rings, or the floor with arms straight. Lift the knees, one leg, or both legs forward as named and hold the body tall. Push down through the hands and avoid sinking into the shoulders.

ff_stability_ball_bottoms_up.description: Lie on your back holding the stability ball lightly between the feet or lower legs. Lift the hips and ball toward the ceiling, then lower with control. Keep the neck relaxed and avoid swinging the legs.

ff_stability_ball_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs or a stability ball raised over the hips. Lower the legs side to side in an arc, then return through center. Keep the shoulders heavy and avoid dropping farther than you can brace.

ff_stability_ball_tall_kneeling_balance.description: Place both shins on a stability ball and come to a tall kneeling position. Brace the trunk, keep the hips extended, and hold the balance with eyes forward. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back.

ff_stability_ball_oblique_crunch.description: Lie on the floor or ball in the named setup. Curl the ribs toward the hips, then lower back with control. Keep the neck relaxed and avoid using momentum to finish the rep.

ff_stability_ball_forearm_plank.description: Place both forearms on a stability ball and step the feet back into a plank. Brace the abs and glutes while keeping a straight line from head to heels. Press into the ball and avoid letting the hips sag or rotate.

ff_slider_double_kettlebell_suitcase_lat.description: Stand tall with the working foot on a slider. Step or slide to one side, bend that knee, and keep the other leg long before pushing back to center. Keep the planted foot flat and avoid twisting toward the load.

ff_slider_kettlebell_horn_grip_lateral_l.description: Stand tall with the working foot on a slider. Step or slide to one side, bend that knee, and keep the other leg long before pushing back to center. Keep the planted foot flat and avoid twisting toward the load.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_turkish_sit_up.description: Lie on your back with one dumbbell held securely with the working arm vertical. Roll to the opposite elbow, then to the hand, keeping the weight stacked over the shoulder. Keep eyes on the load and avoid letting it drift behind you.

ff_single_arm_landmine_turkish_sit_up.description: Lie on your back holding the landmine sleeve with the working arm vertical. Roll to the opposite elbow, then to the hand, keeping the weight stacked over the shoulder. Keep eyes on the load and avoid letting it drift behind you.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_cyclist_.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell in the front rack. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_double_dumbbell_turkish_sit_up.description: Lie on your back with a dumbbell pressed above each shoulder. Curl to the elbows, then to the hands while keeping both weights stacked over the chest. Lower the same path and avoid letting either dumbbell drift behind you.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_cycl.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell in the front rack. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_cyclis.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell overhead. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_alternatin.description: Stand in a wide stance with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_cyclist_squat.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close holding a kettlebell by the horns. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_kettlebell_bottoms_up_horn_grip_cycli.description: Stand with heels elevated and hold a bottoms-up kettlebell by the horns at the chest. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the bell vertical and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell bottoms-up at the shoulder. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_cyclist_sq.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with two kettlebells overhead. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with two kettlebells bottoms-up overhead. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell bottoms-up at the shoulder. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close with the kettlebell bottoms-up overhead. Squat straight down, then drive through the feet to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

ff_ez_bar_seated_overhead_press.description: Sit tall on a bench with the EZ bar at the shoulders. Press the bar overhead, then lower it back to the front of the shoulders. Keep feet planted and avoid leaning back to clear the bar.

ff_ez_bar_tall_kneeling_overhead_tricep_.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_reverse_grip_overhead_press.description: Stand with the EZ bar at the shoulders and palms facing you on the angled grips. Press overhead while keeping elbows under wrists, then lower to the shoulders. Keep the torso braced and avoid forcing the wrists back.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_knee_over_to.description: Set a split stance with dumbbells at your sides. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel planted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_ez_bar_reverse_grip_seated_overhead_p.description: Sit tall with the EZ bar at the shoulders and palms facing you. Press overhead, then lower to the shoulders without losing the wrist angle. Keep feet planted and avoid leaning back into the press.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_bench_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the EZ bar. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_incline_bench_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the EZ bar. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_decline_bench_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the EZ bar. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_cable_half_kneeling_pallof_press.description: Stand or kneel sideways to the cable with the handle at the chest. Press the handle straight out, pause, then bring it back without rotating. Keep hips square and avoid letting the cable pull you around.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_cyclist_thruste.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_double_kettlebell_cyclist_thruster.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_cyclist.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_cycl.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_cyclist_.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_bottoms.description: Stand with heels elevated and the kettlebell or kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Squat down, stand hard, and use that leg drive to press the weight overhead. Finish tall with ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_barbell_kneeling_rollout.description: Start kneeling or standing holding the bar securely with hands on the wheel or bar. Roll forward only as far as you can brace, then pull back to the start. Keep glutes tight and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_overhead_press.description: Stand with the bar at the shoulders using a palms-up grip. Press overhead while keeping elbows under the bar, then lower to the shoulders. Keep the torso braced and avoid bending the wrists back.

ff_barbell_seated_reverse_grip_overhead_.description: Sit tall with the bar at the shoulders using a palms-up grip. Press overhead, then lower to the shoulders under control. Keep feet planted and avoid leaning back as the bar passes the face.

ff_cable_tall_kneeling_pallof_press.description: Stand or kneel sideways to the cable with the handle at the chest. Press the handle straight out, pause, then bring it back without rotating. Keep hips square and avoid letting the cable pull you around.

ff_tire_sledge_hammer_staggered_stance_s.description: Stand in a staggered stance beside the tire with the sledgehammer held over one shoulder. Drive the hammer down into the tire, then let it rebound and reset. Rotate through the hips and avoid rounding the back at impact.

ff_tire_macebell_staggered_stance_slam.description: Stand in a staggered stance with the macebell held over one shoulder. Chop the mace down into the tire, then guide it back to the start. Turn through the hips and avoid muscling the swing with only the arms.

ff_barbell_hang_power_clean.description: Start with the bar close and hands just outside the legs. Extend the hips hard, pull under the bar, and catch it at the shoulders before standing. Keep the bar close and avoid catching with low elbows.

ff_landmine_goblet_alternating_cossack_s.description: Stand in a wide stance holding the landmine end at the chest. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_landmine_low_hold_alternating_cossack.description: Stand in a wide stance holding the landmine sleeve. Shift into one side by bending that knee while the other leg stays long, then move back through center. Keep the working heel down and avoid collapsing the chest.

ff_bodyweight_push_up.description: Set hands under the shoulders and step the feet back into a straight plank. Bend the elbows to lower the chest toward the floor, then press back up. Keep the body in one line and avoid sagging the hips.

ff_barbell_close_grip_incline_bench_pres.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the bar securely. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_barbell_close_grip_decline_bench_pres.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the bar securely. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_double_dumbbell_push_press.description: Stand with two dumbbells racked at the shoulders. Dip straight down, drive through the legs, and press the weight overhead. Finish with the arms locked out and avoid turning the dip into a forward lean.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_push_press.description: Stand with one dumbbell racked at the shoulder. Dip straight down, drive through the legs, and press the weight overhead. Finish with the arms locked out and avoid turning the dip into a forward lean.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_push_pres.description: Stand with two dumbbells racked at the shoulders. Dip and drive to press one dumbbell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Keep the dip vertical and avoid leaning toward the pressing arm.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_push.description: Stand with one kettlebell bottoms-up at the shoulder. Dip and drive the weight upward, then quickly bend the knees to catch it overhead. Stand tall to finish and avoid pressing it out slowly after the catch.

ff_cable_rope_tall_kneeling_overhead_tri.description: Kneel tall facing away from a high cable with the rope behind your head. Extend the elbows until the arms are long, then bend them to return. Keep glutes squeezed and avoid flaring the ribs.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_push_je.description: Stand with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Dip and drive, catch one bell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Keep the catch quick and avoid pressing out with a soft brace.

ff_double_dumbbell_push_jerk.description: Stand with two dumbbells racked at the shoulders. Dip and drive the weight upward, then quickly bend the knees to catch it overhead. Stand tall to finish and avoid pressing it out slowly after the catch.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_overhea.description: Stand with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders. Press one bell overhead, lower it, then press the other side. Keep the torso still and avoid leaning away from the working arm.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_push_jerk.description: Stand with one dumbbell racked at the shoulder. Dip and drive the weight upward, then quickly bend the knees to catch it overhead. Stand tall to finish and avoid pressing it out slowly after the catch.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_push_jerk.description: Stand with two dumbbells racked at the shoulders. Dip and drive, catch one dumbbell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Keep the knees soft on the catch and avoid over-arching.

ff_double_plate_seated_lu_raise.description: Set up holding light plates with a tall posture. Raise the arms in the named path, then lower without swinging. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging toward the ears.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_floor_pr.description: Lie on the floor with the kettlebell or kettlebells held bottoms-up over the elbows. Press to straight arms, then lower until the upper arms touch the floor. Keep wrists vertical and avoid letting the bells tip.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_bottoms.description: Lie on the floor with the kettlebell or kettlebells held bottoms-up over the elbows. Press to straight arms, then lower until the upper arms touch the floor. Keep wrists vertical and avoid letting the bells tip.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_floo.description: Lie on the floor with the kettlebell or kettlebells held bottoms-up over the elbows. Press to straight arms, then lower until the upper arms touch the floor. Keep wrists vertical and avoid letting the bells tip.

ff_trap_bar_bent_over_row.description: Set your torso in the row position using the trap bar handles. Pull the handle or weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Brace the trunk and avoid jerking the torso to finish.

ff_trap_bar_pendlay_row.description: Set your torso in the row position using the trap bar handles. Pull the handle or weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Brace the trunk and avoid jerking the torso to finish.

ff_trap_bar_shrug.description: Stand tall holding the trap bar handles at the sides. Lift the shoulders straight up toward the ears, pause briefly, then lower. Keep arms straight and avoid rolling the shoulders forward.

ff_bodyweight_tuck_l_sit.description: Support yourself on parallettes, rings, or the floor with arms straight. Lift the knees, one leg, or both legs forward as named and hold the body tall. Push down through the hands and avoid sinking into the shoulders.

ff_parallette_straddle_l_sit.description: Support yourself on parallettes, rings, or the floor with arms straight. Lift the knees, one leg, or both legs forward as named and hold the body tall. Push down through the hands and avoid sinking into the shoulders.

ff_ring_turned_out_l_sit.description: Support yourself on parallettes, rings, or the floor with arms straight. Lift the knees, one leg, or both legs forward as named and hold the body tall. Push down through the hands and avoid sinking into the shoulders.

ff_battle_rope_power_slam.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width and one rope end in each hand. Lift both arms high, then slam the ropes down hard and reset. Brace the trunk and avoid rounding the back as the ropes hit.

ff_bodyweight_manna.description: Sit on the floor with hands beside the hips and legs straight. Press through the hands, lift the hips, and try to raise the legs while keeping the arms straight. Push the floor away and avoid collapsing through the shoulders.

ff_ring_tuck_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_advanced_tuck_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_straddle_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_half_lay_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_single_leg_out_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_full_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_trap_bar_floor_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor using the trap bar handles. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_trap_bar_overhead_press.description: Stand inside the trap bar with handles at shoulder height or cleaned to the shoulders. Press the bar overhead, then lower with control. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the bar drift forward.

ff_ring_handstand_lower_to_back_lever.description: Hang or start inverted on the rings with a firm grip. Lower into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full back lever shape named. Push the rings down and avoid shrugging into the ears.

ff_ring_tuck_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_advanced_tuck_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_straddle_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_half_lay_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_single_leg_out_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_full_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_ring_front_lever_pull_to_inverted_han.description: Start in a front lever shape on the rings with arms straight. Pull the body upward as one piece until you reach an inverted hang, then lower with control. Keep the hips lifted and avoid bending the elbows early.

ff_ring_inverted_hang.description: Grip the rings and pull or tuck the knees until the body is upside down. Hold with arms long and the rings close to the sides. Keep the neck relaxed and avoid swinging into the position.

ff_single_arm_barbell_kneeling_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_single_arm_barbell_standing_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_ring_circle_front_lever.description: Hang from the rings with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Lift into the tuck, straddle, half lay, single-leg, or full front lever shape named. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_trap_bar_tall_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel tall under or inside the trap bar with the handles at shoulder height. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_trap_bar_bench_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor using the trap bar handles. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_z_press.description: Sit on the floor with legs straight and two dumbbells at the shoulders. Press one dumbbell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Keep the spine tall and avoid leaning back to clear the weight.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_half_kneeling_ips.description: Set a half-kneeling stance with the dumbbell on the same side as the down knee. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_double_dumbbell_half_kneeling_overhea.description: Set a half-kneeling stance with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_overhea.description: Kneel tall with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_tall_knee.description: Kneel tall with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Press one dumbbell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Squeeze the glutes and avoid shifting the hips.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_half_knee.description: Set a half-kneeling stance with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Press one dumbbell overhead, lower it, then alternate sides. Keep the front foot flat and avoid leaning away from the press.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_ove.description: Kneel tall with one dumbbell at the shoulder. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_double_plate_incline_bench_prone_y_ra.description: Set up holding light plates with a tall posture. Raise the arms in the named path, then lower without swinging. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging toward the ears.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_pendlay_row.description: Hinge until the torso is near parallel and place one kettlebell on the floor under the shoulder. Row the bell to the lower ribs, then set it back down each rep. Brace hard and avoid rotating the torso open.

ff_barbell_floor_press.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the bar securely. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_ring_plank.description: Set the rings low and place one hand on each ring with feet back in a plank. Brace the abs and glutes while keeping the rings under the shoulders. Press down into the rings and avoid letting them drift wide.

ff_single_arm_ring_plank.description: Set one hand in a ring and the other hand on the floor, then step back into a straight high plank. Press the ring down and brace as you hold without letting the ring drift away. Keep the hips square to the floor instead of rotating toward the support arm.

ff_battle_rope_alternating_outward_circl.description: Stand facing the rope anchor with feet about shoulder width and one rope end in each hand. Brace the trunk and make alternating outward circles, letting one arm circle out as the other returns. Keep the knees soft and shoulders down instead of shrugging as the ropes move.

ff_battle_rope_alternating_inward_circle.description: Stand facing the rope anchor with feet about shoulder width and a rope end in each hand. Brace the trunk and make alternating inward circles, keeping the circles smooth and continuous. Keep the elbows slightly bent and avoid twisting the torso to create the motion.

ff_ring_support_hold.description: Set the rings near hip height and press down until your arms are straight and feet are off the floor or lightly assisted. Turn the rings slightly out, keep the shoulders pressed away from the ears, and hold the body tall. Avoid bending the elbows or letting the rings slide away from your sides.

ff_ring_side_plank.description: Place the lower forearm in a ring and extend the legs into a side plank with feet stacked or staggered. Lift the hips until the body forms a long line from head to heels. Press the forearm into the ring and avoid letting the hips sag or roll forward.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_bent_over_row.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and hold the barbell so the arms hang below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the torso quiet and avoid standing up to finish the row.

ff_macebell_offset_bent_over_row.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and hold the weight so the arms hang below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the torso quiet and avoid standing up to finish the row.

ff_macebell_reverse_grip_offset_bent_ove.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and hold the weight so the arms hang below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the lower ribs, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the torso quiet and avoid standing up to finish the row.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_pen.description: Hinge until the torso is nearly parallel to the floor and let the kettlebell start from the floor each rep. Brace, pull one side at a time toward the lower ribs, then return it to the floor. Keep the back set and avoid bouncing the weight with the hips.

ff_bodyweight_hollow_body_rock.description: Lie on your back with arms overhead and legs long, then curl the ribs and hips up into a shallow hollow shape. Keep the low back pressed toward the floor as you rock a few inches forward and back. Make the rock small and avoid kicking the legs to create momentum.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_power_snatch.description: Set the dumbbell between or just in front of the feet and hinge with a flat back. Drive through the legs and hips, then guide the dumbbell close to the body into an overhead lockout. Keep the arm path close and avoid swinging the load far away from you.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_power.description: Set the dumbbell between or just in front of the feet and hinge with a flat back. Drive through the legs and hips, then guide the dumbbell close to the body into an overhead lockout. Keep the arm path close and avoid swinging the load far away from you.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_squat_snatch.description: Set the dumbbell between or just in front of the feet and hinge with a flat back. Drive through the legs and hips, then guide the dumbbell close to the body into an overhead lockout as you receive it in a squat. Keep the arm path close and avoid swinging the load far away from you.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_squat.description: Set the dumbbell between or just in front of the feet and hinge with a flat back. Drive through the legs and hips, then guide the dumbbell close to the body into an overhead lockout as you receive it in a squat. Keep the arm path close and avoid swinging the load far away from you.

ff_single_arm_cable_single_leg_romanian_.description: Stand on one leg holding the weight in one hand with a soft knee. Hinge by sending the free leg back and lowering the load toward the floor. Keep the hips square and avoid opening the pelvis to chase more depth.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_cyclist_sq.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close, holding the kettlebells at your sides. Sit the knees forward and down while keeping the torso tall, then stand through the midfoot. Keep the knees tracking over the toes and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_cyclis.description: Stand with heels elevated and feet close, holding the kettlebell at your sides. Sit the knees forward and down while keeping the torso tall, then stand through the midfoot. Keep the knees tracking over the toes and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_step_up.description: Stand in front of a box with the weight in the front rack position. Place the whole working foot on the box, drive through that foot, and stand tall before stepping down. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and avoid pushing off the trailing leg.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_prone.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with the weights hanging below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the ribs while keeping the chest supported. Lower fully and avoid lifting the chest or shrugging at the top.
