Elevate the long-leg foot on a low block or plate so the heel stays supported as you shift. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_barbell_zombie_squat.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width and balance the barbell across the front shoulders with arms straight forward. Squat between the heels with the elbows high and arms straight forward, then stand by pushing the floor away. Keep the bar on the front shoulders and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_barbell_zombie_split_squat.description: Set a split stance and balance the barbell across the front shoulders with arms straight forward. Lower both knees with the front foot flat, then press through the front foot to stand. Keep the bar balanced on the shoulders and avoid reaching the chin forward to save the rack.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_cossack_squat.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and bear-hug the heavy sandbag tight to the chest. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_alternating_co.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and bear-hug the heavy sandbag tight to the chest. Shift into one hip, return through center, then repeat to the opposite side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_contralateral_.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and shoulder the heavy sandbag securely. Keep the load on the side opposite the bent working leg. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_alternating_co.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and shoulder the heavy sandbag securely. Shift into one hip, return through center, then repeat to the opposite side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_ipsilateral_co.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and shoulder the heavy sandbag securely. Keep the load on the same side as the bent working leg. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_barbell_zombie_cyclist_squat.description: Stand with heels elevated in a narrow stance and balance the barbell across the front shoulders with arms straight forward. Sit the knees forward and down while keeping the torso upright, then stand by pushing through the whole forefoot and heel. Keep the knees tracking with the toes and avoid rocking off the heel wedge.

ff_single_arm_suspension_foot_elevated_i.description: Take a wide Cossack stance with the long-leg foot elevated on a low block. Hold one suspension handle lightly for assistance on the same side as the bent leg. Shift toward the working leg while the other leg stays long. Keep the heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes.

ff_single_arm_suspension_ipsilateral_cos.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold one suspension handle lightly for assistance. Keep the load on the same side as the bent working leg. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_battle_rope_low_switch_cossack_squat_.description: Anchor the battle ropes and take a wide Cossack stance and stay low as you switch sides with one rope end in each hand. As the lower-body pattern continues, create alternating waves by driving one arm up as the other arm comes down. Keep the torso braced and land or step with the knee aligned over the middle toes rather than letting the ropes pull you forward.

ff_plate_overhead_cossack_squat.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold a weight plate overhead with elbows straight. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_plate_overhead_alternating_cossack_sq.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold a weight plate overhead with elbows straight. Shift into one hip, return through center, then repeat to the opposite side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_plate_overhead_low_switch_cossack_squ.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold a weight plate overhead with elbows straight. Sink into one hip, keep the other leg long, then stay low as you switch through center to the other side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_plate_overhead_foot_elevated_cossack_.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold a weight plate overhead with elbows straight. Elevate the long-leg foot on a low block or plate so the heel stays supported as you shift. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_cossack_squat.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and rest the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_alternating_c.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and rest the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Shift into one hip, return through center, then repeat to the opposite side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_low_switch_co.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and rest the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Sink into one hip, keep the other leg long, then stay low as you switch through center to the other side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_foot_elevated.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and rest the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Elevate the long-leg foot on a low block or plate so the heel stays supported as you shift. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_cossack_squat.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold the sandbag high against the front of the chest. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_alternating_cossac.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold the sandbag high against the front of the chest. Shift into one hip, return through center, then repeat to the opposite side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_low_switch_cossack.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold the sandbag high against the front of the chest. Sink into one hip, keep the other leg long, then stay low as you switch through center to the other side. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_foot_elevated_coss.description: Take a wide Cossack stance and hold the sandbag high against the front of the chest. Elevate the long-leg foot on a low block or plate so the heel stays supported as you shift. Shift toward the working leg by bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel heavy and the knee tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_bulgarian_spl.description: Place the rear foot on a bench behind you and rest the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Lower mostly straight down until the front knee bends deeply, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front heel planted and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_plate_dead_bug.description: Lie on your back with knees over hips and hold a weight plate above the chest. Brace so the low back stays heavy on the floor, then slowly extend the opposite arm-and-leg pattern as assigned. Move only as far as you can without the ribs popping up or the back arching.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_bulgarian_split_sq.description: Place the rear foot on a bench behind you and hold the sandbag high against the front of the chest. Lower mostly straight down until the front knee bends deeply, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front heel planted and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_bulgarian_split_squ.description: Place the rear foot on a bench behind you and secure the sandbag across the upper back. Lower mostly straight down until the front knee bends deeply, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front heel planted and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_plate_russian_twist.description: Sit with knees bent and heels lightly grounded while holding a weight plate at the chest. Lean back slightly and rotate the torso from side to side, bringing the plate toward each hip. Keep the spine long and avoid rushing through the low back.

ff_plate_feet_elevated_russian_twist.description: Sit with knees bent and feet lifted from the floor while holding a weight plate at the chest. Lean back slightly and rotate the torso from side to side, bringing the plate toward each hip. Keep the spine long and avoid rushing through the low back.

ff_bodyweight_feet_elevated_russian_twis.description: Sit with knees bent and feet lifted from the floor. Lean back slightly and rotate the torso from side to side, bringing the hands toward each hip. Keep the spine long and avoid rushing through the low back.

ff_bodyweight_russian_twist.description: Sit with knees bent and heels lightly grounded. Lean back slightly and rotate the torso from side to side, bringing the hands toward each hip. Keep the spine long and avoid rushing through the low back.

ff_landmine_russian_twist.description: Anchor a barbell in a landmine and kneel or stand holding the sleeve with both hands. Rotate the bar in an arc from one hip to the other while the hips stay mostly square. Move from the ribs and shoulders rather than yanking with the arms.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_hawaiian_squat.description: Stand on one leg, cross the opposite ankle above the standing knee, and reach the arms forward. Lower on one side, stand, then switch to the other leg each rep. Keep the standing knee aligned with the toes and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_bodyweight_hawaiian_squat.description: Stand on one leg, cross the opposite ankle above the standing knee, and reach the arms forward. Sit the hips back and lower on the standing leg as far as control allows, then drive through the foot to stand. Keep the standing knee aligned with the toes and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_suspension_hawaiian_squat.description: Hold the suspension handles lightly for balance. Stand on one leg and cross the opposite ankle above the standing knee. Sit the hips back and lower on the standing leg as far as control allows. Keep the standing knee aligned with the toes and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_bodyweight_hand_assisted_hawaiian_squ.description: Hold a rack or post lightly for balance and stand on one leg with the free knee bent behind you. Lower by sending the free knee toward the floor behind the stance leg, then press back up. Keep the stance knee over the toes and avoid twisting the pelvis.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_press.description: Lie on an incline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press both weights over the chest, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_incline_bench_p.description: Lie on an incline bench with one kettlebell at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press the weight over the shoulder line, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_incline.description: Lie on an incline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_seated_overhead.description: Sit tall with one kettlebell racked at shoulder height. Press the weight overhead on one side until the arm is vertical, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_knee_supported_.description: Place one hand and knee on a bench with a kettlebell hanging from the other hand. Row the bell toward the hip, pause, then lower until the arm is long. Keep the back flat and avoid twisting open as you pull.

ff_macebell_offset_thruster.description: Rack the macebell offset near one shoulder with both hands controlling the handle. Squat with the chest tall, then stand hard and continue into an overhead press. Keep the mace close to midline and avoid letting the offset head pull you sideways.

ff_single_arm_dummbell_overhead_foot_ele.description: Hold one dumbbell overhead opposite the bending leg and take a wide stance. Elevate the straight-leg foot on a low plate, sit into the other hip, then push back to center. Keep the arm stacked and avoid letting the working knee cave inward.

Hold one dumbbell overhead on the same side as the bending leg and take a wide stance. Elevate the straight-leg foot on a low plate, sit into the other hip, then push back to center. Keep the ribs down and avoid drifting the dumbbell forward.

ff_double_kettlebell_seated_overhead_pre.description: Sit tall with two kettlebells racked at shoulder height. Press both weights overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_cyclist_squa.description: Hold two dumbbells at the side like a suitcase. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_cyclist_.description: Hold one dumbbell at the side like a suitcase. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_seated_.description: Sit tall with two kettlebells racked at shoulder height. Press one weight overhead, lower it, then press the other side until the arm is vertical, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_double_kettlebell_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press both weights over the chest, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_cyclist_squ.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_plate_overhead_cyclist_squat.description: Hold a weight plate locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_cyclist_squat.description: Carry a Bulgarian bag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_cyclist_squat.description: Hold a sandbag in the front rack with elbows forward. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_cyclist_squat.description: Bear-hug a sandbag tight to the ribs. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_cyclist_squat.description: Shoulder a sandbag on one side and stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the ribs stacked and avoid leaning away from the bag.

ff_landmine_goblet_cyclist_squat.description: Hold the end of a landmine barbell close to the chest. Stand with heels elevated and feet close together. Squat by letting the knees travel forward, then drive through the midfoot to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid rocking onto the toes.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_shrug.description: Kneel tall with glutes braced and two dumbbells hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with one kettlebell at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press the weight over the shoulder line, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_pistol_squat.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_alternating_pistol_sq.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand up and switch legs on the next rep. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_bench_p.description: Lie on a flat bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_pistol_squat.description: Start tall without external load and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand up and switch legs on the next rep. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_barbell_zombie_pistol_squat.description: Balance a barbell on the front shoulders with arms straight forward and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_barbell_front_rack_pistol_squat.description: Hold a barbell in the front rack with elbows forward and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_barbell_back_rack_pistol_squat.description: Carry a barbell across the upper back or rear shoulders and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_barbell_zercher_pistol_squat.description: Cradle a barbell in the elbow creases with forearms close together and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_front_rack_squat.description: Hold one dumbbell squeezed between both palms in the front rack with elbows forward. Stand with feet about shoulder width and brace the trunk. Sit between the heels, then push the floor away to stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid folding the chest forward.

ff_double_kettlebell_decline_bench_press.description: Lie on a decline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press both weights over the chest, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_decline_bench_p.description: Lie on a decline bench with one kettlebell at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press the weight over the shoulder line, then lower with control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_squat.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Stand with feet about shoulder width and brace the trunk. Sit between the heels, then push the floor away to stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid folding the chest forward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_squat.description: Hold a sandbag in the front rack with elbows forward. Stand with feet about shoulder width and brace the trunk. Sit between the heels, then push the floor away to stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid folding the chest forward.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_squat.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Stand with feet about shoulder width and brace the trunk. Sit between the heels, then push the floor away to stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes and avoid folding the chest forward.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_alternating_cossack.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Take a wide stance with toes slightly turned out. Sit into one hip while the other leg stays long, then return through center and alternate sides. Keep the working heel down and the knee tracking over the toes.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_cossack_squat.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Take a wide stance with toes slightly turned out. Sit into one hip while the other leg stays long, then push through the bent leg to return to center. Keep the working heel down and the knee tracking over the toes.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_low_switch_cossack_.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Take a wide stance with toes slightly turned out. Sit into one hip while the other leg stays long, then stay low as you shift across to the other side. Keep the working heel down and the knee tracking over the toes.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_foot_elevated_cossa.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Take a wide stance with the straight-leg foot elevated on a low plate or box with toes slightly turned out. Sit into one hip while the other leg stays long, then push through the bent leg to return to center. Keep the working heel down and the knee tracking over the toes.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_curtsy_lunge.description: Carry a Bulgarian bag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return to the same stance. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_alternating_c.description: Carry a Bulgarian bag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_decline.description: Lie on a decline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_single_arm_suspension_ipsilateral_ska.description: Hold one suspension handle on the same side as the stance leg and stand on that leg. Reach the free leg back as the free knee moves toward the floor, then press through the stance foot to rise. Use the strap for balance only and keep the stance knee over the toes.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_walking_lunge.description: Carry the sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Step forward into a lunge, lower until both knees bend, then drive through the front foot into the next step. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the front knee collapse inward.

ff_resistance_band_pull_apart.description: Hold a resistance band at chest height with arms straight and hands shoulder width. Pull the band apart until it reaches the chest, then return slowly. Keep shoulders down and avoid arching the back.

ff_sandbag_bent_over_row.description: Hinge forward with the sandbag gripped at the handles or fabric. Row it toward the lower ribs, pause, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the back flat and avoid yanking the bag with the hips.

ff_double_dumbbell_bent_over_reverse_fly.description: Hinge forward with a dumbbell in each hand and palms facing in. Open the arms out to the sides until the shoulder blades squeeze, then lower slowly. Keep a soft elbow and avoid using a torso bounce.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_knee_supported_tr.description: Place one hand and knee on a bench with one dumbbell and the working elbow tucked near the ribs. Straighten the elbow to send the weight back, then bend it under control. Keep the upper arm still instead of swinging the whole shoulder.

ff_double_dumbbell_incline_bench_prone_t.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with two dumbbells and both elbows tucked near the ribs. Straighten the elbow to send the weight back, then bend it under control. Keep the upper arm still instead of swinging the whole shoulder.

ff_single_arm_cable_tricep_kickback.description: Set a low cable and stand in a staggered stance holding one handle. Hinge forward, pin the upper arm beside the ribs, and extend the elbow behind you. Return to a bent elbow without letting the shoulder swing.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_tricep_kickback.description: Hinge forward with a flat back with one dumbbell and the working elbow tucked near the ribs. Straighten the elbow to send the weight back, then bend it under control. Keep the upper arm still instead of swinging the whole shoulder.

ff_slider_dumbbell_goblet_lateral_lunge.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack with elbows forward. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

Hold one dumbbell in the front rack with elbows forward. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_c.description: Hold one dumbbell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_i.description: Hold one dumbbell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_dumbbell_low_hold_c.description: Hold one dumbbell at the side like a suitcase. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_double_dumbbell_low_hold_alternating_.description: Hold two dumbbells at the side like a suitcase. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then return to center and alternate sides. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_double_dumbbell_seated_shrug.description: Sit tall with two dumbbells hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_double_kettlebell_seated_shrug.description: Sit tall with two kettlebells hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_slider_clubbell_order_lateral_lunge.description: Rack the clubbell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_double_clubbell_order_lateral_.description: Rack both clubbells in the order position near the shoulders. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_single_arm_clubbell_order_cont.description: Rack the clubbell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_clubbell_order_ipsi.description: Rack the clubbell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_macebell_order_lateral_lunge.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_single_arm_macebell_order_cont.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsi.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_stability_ball_miniband_feet_elevated.description: Lie on your back with a miniband above the knees and both heels on a stability ball. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, pause, then lower without letting the ball roll away. Keep band tension and avoid arching the low back.

ff_stability_ball_frog_reverse_hyperexte.description: Lie face down over the stability ball with hips supported and knees bent in a frog shape. Lift the thighs behind you, pause, then lower slowly. Squeeze the glutes and avoid kicking into a low-back arch.

ff_stability_ball_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Stand in a split stance with the rear foot resting on a stability ball. Lower the back knee as the front leg bends, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the ball quiet and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_bulgarian_sp.description: Hold two dumbbells at the side like a suitcase. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive up into a small jump, land softly, and reset the same split stance. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_slider_suspension_reverse_lunge.description: Hold the suspension handles and place one foot on a slider. Slide that foot straight back into a reverse lunge, then pull it forward as the standing leg drives up. Keep light strap tension and avoid leaning back from the handles.

ff_slider_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_latera.description: Carry a Bulgarian bag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_sandbag_front_rack_lateral_lun.description: Hold a sandbag in the front rack with elbows forward. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_sandbag_back_rack_lateral_lung.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_miniband_ankle_monster_walk.description: Loop the miniband around the ankles and set a quarter-squat stance. Take small diagonal steps forward or sideways while keeping band tension. Keep knees over toes and avoid letting the feet snap together.

ff_slider_landmine_goblet_lateral_lunge.description: Hold the end of a landmine barbell close to the chest. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_landmine_low_hold_lateral_lung.description: Hold the landmine end low near the inside hip and place the moving foot on a slider. Slide that foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the bar pull your chest down.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_front_ra.description: Hold one kettlebell in the front rack with elbows forward. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

Hold one kettlebell in the front rack with elbows forward. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_.description: Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up in the front rack with the elbow close. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up in the front rack with the elbow close. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead.description: Hold one kettlebell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

Hold one kettlebell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_.description: Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up overhead with the wrist stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up overhead with the wrist stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_single_arm_kettlebell_low_hold.description: Hold one kettlebell at the side like a suitcase. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_slider_plate_overhead_lateral_lunge.description: Hold a weight plate locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Place the moving foot on a slider and stand tall. Slide or step one foot out to the side, sit the hips back over the bent leg, then push back to the start. Keep the other leg long and avoid letting the chest collapse.

ff_slider_plate_overhead_reverse_lunge.description: Hold a weight plate locked out overhead and place one foot on a slider. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull it forward to stand tall. Keep the plate stacked over the ribs and avoid arching the low back.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_incline_push_up.description: Set a barbell in a rack and grip it with palms facing you. Walk the feet back into a straight-body plank, lower the chest to the bar, then press away. Keep the body in one line and avoid reaching the head forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_shrug.description: Stand tall with one dumbbell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_shr.description: Kneel tall with glutes braced and one dumbbell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_seated_shrug.description: Sit tall with one dumbbell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_shrug.description: Stand tall with one kettlebell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_double_dumbbell_hang_snatch.description: Start from a hang with dumbbells near the thighs and hips hinged. Extend the hips hard and guide the weight close to the body until you finish with both dumbbells locked out overhead. Keep the path close and avoid curling the weight with the arms.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_hang_snatch.description: Start from a hang with dumbbells near the thighs and hips hinged. Extend the hips hard and guide the weight close to the body until you finish with the dumbbell locked out over one shoulder. Keep the path close and avoid curling the weight with the arms.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_hang_.description: Start from a hang with dumbbells near the thighs and hips hinged. Extend the hips hard and guide the weight close to the body until you switch hands or sides after each controlled rep. Keep the path close and avoid curling the weight with the arms.

ff_miniband_kneeling_side_plank_clamshel.description: Loop the miniband above the knees and set a kneeling side plank. Lift the hips, keep heels together, and open the top knee like a clamshell. Stay tall through the ribs and avoid rolling the chest toward the floor.

ff_miniband_thigh_side_plank_hip_abducti.description: Loop the miniband around the thighs and set a side plank with legs long. Lift the top leg slightly up and back, then lower without dropping the hips. Keep toes forward and avoid rolling the pelvis open.

ff_stability_ball_feet_elevated_russian_.description: Sit tall with feet elevated on the stability ball holding the wall ball or hands at the chest. Lean back slightly and rotate the ribs from side to side. Keep the motion smooth and avoid swinging through loose arms.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_single_leg_v_u.description: Lie on your back with arms overhead and legs long. Lift one leg as you reach the hands toward it, then lower and alternate sides. Keep the movement crisp and avoid throwing the head forward.

ff_battle_rope_alternating_lateral_lunge.description: Hold one battle-rope end in each hand and face the anchor with feet wide. Make continuous alternating waves while shifting into a lateral lunge, then drive back and switch sides. Keep the waves moving and avoid dropping the chest in the lunge.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_s.description: Kneel tall with glutes braced and one kettlebell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_seated_shrug.description: Sit tall with one kettlebell hanging at the side. Elevate the shoulder straight up, pause briefly, then lower slowly. Keep the elbow straight and avoid rolling the shoulder forward.

ff_plate_hip_thrust.description: Sit with the upper back against a bench and a weight plate across the hips. Plant the feet, drive the hips up, pause, then lower until the hips are near the floor. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back at the top.

ff_double_dumbbell_incline_bench_prone_s.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with two dumbbells hanging below the shoulders. Lift the shoulders toward the ears, pause, then lower until the neck relaxes. Keep the arms long and avoid turning it into a row.

ff_suspension_single_leg_foot_elevated_g.description: Lie on your back with one heel in the suspension strap and the other leg lifted. Drive through the strap heel to lift the hips, pause, then lower under control. Keep the pelvis level and avoid letting the strap swing.

ff_tire_single_leg_foot_elevated_glute_b.description: Lie on your back with one heel on the tire and the other leg lifted. Drive through the elevated heel to lift the hips, pause, then lower under control. Keep the pelvis level and avoid pushing through the toes.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_prone.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with two kettlebells hanging below the shoulders. Lift the shoulders toward the ears, pause, then lower until the neck relaxes. Keep the arms long and avoid turning it into a row.

ff_suspension_sissy_squat.description: Hold the suspension handles and stand tall with feet hip width. Let the knees travel forward as the torso leans back in one line, then pull lightly on the straps to stand. Keep hips extended and avoid folding into a regular squat.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_incline_bench_pro.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with one dumbbell hanging below the shoulders. Lift the shoulders toward the ears, pause, then lower until the neck relaxes. Keep the arms long and avoid turning it into a row.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_incline_bench_p.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with one kettlebell hanging below the shoulders. Lift the shoulders toward the ears, pause, then lower until the neck relaxes. Keep the arms long and avoid turning it into a row.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with two dumbbells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_bulgarian_bag_dead_squat_clean.description: Set the Bulgarian bag on the floor between the feet and grip the handles. Squat to the bag, drive through the legs, and pull it smoothly into the front rack. Keep the chest up and avoid rounding to reach the bag.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_incline_bench_.description: Lie on an incline bench with two dumbbells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_decline_bench_.description: Lie on a decline bench with two dumbbells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_bodyweight_hand_assisted_pistol_squat.description: Use a rack or post for light hand support and balance on one leg with the free leg reaching forward. Sit down into a pistol squat, keeping the working foot flat, then stand back up on the same leg. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and shorten the range before the heel lifts.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_alternatin.description: Hold two kettlebells at the side like a suitcase. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_alternat.description: Hold one dumbbell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_alternating_curtsy_lu.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_alternating_curt.description: Grip the kettlebell by the horns at chest height and stand tall. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, then return and alternate legs. Keep the bell close and avoid letting the front knee dive inward.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_alternating_curtsy_.description: Cup the kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest and stand tall. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, then return and alternate legs. Keep the chest lifted and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_clubbell_order_alternating_curtsy_lun.description: Rack the clubbell in an order position near one shoulder. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_double_clubbell_order_alternating_cur.description: Rack both clubbells in the order position near the shoulders. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_alternating.description: Rack one clubbell in the order position near the shoulder and stand tall. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, then return and alternate legs. Keep the club close and avoid letting the front knee dive inward.

ff_macebell_order_alternating_curtsy_lun.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_curtsy_lunge.description: Stand tall without external load and set the feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_alternating_cu.description: Bear-hug a sandbag tight to the ribs. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_alternating_cu.description: Shoulder a sandbag on one side and keep the torso tall. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_plate_overhead_alternating_curtsy_lun.description: Hold a weight plate locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_alternating_curtsy.description: Hold a sandbag in the front rack with elbows forward. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_alternating_curtsy_.description: Carry a sandbag across the upper back or rear shoulders. Stand tall with feet under the hips. Step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge, lower under control, then return and alternate legs. Keep the front knee over the toes and avoid rotating the hips open.

ff_plate_hollow_body_hold.description: Lie on your back holding a plate over the chest or behind the head. Lift shoulders and legs into a hollow shape and hold steady. Keep the low back pressed down and shorten the lever if the ribs flare.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_floor_press.description: Lie on the floor with knees bent and two dumbbells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one kettlebell up as the other lowers in a seesaw rhythm. Keep wrists stacked and avoid letting either elbow flare wide.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_incline_benc.description: Lie on an incline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one kettlebell up as the other lowers in a seesaw rhythm. Keep wrists stacked and avoid letting either elbow flare wide.

ff_double_kettlebell_tuck_l_sit.description: Place the kettlebells on the floor as handles and press down through straight arms. Lift the hips and tuck the knees in front of you for an L-sit hold. Push the shoulders down and avoid collapsing into the neck.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_decline_benc.description: Lie on a decline bench with two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one kettlebell up as the other lowers in a seesaw rhythm. Keep wrists stacked and avoid letting either elbow flare wide.

ff_bodyweight_hollow_body_flutter_kicks.description: Lie on your back with arms long and legs extended in a hollow hold. Lift the shoulders slightly and make small alternating flutter kicks. Keep the low back heavy on the floor instead of letting the ribs flare.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_floor_press.description: Lie on the floor with knees bent and two kettlebells at chest height and shoulder blades set. Press one side up while the other stays near the chest, then switch sides under control. Keep wrists stacked and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_overhead_press.description: Stand tall with two dumbbells at shoulder height. Press one dumbbell overhead while the other stays racked, then lower and switch sides. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning away from the pressing arm.

ff_double_dumbbell_arnold_press.description: Stand tall with dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you. Press while rotating the palms forward, then reverse the rotation as you lower. Keep the ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_arnold_pr.description: Stand tall with dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you. Press one dumbbell while rotating the palm forward, lower it, then switch sides. Keep the ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_double_dumbbell_seated_arnold_press.description: Sit tall with dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you. Press while rotating the palms forward, then reverse the rotation as you lower. Keep the ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_alternating_double_dumbbell_seated_ar.description: Sit tall with dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you. Press one dumbbell while rotating the palm forward, lower it, then switch sides. Keep the ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_bodyweight_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back, soles together, knees open, and feet elevated. Press the feet into the support to lift the hips, pause, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back.

ff_miniband_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back with a miniband above the knees, soles together, knees open, and feet elevated. Press the feet into the support to lift the hips, pause, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back.

ff_miniband_feet_elevated_glute_bridge.description: Lie on your back with a miniband above the knees and both heels elevated. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, pause, then lower without losing band tension. Keep the ribs down and avoid pushing through the toes.

ff_bodyweight_reverse_plank.description: Sit with legs long and hands behind the hips, fingers turned to a comfortable angle. Press the floor away and lift the hips until the body forms a straight line. Keep the chest open and avoid letting the hips sag.

ff_wall_ball_toss.description: Stand about two feet from a wall with the wall ball at the chest. Squat, drive up, and throw the ball to the target, then catch it into the next rep. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the ball pull you forward.

ff_wall_ball_feet_elevated_russian_twist.description: Sit with feet lifted, holding a wall ball at the chest while facing slightly away from a wall. Rotate the ribs to toss the ball laterally, catch it, and reset. Keep the feet steady and avoid throwing with only the arms.

ff_wall_ball_russian_twist_lateral_toss.description: Sit tall holding the wall ball or hands at the chest. Lean back slightly and rotate the ribs from side to side. Keep the motion smooth and avoid swinging through loose arms.

ff_wall_ball_lateral_toss.description: Hold the wall ball standing side-on to the wall with room to rotate. Turn the ribs and hips together to toss the ball laterally, catch the rebound, and reset. Keep the throw from the trunk instead of twisting only the arms.

ff_wall_ball_sit_up_toss.description: Lie facing a wall with knees bent and the wall ball at the chest. Sit up and toss the ball to the wall, catch it, then roll back under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid throwing with only the arms.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_bulgarian_.description: Hold two kettlebells at the side like a suitcase. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive up into a small jump, land softly, and reset the same split stance. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_arnold_.description: Kneel tall with glutes braced and dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you. Press while rotating the palms forward, then reverse the rotation as you lower. Keep the ribs down and avoid turning the press into a backbend.

ff_barbell_zercher_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Cradle a barbell in the elbow creases with forearms close together. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up overhead with the wrist stacked. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_bulgarian_split_squ.description: Hold one kettlebell by the horns at the chest. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_landmine_goblet_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Hold the end of a landmine barbell close to the chest. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_macebell_order_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Rack the macebell in an order position near one shoulder. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and keep the load on the same side as the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_clubbell_order_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Rack the clubbell in an order position near one shoulder. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_plate_overhead_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Hold a weight plate locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Step the front foot forward and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_tire_bulgarian_split_squat.description: Stand in front of a tire and place the rear foot on top of it. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep hips square and avoid letting the front heel lift.

ff_tire_bulgarian_split_squat_jump.description: Stand in front of a tire and place the rear foot on top of it. Lower the back knee toward the floor, then drive up into a small jump and land softly. Keep hips square and reset the same split stance before the next rep.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_knee_over_.description: Hold two dumbbells in the front rack with elbows forward. Set a split stance and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_foot_eleva.description: Hold two dumbbells in the front rack with elbows forward. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_knee_over_to.description: Hold two dumbbells locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Set a split stance and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_foot_elevate.description: Hold two dumbbells locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_foot_elevate.description: Hold two dumbbells at the side like a suitcase. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and move slowly instead of bouncing.

Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Keep the heel rooted and keep the load opposite the working leg without twisting the torso.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_foot_ele.description: Hold one dumbbell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Hold one dumbbell locked out overhead with ribs stacked. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_foot_e.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack with elbows forward. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low wedge or plate and keep the back heel lifted. Let the front knee travel forward over the toes as you lower, then press through the front foot to rise. Hold one dumbbell in the front rack on the same side as the working front leg. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_barbell_zercher_knee_over_toe_split_s.description: Cradle the barbell in the bends of the elbows with fists close and ribs braced. Set a split stance with most weight through the front foot and the back heel lifted. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_barbell_zercher_foot_elevated_knee_ov.description: Cradle the barbell in the bends of the elbows with fists close and ribs braced. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_barbell_back_rack_foot_elevated_knee_.description: Set the barbell across the upper back and pull the elbows slightly down to brace the trunk. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_barbell_front_rack_foot_elevated_knee.description: Set the barbell in the front rack with elbows lifted and the bar resting across the shoulders. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_barbell_overhead_foot_elevated_knee_o.description: Press the barbell overhead with hands wide enough to keep the wrists stacked over the shoulders. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_single_arm_barbell_overhead_foot_elev.description: Grip the center of a light barbell in one hand over the shoulder and lock it overhead before you move. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_knee_over_toe.description: Set the Bulgarian bag across the upper back and hold the handles so it cannot roll. Set a split stance with most weight through the front foot and the back heel lifted. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_foot_ele.description: Clean two kettlebells to the front rack with elbows close to the ribs. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_foot.description: Hold one kettlebell in the front rack opposite the working front leg with the wrist straight. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_ipsi.description: Hold one kettlebell in the front rack on the same side as the working front leg with the wrist straight. Set a split stance with most weight through the front foot and the back heel lifted. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_foot.description: Hold one kettlebell in the front rack on the same side as the working front leg with the wrist straight. Set a split stance with the front foot on a low plate or wedge, keeping most weight through that foot. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Clean two kettlebells bottoms-up into the front rack with handles squeezed firmly. Set a split stance with most weight through the front foot and the back heel lifted. Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

Bend the front knee forward over the toes as you lower, then drive through the whole front foot to stand. Keep the heel planted and knee tracking with the toes instead of bouncing into the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_foot_e.description: Lock one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the working front leg and keep the wrist stacked. ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Lock one kettlebell overhead bottoms-up on the same side as the working front leg and squeeze the handle.
