ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_russian_step.description: Hold two dumbbells at the sides and use a Russian step-up rhythm onto the box or tire. Drive the top knee through as you stand, then return with control. Keep the dumbbells quiet and avoid hopping off the bottom foot.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_alternatin.description: Rack two dumbbells at the shoulders and alternate Russian step-ups. Step firmly onto the platform, drive tall, then switch sides under control. Keep elbows high and avoid letting the rack pull you forward.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_russian_.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack and perform Russian step-ups on the platform. Drive through the planted foot and bring the opposite knee through at the top. Keep the bells tight to the body and avoid bouncing off the lower leg.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_russian_st.description: Hold a kettlebell in each hand at the sides and face the Russian step-up platform. Step up powerfully but land quietly, then lower with control. Keep shoulders level and avoid swinging the bells to create momentum.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_contra.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style opposite the stepping leg. Drive onto the platform and bring the free knee through before stepping down. Keep the torso upright and avoid leaning away from the kettlebell.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_ipsila.description: Hold one kettlebell at the side of the stepping leg. Step onto the platform, stand tall with a controlled knee drive, then lower. Keep the loaded shoulder down and avoid letting the bell swing forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_cont.description: Rack the kettlebell opposite the stepping leg and face the platform. Step up with control, drive the trailing knee through, and step down softly. Keep the elbow close to the ribs and avoid rotating toward the bell.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_ipsi.description: Hold the kettlebell in the front rack on the same side as the stepping leg. Drive through the platform foot and bring the opposite knee through at the top. Keep the rack stable and avoid collapsing the stance knee inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_russian_st.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead and set one foot fully on the platform. Drive up into the Russian step-up, then step down with the arms still stacked. Keep ribs tucked and avoid letting the bells drift forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_contra.description: Hold one kettlebell overhead opposite the stepping leg. Step onto the platform, stand tall, and control the descent without losing the lockout. Keep the shoulder stacked and avoid leaning away from the load.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_ipsila.description: Lock the kettlebell overhead on the same side as the stepping leg. Drive through the top foot into the Russian step-up and lower with control. Keep the arm vertical and avoid flaring the ribs as you rise.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Hold two kettlebells bottoms-up in the front rack and face the platform. Step up in the Russian step-up pattern while keeping both bells vertical. Move slowly and avoid letting the bells tip during the knee drive.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one bottoms-up kettlebell opposite the stepping leg. Step up, drive the free knee through, and lower while keeping the bell balanced. Keep the wrist stacked and avoid rotating the torso toward the load.

Hold one bottoms-up kettlebell in the rack on the same side as the stepping leg. Perform the Russian step-up with a quiet knee drive and controlled step down. Keep the bell vertical and avoid gripping so hard that the shoulder shrugs.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Press two kettlebells bottoms-up overhead and set one foot on a low platform. Step up in the Russian pattern while keeping both wrists vertical, then step down carefully. Keep the ribs down and avoid using a platform height that makes the bells wobble.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up opposite the stepping leg, bell above the handle. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Use a box height that keeps the whole foot flat on top.

Hold one kettlebell bottoms-up on the stepping-leg side, bell above the handle. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the front knee tracking over the mid-foot on the step.

ff_barbell_back_rack_russian_step_up.description: Set the barbell across the upper back as in a back squat. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_barbell_front_rack_russian_step_up.description: Rack the barbell at the shoulders with elbows high. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_alternating_.description: Press two dumbbells overhead with wrists stacked. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_contrala.description: Press one dumbbell overhead opposite the stepping leg. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the front knee tracking over the mid-foot on the step.

ff_barbell_overhead_alternating_russian_.description: Lock the barbell overhead with arms stacked before alternating steps. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_barbell_overhead_russian_step_up.description: Lock the barbell overhead with arms stacked over the shoulders. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Control the step-down; avoid dropping from the box.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_contrala.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side opposite the stepping leg. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_ipsilate.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side on the stepping-leg side. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Stay square to the box without rotating the pelvis.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_ipsilate.description: Press one dumbbell overhead on the stepping-leg side. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Control the step-down; avoid dropping from the box.

ff_double_clubbell_order_russian_step_up.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at each shoulder. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_double_clubbell_order_alternating_rus.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at each shoulder. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Stay square to the box without rotating the pelvis.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_contralater.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position opposite the stepping leg. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position on the stepping-leg side. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Use a box height that keeps the whole foot flat on top.

ff_bodyweight_alternating_russian_step_u.description: Stand tall with hands on the hips or at your sides. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_bodyweight_russian_step_up.description: Stand tall with hands on the hips or at your sides. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_clubbell_order_russian_step_up.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at one shoulder. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_clubbell_order_alternating_russian_st.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position at one shoulder. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Stay square to the box without rotating the pelvis.

ff_barbell_back_rack_alternating_russian.description: Set the barbell across the upper back as in a back squat. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_barbell_front_rack_alternating_russia.description: Rack the barbell at the shoulders with elbows high. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_alternating_.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_russian_st.description: Rack two dumbbells at the shoulders with elbows high. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the front knee tracking over the mid-foot on the step.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_russian_step.description: Press two dumbbells overhead. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_contra.description: Rack one dumbbell at the shoulder opposite the stepping leg. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_ipsila.description: Rack one dumbbell at the shoulder on the stepping-leg side. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Hold the mace in the order grip opposite the stepping leg. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold the mace in the order grip on the stepping-leg side. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the ribs stacked over the pelvis on the drive up.

ff_macebell_order_russian_step_up.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Stay square to the box without rotating the pelvis.

ff_macebell_order_alternating_russian_st.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_barbell_zercher_russian_step_up.description: Cradle the barbell in the Zercher position at the chest. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_barbell_zercher_alternating_russian_s.description: Cradle the barbell in the Zercher position at the chest. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_russian_step_.description: Settle the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_alternating_r.description: Settle the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_russian_step_up.description: Load the sandbag across the upper back. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_alternating_russian.description: Load the sandbag across the upper back. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_russian_step_up.description: Front-rack the sandbag at the chest with elbows high. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Stay square to the box without rotating the pelvis.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_alternating_russia.description: Front-rack the sandbag at the chest with elbows high. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_plate_overhead_russian_step_up.description: Press a weight plate overhead with arms stacked. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the front knee tracking over the mid-foot on the step.

ff_plate_overhead_alternating_russian_st.description: Press a weight plate overhead with arms stacked. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Control the step-down; avoid dropping from the box.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_alternat.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Hold two kettlebells bottoms-up in the front rack. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_alternatin.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Keep the ribs stacked over the pelvis on the drive up.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Press two kettlebells bottoms-up overhead with wrists vertical. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_alternatin.description: Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Do not lean back to finish the knee drive.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_russian_step_up.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Lift the free knee in front of the hip, not flared wide.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_alternating_russian.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_russian_step_up.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Use a box height that keeps the whole foot flat on top.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_alternating_russian_s.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Control the step-down; avoid dropping from the box.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_russian_step_up.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Keep the ribs stacked over the pelvis on the drive up.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_alternating_russ.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Keep the working heel flat on the box through the whole rep.

ff_miniband_hip_thrust.description: Loop a miniband just above the knees and lie on your back with feet flat. Drive through the heels to lift the hips until the body forms a straight line from shoulders to knees. Squeeze the glutes at the top without flaring the ribs.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_step_up.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height facing a sturdy box. Place your whole foot on the box, stand tall, and bring the trail foot up to meet it or control the step-down. Keep the sandbag tight to the torso.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_alternating_st.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag and alternate which leg leads onto the box each rep. Plant the full foot, stand tall, and step down softly without pushing off the floor leg.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_russian_step_u.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height. Face a sturdy box, plant your whole foot on top, stand tall while driving the free knee up, then lower under control. Drive through the box foot only; do not spring off the trail leg.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_alternating_ru.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height. Face a sturdy box and alternate lead legs: plant the whole foot, stand tall, drive the free knee up, then step down under control. Pause briefly on the box before the knee drive when learning.

ff_alternating_single_arm_macebell_rever.description: Grip the mace near the head with one hand and guide a reverse mill arc around the body. Switch hand timing at the top of the arc so the mace stays on plane. Keep the ribs braced and reduce length if the bell pulls you off balance.

ff_ring_grip_straddle_planche.description: On rings, lean the shoulders forward past the hands with elbows locked and legs straddled wide. Press the rings down and away while protracting the shoulder blades. Hold only as long as you can keep a hollow trunk without bending the elbows.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_o.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge, clean the bell to the rack with a hip snap, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Lower to the rack, then the floor under control.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_p.description: Hinge to the kettlebell between the feet and dead-clean it to the rack. Dip the knees slightly, drive the legs, and punch the bell overhead in a push press. Bring the bell back to the rack, then the floor.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_clean_to_front_.description: Clean one kettlebell to the front rack on the stepping-leg side. Step the same leg back into a reverse lunge, touch the back knee toward the floor, and drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the rack elbow high.
Clean one kettlebell to the front rack on the stepping-leg side. Step that leg forward into a lunge, lower under control, and push back to standing. Do not let the bell pull the torso forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_p.description: Dead-clean the kettlebell to the rack, dip, and drive the bell overhead, catching with a soft knee bend. Stand to finish with the arm stacked. Lower to rack, then floor.

ff_double_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_push_.description: Hinge to two kettlebells, clean both to the rack, dip, and drive into a double push jerk overhead. Catch with elbows locked and feet split or square as trained. Return bells to the rack, then floor.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_dead.description: Grip one kettlebell bottoms-up with the bell above the handle. Hinge, pull the bell to the rack with a crisp hip snap, and pause to stabilize the vertical bell. Lower under control.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_bot.description: Alternate sides: hinge, bottoms-up clean to the rack, stand tall, then lower and switch hands. Keep the wrist vertical on every catch.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_f.description: Dead-clean the kettlebell to the rack, then sit into a front-rack squat with elbows high. Drive through the whole foot to stand and keep the bell tight to the body.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_dead_clean_to_t.description: Dead-clean to the rack, squat to depth, then drive up and press the bell overhead in one continuous thruster. Finish with the arm stacked over the shoulder.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_dea.description: Alternate arms each rep: dead-clean, squat, and thruster overhead, then lower and switch. Keep the bell path vertical through the squat and press.
Alternate sides: hinge, clean to rack, strict-press overhead, lower to floor, and switch hands. Avoid pressing before the hips fully extend.
Alternate arms: dead-clean, dip, push press overhead, then lower and switch. Keep the dip vertical and the bell close on the clean.
Alternate sides with a dead clean, dip, jerk overhead, and controlled lower. Catch with a stable lockout before returning to the floor.
Alternate arms: dead-clean to rack, front squat, stand, lower to floor, and switch. Keep the elbow connected to the ribcage in the squat.

ff_single_arm_macebell_bull_whip_to_mill.description: Start with the mace in a bull-whip arc, then transition into a 10-to-2 mill with one hand near the head. Keep the arc smooth and the core braced so the lever does not yank the shoulders.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Press two kettlebells bottoms-up overhead. Step into a split stance with the rear foot elevated or on the floor and lower until the front thigh is near parallel. Drive through the front foot to stand.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_kang_squat.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag, squat to depth, then lower the knees to the floor in a controlled kang squat before reversing to stand. Move slowly and keep the bag glued to the chest.

ff_double_dumbbell_feet_elevated_renegad.description: Set up in a high plank with hands on dumbbells and feet elevated on a bench. Row one bell toward the hip while keeping hips square, lower, and alternate. Do not let the body rotate toward the pulling side.
Feet elevated on a bench, row one dumbbell, place it down, perform a push-up on the bells, then row the other side. Keep a straight line from head to heels through the push-up.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_forward_lung.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_barbell_front_rack_forward_lunge.description: Rack the barbell at the shoulders with elbows high. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Avoid pushing off the back toes to stand up.

ff_barbell_overhead_forward_lunge.description: Lock the barbell overhead with ribs down. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_forward_lunge.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_contralateral_.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the side opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_barbell_back_rack_forward_lunge.description: Set the barbell across the upper back. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_forward_lu.description: Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_forward_.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_forward_lu.description: Rack two dumbbells at the shoulders. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_forward_lung.description: Press two dumbbells overhead. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_contrala.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_contra.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_contrala.description: Press one dumbbell overhead opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_forward_lu.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_forward_lunge.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_clubbell_order_forward_lunge.description: Hold the clubbell in the order position at one shoulder. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_double_clubbell_order_forward_lunge.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at each shoulder. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_contralater.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_macebell_order_forward_lunge.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the mace arc smooth and the ribs braced throughout.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_contra.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_bodyweight_forward_lunge.description: Stand tall with hands on hips or crossed at the chest. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_forward_lunge.description: Settle the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_forward_lunge.description: Front-rack the sandbag at the chest. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_plate_overhead_forward_lunge.description: Press a weight plate overhead. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_cont.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_contra.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_forward_lunge.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_forward_lunge.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_barbell_zercher_forward_lunge.description: Cradle the barbell in the Zercher position at the chest. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_ipsilate.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_ipsila.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_ipsilate.description: Press one dumbbell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_ipsila.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_ipsi.description: Rack one kettlebell on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_ipsila.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Avoid pushing off the back toes to stand up.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_plank.description: In a high plank with one dumbbell outside the hand, reach under the body with the opposite hand, drag the bell through,. and re-set the plank before switching sides. Keep the hips quiet.

ff_alternating_single_arm_dumbbell_feet_.description: Feet on a bench in plank, pull a dumbbell under the torso with one arm while keeping hips level, then switch. Do not pike the hips up as the bell passes under.

ff_landmine_cyclist_thruster.description: Anchor a barbell in a landmine and hold the free end at the shoulder. Squat with the end at the shoulder, then drive up and press the bar overhead in one thruster line. Keep the arc close to the midline.

ff_single_arm_landmine_cyclist_thruster.description: Hold the landmine bar at one shoulder, squat, and thruster overhead on that side. Brace the core so the bar does not pull you into rotation.

ff_clubbell_swing.description: Hinge with a flat back and swing the clubbell between the legs,. then snap the hips to bring it to chest height with straight arms at the top. Keep the lats engaged so the bell floats, not yanks, at the top.

ff_macebell_half_battle_lunge.description: Hold the mace with both hands near the head and pass it in a half-battle arc while stepping into a lunge. Stay tall in the lunge and let the hips steer the arc, not the low back.

ff_clubbell_order_pivot_split_squat.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at the shoulder and lower into a split squat while pivoting on the ball of the back foot. Keep the front knee over the toes and the tool close to the body.

ff_macebell_order_pivot_split_squat.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder, drop into a split squat, and pivot slightly on the back foot as trained. Brace the core against the long lever.

ff_bodyweight_plate_assisted_hip_airplan.description: Hold a light plate for balance, hinge on one leg, and open the hips into an airplane with the free leg reaching back. Rotate the pelvis over the standing leg, then return to neutral.

ff_macebell_battle_lunge.description: With the mace in a battle-ready grip, step into lunges while passing the head in a controlled arc beside the body. Keep steps short enough to stay balanced.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tactical_half_s.description: Start from the tactical position with the kettlebell between the feet. Hinge, pull, and punch into a half snatch to overhead with a vertical path. Lower to the rack or swing as programmed.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_ipsilateral_fo.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the same side as the front foot. Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Avoid pushing off the back toes to stand up.

ff_barbell_tall_kneeling_cuban_rotation.description: Kneel tall with the barbell at the thighs using a wide grip. Externally rotate to bring the bar toward the forehead, then rotate back without arching the low back. Use a light load and pain-free range.

ff_barbell_cuban_rotation.description: Stand with the barbell at the thighs, elbows bent near 90°. Rotate the forearms up and back in a Cuban rotation, then return with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging.

ff_alternating_single_arm_landmine_tall_.description: Kneel tall facing a landmine bar held at one shoulder. Press the end overhead, lower, and alternate sides without leaning back.

ff_barbell_feet_elevated_glute_bridge.description: Rest the upper back on a bench and place the feet elevated on a second bench or box. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeeze the glutes, and lower without dropping the pelvis suddenly.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tactical_snatch.description: From the tactical start, snatch the kettlebell overhead, then sit into an overhead squat with the arm stacked. Stand tall and lower under control.

ff_bodyweight_push_up_to_alternating_lat.description: Perform a push-up, then hop the feet laterally past the hands into a kick-through on each side, alternating. Keep the shoulders over the hands and the hips from sagging on the push-up.

ff_double_dumbbell_single_leg_romanian_d.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and hinge on one leg, reaching the free leg back as the bells skim the standing leg. Stand by driving the hip forward and squaring the pelvis.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_contralateral_sin.description: Hold one dumbbell in the hand opposite the standing leg. Hinge on one leg until hamstrings load, keeping the bell close to the standing shin. Drive the hip forward to stand.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_single_leg_romani.description: Crush-grip one dumbbell at the chest and hinge on one leg with a long spine. Lower until you feel hamstring tension, then stand without rotating the hips.

ff_alternating_double_clubbell_pullover.description: Lie on a bench and arc one clubbell back behind the head with soft elbows, then return over the chest and alternate sides. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the back off the bench.

ff_barbell_tall_kneeling_bicep_curl.description: Kneel tall with the barbell at thigh height using an underhand grip. Curl toward the shoulders without rocking the hips forward, then lower with control.

ff_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_overhead_trice.description: Kneel tall holding one dumbbell overhead with both hands. Bend the elbows to lower the bell behind the head, then extend without flaring the ribs. Keep the upper arms close to the ears.

ff_clubbell_inside_circle_to_shield_cast.description: Circle the clubbell inside around the body, then cast to shield position with a smooth hand change at the top. Keep the arc close and the core braced.

ff_alternating_single_arm_clubbell_insid.description: Alternate arms through an inside circle into a shield cast, switching hands as the club passes the midline. Reduce speed if the bell drifts away from the body.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_sna.description: Snatch one kettlebell overhead, sit into an overhead squat, stand, lower, and alternate arms. Keep the bell stacked over the mid-foot in the squat.

ff_cable_prone_bench_single_leg_hamstrin.description: Lie prone on a bench with ankles in a low cable strap. Curl one heel toward the glute while keeping the hips on the pad, then lower with control and alternate legs.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_cuban_r.description: Kneel tall with a dumbbell in each hand, elbows bent near 90°. Externally rotate the bells without shrugging or arching the back, then return.

ff_macebell_single_leg_standing_bent_kne.description: Stand on one leg with a soft knee bend and swing the mace in a 360 around the body, passing behind the back with controlled grip changes. Stay tall on the stance leg.

ff_single_arm_macebell_single_leg_standi.description: Stand on one leg and swing the mace 360 on the same side as the stance leg with a bent knee for balance. Keep the arc smooth and reduce speed if balance fails.

ff_alternating_single_arm_macebell_360_t.description: Alternate mace 360s into a ballistic curl at the end of the arc, keeping elbows fixed during the curl phase. Brace the core so the mace does not pull you off line.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_reverse_lung.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_barbell_front_rack_reverse_lunge.description: Rack the barbell at the shoulders with elbows high. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_barbell_overhead_reverse_lunge.description: Lock the barbell overhead with ribs down. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_reverse_lunge.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_contralateral_.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the side opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_barbell_back_rack_reverse_lunge.description: Set the barbell across the upper back. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_reverse_lu.description: Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_reverse_.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Avoid pushing off the back toes to stand up.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_reverse_lu.description: Rack two dumbbells at the shoulders. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_reverse_lung.description: Press two dumbbells overhead. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_contrala.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_contra.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_contrala.description: Press one dumbbell overhead opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_reverse_lu.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_reverse_lunge.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Avoid pushing off the back toes to stand up.

ff_clubbell_order_reverse_lunge.description: Hold the clubbell in the order position at one shoulder. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_double_clubbell_order_reverse_lunge.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at each shoulder. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_contralater.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_macebell_order_reverse_lunge.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the mace arc smooth and the ribs braced throughout.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_contra.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_bodyweight_reverse_lunge.description: Stand tall with hands on hips or crossed at the chest. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_reverse_lunge.description: Settle the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_reverse_lunge.description: Front-rack the sandbag at the chest. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_plate_overhead_reverse_lunge.description: Press a weight plate overhead. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_cont.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_contra.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_reverse_lunge.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_reverse_lunge.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Shorten the step if the front heel lifts in the bottom.

ff_barbell_zercher_reverse_lunge.description: Cradle the barbell in the Zercher position at the chest. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot, not caving inward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_ipsilate.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_ipsila.description: Hold one dumbbell in the front rack on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Stay tall through the chest on every rep.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_ipsilate.description: Press one dumbbell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Touch the back knee toward the floor without slamming.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the clubbell path close to the body without colliding at transitions.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_ipsila.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_ipsi.description: Rack one kettlebell on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Keep the hips level when loading one side only.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_ipsila.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Push through the front foot to return; do not rock back.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_ipsilateral_re.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the same side as the front foot. Step back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the chest tall and the front shin vertical. Brace the core so the torso does not pitch forward.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_walking_lun.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder and take continuous forward walking lunges. Keep steps short enough that the front knee stays over the mid-foot.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_alternating.description: Hold the mace in the order grip and alternate lateral lunges,. sitting into the hip of the stepping leg while keeping the lever at the shoulder.
With the mace in the order grip at the shoulder, alternate forward lunges while keeping the tool close to the ribs. Control the back knee toward the floor.
Hold the mace order at the shoulder and alternate reverse lunges with a quiet back-knee touch. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso.
Hold the mace in the order grip and alternate curtsy lunges, crossing the back leg behind and sitting into the front hip. Keep the front knee tracking over the foot.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the side opposite the working leg. Step the rear foot diagonally behind the front leg into a curtsy lunge, sit into the front hip, then drive through the front foot to stand. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the same side as the working leg. Step the rear foot diagonally behind the front leg into a curtsy lunge, sit into the front hip, then drive through the front foot to stand. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the side opposite the working leg. Step the working leg forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to return to standing. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the same side as the working leg. Step the working leg forward into a lunge until both knees bend, then push through the front foot to return to standing. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the side opposite the working leg. Step the working leg back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the same side as the working leg. Step the working leg back into a reverse lunge until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_cable_incline_bench_preach.description: Set an incline bench beside a low cable and brace the upper arm on the pad with the elbow aligned to the pulley. Curl the handle toward the shoulder without lifting the elbow off the pad, then lower slowly. Keep the wrist neutral throughout.

ff_double_kettlebell_seesaw_bent_over_ro.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, holding a kettlebell in each hand. Row one bell toward the hip while the other arm extends, then alternate in a seesaw rhythm. Keep the torso angle steady and the core braced.

ff_double_dumbbell_seesaw_bent_over_row.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and a dumbbell in each hand. Pull one elbow back toward the hip while the opposite arm reaches toward the floor, alternating each rep. Do not rotate the torso toward the rowing side.

ff_barbell_spider_curl.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench and curl a barbell with arms hanging straight toward the floor. Curl toward the shoulders keeping the upper arms vertical, then lower with control. Avoid swinging the bar with momentum.

ff_slider_kettlebell_horn_grip_reverse_l.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at the chest. Place a slider under the back foot on a smooth floor. Slide the rear foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull the front leg back to stand. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot.

ff_superband_good_morning.description: Stand on a heavy band with it looped across the upper back like a barbell. Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend until hamstrings load, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the spine long and the band tension even on both sides.

ff_trap_bar_feet_elevated_calf_raise.description: Stand inside a trap bar with the balls of the feet on a wedge or plate. Rise onto the toes as high as possible, pause briefly, then lower the heels below the platform for a stretch. Keep the knees soft and hips still.

ff_superband_prone_single_leg_hamstring_.description: Anchor a band low and lie face-down with one ankle looped in the band. Curl the heel toward the glute while keeping the hips pressed to the floor, then lower with control and switch legs. Do not lift the hips to finish the curl.

ff_superband_prone_bench_single_leg_hams.description: Lie prone on a bench with hips at the edge and a band anchored low to one ankle. Curl the heel toward the glute without lifting the hips off the pad, lower slowly, and alternate legs. Keep the movement isolated to the knee.

ff_barbell_seated_cuban_rotation.description: Sit tall holding a barbell at the thighs with a wide grip and elbows bent near 90°. Externally rotate the forearms to bring the bar toward the forehead, then rotate back with control. Use a light load and avoid shrugging.

ff_cable_rope_pullover.description: Face away from a high cable with a rope attachment held overhead. Keep a soft elbow bend and pull the rope down in an arc toward the thighs by driving the lats, then return overhead with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back.

ff_kettlebell_close_grip_push_up.description: Grip the horns of one kettlebell on the floor with hands inside shoulder width in a push-up plank. Lower the chest toward the bell keeping elbows tucked, then press back to straight arms. Keep a straight line from head to heels.

ff_kettlebell_kneeling_close_grip_push_u.description: Kneel with hands gripping the kettlebell horns in a close-grip push-up. Lower the chest toward the bell with elbows tucked, then press up without sagging the hips. Keep the glutes and core braced throughout.

ff_kettlebell_feet_elevated_close_grip_p.description: Place the feet on a bench and hands on a kettlebell in a close-grip push-up. Lower under control with elbows tucked toward the ribs, then press back to full extension. Do not let the hips pike up or sag.

ff_barbell_close_grip_incline_push_up.description: Set a barbell in a rack at incline height and grip it with hands inside shoulder width. Lower the chest toward the bar with elbows tucked, then press back to straight arms. Keep the body rigid like a standard push-up.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_march.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest and march in place or forward, lifting each knee to hip height. Stay tall through the crown of the head and avoid leaning back. Keep the bell tight to the sternum.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_march.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest and march with controlled knee lifts. Brace the core so the bell does not pull the torso forward. Keep the feet landing softly under the hips.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_overhead_march.description: Crush-grip one dumbbell overhead with both hands and march with high controlled steps. Keep the biceps near the ears and ribs down as each knee drives up. Reduce weight if the low back arches.

ff_cable_pallof_press.description: Stand sideways to a cable set at chest height with both hands on the handle at the sternum. Press the handle straight out until arms are extended, pause, then return without rotating the torso toward the cable. Stagger the feet for balance.

ff_single_ring_pallof_press.description: Stand sideways to a single ring anchor at chest height with both hands on the ring at the sternum. Press the ring out until arms are straight, resisting rotation back toward the anchor. Keep the hips and shoulders square.

ff_kettlebell_low_hold_foot_elevated_cos.description: Hold one kettlebell in a low hang at thigh height with the working foot on a low wedge. Shift into a Cossack squat on that side, keeping the heel down and the opposite leg long. Drive through the whole foot to return to center.

ff_barbell_seated_overhead_tricep_extens.description: Sit on a bench holding a barbell overhead with a narrow grip and upper arms close to the ears. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend without flaring the ribs. Keep the wrists stacked over the elbows.

ff_barbell_standing_overhead_tricep_exte.description: Stand tall holding a barbell overhead with a narrow grip and biceps near the ears. Lower the bar behind the head by bending the elbows, then extend to lockout. Squeeze the glutes to keep the ribs from flaring.

ff_barbell_tall_kneeling_overhead_tricep.description: Kneel tall holding a barbell overhead with a narrow grip. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend without leaning back. Keep the thighs vertical and the core braced.

ff_miniband_thigh_kneeling_side_plank_hi.description: Loop a miniband above the knees and set up in a side plank on the forearm with knees bent. Lift the top knee against band tension while keeping the hips stacked, then lower with control. Do not roll the pelvis backward.

ff_bodyweight_crunch.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat, hands lightly behind the head. Curl the shoulder blades off the floor by contracting the abs, then lower without pulling on the neck. Exhale on the way up.

ff_bodyweight_reverse_crunch.description: Lie on your back with knees bent toward the chest and hands by your sides or under the hips. Lift the hips off the floor by curling the pelvis toward the ribs, then lower with control. Avoid swinging the legs with momentum.

ff_bodyweight_dips.description: Support yourself on parallel bars with arms straight and shoulders down. Lower by bending the elbows until upper arms are near parallel to the floor, then press back up. Keep a slight forward lean and avoid shrugging at the bottom.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_incline_bench_pow.description: Lie on an incline bench holding a light dumbbell in one hand at thigh height, thumb down. Raise the arm in a wide arc to shoulder height with the thumb still pointing down, then lower. Keep the chest on the bench and use a very light weight.

ff_cable_rope_half_kneeling_rotation.description: Half-kneel sideways to a cable with a rope at chest height, both hands on the rope. Rotate the torso away from the anchor through the thoracic spine, then return under control. Keep the front knee stacked over the ankle.

ff_cable_rope_isometric_split_squat_rota.description: Hold a split squat with the rear foot back and a cable rope at chest height in both hands. Rotate the torso away from the anchor while holding the split squat still, then return. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_cuban_p.description: Kneel tall with a dumbbell in each hand, elbows bent near 90° at shoulder height. Externally rotate, press overhead, reverse the press, and rotate back in one smooth Cuban press. Keep the ribs down throughout.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_good_morning.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height with feet hip-width. Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend until hamstrings load, then drive the hips forward to stand. Keep the bag glued to the torso and the spine long.

ff_heavy_sandbag_clean_to_overhead_press.description: Straddle a heavy sandbag, hinge to grip it, and clean it to bear-hug or shoulder height. Press or push the bag overhead to lockout, then lower under control. Keep the core braced against the shifting load.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_bulgarian_split_.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Place the rear foot on a bench behind you and lower into a Bulgarian split squat until the front thigh is near parallel. Drive through the front whole foot to stand without the rear foot pushing off the bench.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_split_squat.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height with the rear foot on the floor behind you in a long split stance. Lower straight down until the back knee hovers above the floor, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso upright and the bell at the sternum.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_knee_over_toe_sp.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height with the rear foot back in a split stance on the floor. Lower until the front knee tracks forward over the toes and the front thigh is near parallel, then stand. Do not let the front heel pop up early.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_foot_elevated_kn.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at the chest with the front foot on a wedge and the rear foot on the floor behind you. Lower into a split squat letting the front knee travel forward over the toes, then drive up through the whole front foot. Keep the heel heavy on the wedge.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_cossack_squat.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest and stand in a wide stance. Shift to one side into a Cossack squat with the working heel down and the opposite leg straight, then return through center. Keep the chest tall.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_alternating_coss.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. From a wide stance, shift side to side into a Cossack squat while holding the bell in a horn grip at the chest. Keep the working heel down.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_foot_elevated_co.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Stand in a wide stance with the working foot on a low elevation and shift to one side, bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel down.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_low_switch_cossa.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Stand in a wide stance and shift to one side, bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Switch sides at the bottom in a controlled low transition. Keep the working heel down.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_cossack_squat.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Stand in a wide stance and shift to one side, bending that knee while the other leg stays long. Keep the working heel down.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_squat.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Squat down between the hips keeping the bell at the sternum, then drive through the whole foot to stand. Keep the knees tracking over the toes.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_contra.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the front leg and place the rear foot on a bench. Lower into a split squat until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the bell stacked over the shoulder.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_ipsila.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the same side as the front leg with the rear foot on a bench. Lower into a split squat until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the bell stacked over the shoulder.

ff_double_dumbbell_low_hold_lateral_lung.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at thigh height in a low hang. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_barbell_front_rack_lateral_lunge.description: Rack the barbell at the shoulders with elbows high. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Sit the hips back on the stepping leg instead of diving the knee forward.

ff_barbell_overhead_lateral_lunge.description: Lock the barbell overhead with ribs down. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_heavy_sandbag_bear_hug_lateral_lunge.description: Bear-hug a heavy sandbag at chest height. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_contralateral_.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the side opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_barbell_back_rack_lateral_lunge.description: Set the barbell across the upper back. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_double_kettlebell_suitcase_lateral_lu.description: Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_double_kettlebell_front_rack_lateral_.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_front_ra.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bell vertical and the wrist stacked during the lateral step.

ff_double_dumbbell_front_rack_lateral_lu.description: Rack two dumbbells at the shoulders. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the working heel heavy through the lateral step.

ff_double_dumbbell_overhead_lateral_lung.description: Press two dumbbells overhead with arms stacked. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_suitcase_contrala.description: Hold one dumbbell at your side opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_contra.description: Rack one dumbbell at the shoulder opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_contrala.description: Press one dumbbell overhead opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_double_kettlebell_overhead_lateral_lu.description: Lock two kettlebells overhead. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_dumbbell_goblet_lateral_lunge.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in a goblet grip at the chest. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the chest tall as you sit into the hip of the stepping leg.

ff_clubbell_order_lateral_lunge.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at one shoulder. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_double_clubbell_order_lateral_lunge.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position at each shoulder. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_contralater.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position opposite the stepping leg.
