Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Shorten the step if the working heel lifts off the floor.

ff_macebell_order_lateral_lunge.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at one shoulder. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_double_kettlebell_bottoms_up_overhead.description: Press two kettlebells bottoms-up overhead with vertical wrists. Step wide to one side with bells bottoms-up overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bells vertical with wrists stacked during the lateral step.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_suitcase_contra.description: Hold one kettlebell suitcase-style opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Shorten the step if the working heel lifts off the floor.

ff_bodyweight_lateral_lunge.description: Stand tall with hands on hips or crossed at the chest. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_lateral_lunge.description: Settle the Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_lateral_lunge.description: Front-rack the sandbag at the chest with elbows high. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Return to center by pushing the floor away, not leaning away from the load.

ff_plate_overhead_lateral_lunge.description: Press a weight plate overhead with arms stacked. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_cont.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Shorten the step if the working heel lifts off the floor.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bell vertical and the wrist stacked during the lateral step.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_contra.description: Press one kettlebell overhead opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell bottoms-up overhead opposite the stepping leg. Step wide to one side with bells bottoms-up overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bells vertical with wrists stacked during the lateral step.

ff_kettlebell_goblet_lateral_lunge.description: Cup one kettlebell in a goblet hold at the chest. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Brace the core when holding weight overhead during the lateral step.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_lateral_lunge.description: Hold one kettlebell in a horn grip at chest height. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the working heel heavy through the lateral step.

ff_barbell_zercher_lateral_lunge.description: Cradle the barbell in the Zercher position at the chest. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Do not let the front knee cave inward on the return.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_front_rack_ipsila.description: Rack one dumbbell at the shoulder on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Brace the core when holding weight overhead during the lateral step.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_ipsilate.description: Press one dumbbell overhead on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_single_arm_clubbell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold one clubbell in the order position on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the trailing leg long with the foot planted.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_ipsi.description: Rack one kettlebell on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the trailing leg long with the foot planted.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_fron.description: Rack one kettlebell on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bell vertical and the wrist stacked during the lateral step.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_overhead_ipsila.description: Press one kettlebell overhead on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side with load overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as you sit into the lunge.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_over.description: Press one kettlebell bottoms-up overhead on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side with bells bottoms-up overhead, sit into the bending hip, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Keep the bells vertical with wrists stacked during the lateral step.

ff_heavy_sandbag_shoulder_ipsilateral_la.description: Shoulder a heavy sandbag on the stepping-leg side. Step wide to one side, sit into the bending hip with the trailing leg long, then drive through the whole foot back to center. Sit the hips back on the stepping leg instead of diving the knee forward.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_contralater.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the side opposite the working leg. Step out to one side, sit into the hip of the stepping leg, then push back to center under control. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_single_arm_macebell_order_ipsilateral.description: Hold the mace in the order grip at the shoulder on the same side as the working leg. Step out to one side, sit into the hip of the stepping leg, then push back to center under control. Do not let the long lever rotate the torso off line.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_cle.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Alternate sides each rep: clean to the rack, then dip slightly and push press overhead. Lower to the floor and switch hands. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Alternate sides each rep: clean to the rack, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Lower to the floor and switch hands. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Alternate sides each rep: clean to the rack, then front-rack squat to depth, then stand tall. Lower to the floor and switch hands. Catch overhead with a stacked wrist and soft knees.

ff_single_arm_landmine_half_kneeling_ips.description: Half-kneel facing a landmine bar with the same-side knee up and the end of the bar racked at that shoulder. Press the bar overhead in an arc without leaning back, then lower to the shoulder. Keep the hips square and the core braced.

ff_stability_ball_copenhagen_plank.description: Side-plank with the top foot on a stability ball and the bottom knee on the floor or both legs extended. Press the top foot into the ball and lift the hips so the body forms a straight line. Hold without letting the top hip roll back.

ff_double_kettlebell_gorilla_clean.description: Stand over two kettlebells between a wide stance. Hinge, grip both bells, and row them high along the body while snapping the hips to catch them in the front rack. Lower back to the floor under control.

ff_stability_ball_side_plank.description: Place the forearm on the floor and stack the feet on a stability ball in a side plank. Lift the hips until the body forms a straight line from head to heels. Keep the top shoulder stacked over the bottom and the ball steady.

ff_stability_ball_mountain_climber.description: Start in a high plank with both feet on a stability ball. Drive one knee toward the chest while keeping the shoulders over the hands, then switch legs in a controlled rhythm. Do not let the hips pike up excessively.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_seated_bicep_cur.description: Sit on a bench with a tall torso. Stand with one kettlebell in a horn grip at the chest in the chest, palms forward. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_cle.description: Alternate sides: clean one kettlebell to the rack, shift under it in a bent press to lockout overhead, lower, and switch. Keep the eyes on the bell and the hips moving under a vertical arm path.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_clean_to_bent_p.description: Clean one kettlebell to the rack, then sit sideways and shift under the bell in a bent press until the arm locks out overhead. Stand tall and lower under control. Keep the bell stacked over the base of support.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_copenhagen_plan.description: Side-plank with the top foot on a kettlebell handle and the bottom knee on the floor. Lift the hips and hold the body in a straight line while pressing the foot into the bell. Keep the top hip stacked over the bottom.

ff_suspension_copenhagen_plank.description: Side-plank with the top foot in a suspension trainer foot cradle and the bottom knee down or legs extended. Lift the hips and hold a straight line while pressing the foot into the straps. Do not let the straps swing.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bent_knee_copen.description: Side-plank on the forearm with the top foot on a kettlebell and both knees bent. Lift the hips and hold while pressing the top foot into the bell. Keep the shoulders and hips stacked.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bottoms_up_bent.description: Side-plank with the top foot on a bottoms-up kettlebell handle and knees bent. Lift the hips to a straight line and hold without letting the bell wobble. Keep the grip tight on the handle.

ff_suspension_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel facing a suspension trainer and hold the handles with arms extended. Brace the core and slowly extend the arms forward, lowering the torso toward the floor, then pull back to the start. Do not break at the low back.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_tall_kneeling_bi.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees. Stand with one kettlebell in a horn grip at the chest in the chest, palms forward. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_kettlebell_horn_grip_half_kneeling_bi.description: Half-kneel with the front foot flat and hips square. Stand with one kettlebell in a horn grip at the chest in the chest, palms forward. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_double_kettlebell_bicep_curl.description: Stand tall. Hold a kettlebell in each hand. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_double_kettlebell_seated_bicep_curl.description: Sit on a bench with a tall torso. Hold a kettlebell in each hand. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_bicep_c.description: Stand tall. Hold a kettlebell in each hand and alternate arms each rep. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_seated_.description: Sit on a bench with a tall torso. Hold a kettlebell in each hand and alternate arms each rep. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_bicep_curl.description: Stand tall. Hold one kettlebell with the working arm. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_seated_bicep_cu.description: Sit on a bench with a tall torso. Hold one kettlebell with the working arm. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_incline_bench_bic.description: Lie on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand hanging toward the floor. Curl toward the shoulder without moving the upper arm, then lower with control. Keep the shoulder blade stable on the bench.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_incline.description: Lie back on an incline bench with arms hanging. Hold a kettlebell in each hand and alternate arms each rep. Curl the bell toward the shoulder without lifting the upper arm off the bench, then lower with control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_bicep.description: Lie back on an incline bench with arms hanging. Hold a kettlebell in each hand. Curl the bell toward the shoulder without lifting the upper arm off the bench, then lower with control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_incline_bench_b.description: Lie back on an incline bench with arms hanging. Hold one kettlebell with the working arm. Curl the bell toward the shoulder without lifting the upper arm off the bench, then lower with control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_alternating_double_kettlebell_tall_kn.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees. Hold a kettlebell in each hand and alternate arms each rep. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_double_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_bicep.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees. Hold a kettlebell in each hand. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_b.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees. Hold one kettlebell with the working arm. Curl the bell(s) toward the shoulder keeping the elbows fixed at your sides, then lower under control. Keep the upper arms fixed; do not swing the torso.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_half_kneeling_con.description: Half-kneel and brace the working elbow against the inside of the front knee with a dumbbell in hand. Curl toward the shoulder without rocking the torso, then lower slowly. Keep the wrist neutral.

ff_sled_push.description: Grip the sled handles at chest or hip height with the body angled forward and arms extended. Drive through the balls of the feet in short powerful steps, keeping the spine neutral. Do not round the upper back.

ff_sled_rope_pull.description: Face the sled with a rope attached and walk backward until the rope is taut. Sit the hips back slightly and hand-over-hand pull the sled toward you with long strokes. Keep the core braced and avoid jerking with the low back.

ff_sled_rope_seated_pull.description: Sit facing the sled with legs extended and a rope in both hands. Pull hand-over-hand, bringing the sled toward you while staying tall through the chest. Keep the shoulders down away from the ears.

ff_sled_forward_drag.description: Attach a harness or belt to the sled and face away from it. Lean forward and walk or run with short steps to drag the sled behind you. Keep the chest up and drive through the legs.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_front_rack_marc.description: Clean one kettlebell to the front rack and march with controlled high steps. Keep the elbow connected to the ribs and the wrist neutral. Switch sides after the set or as programmed.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_tactical_clean_.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then dip, drive, and push jerk overhead with a soft knee catch, then stand. Dip vertically and catch with soft knees before standing to lockout.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then front squat, then drive up and press overhead in one thruster. Finish the squat before driving the thruster press.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then dip, drive, and split jerk overhead, then stand to finish. Catch in a stable split with the front knee over the ankle before standing.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then dip slightly and push press overhead. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then front-rack squat to depth, then stand tall. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. From the tactical start, hinge and clean the bell to the rack, then shift under the bell in a bent press to lockout overhead. Dip vertically before leg drive on presses and jerks.

ff_cable_straight_bar_incline_bench_tric.description: Lie face-up on an incline bench beneath a high cable with a straight bar. Start with upper arms perpendicular to the torso and extend the elbows to push the bar toward the ceiling, then return with control. Keep the upper arms still.

ff_barbell_tall_kneeling_reverse_grip_bi.description: Kneel tall holding a barbell at thigh height with an underhand grip. Curl toward the shoulders without rocking the hips forward, then lower with control. Keep the elbows pinned to the ribs.

ff_cable_straight_bar_tall_kneeling_tric.description: Kneel tall facing a high cable with a straight bar at chest height. Pin the upper arms to the sides and extend the elbows to push the bar down, then return without leaning forward. Keep the thighs vertical.

ff_single_arm_cable_bayesian_curl.description: Stand facing away from a low cable with the handle in one hand, arm extended behind the hip. Curl forward keeping the upper arm fixed behind the torso, then lower slowly. This lengthened position increases biceps tension at the bottom.

ff_cable_rope_incline_bench_tricep_pushd.description: Lie on an incline bench with a rope attachment from a high cable and upper arms angled back. Extend the elbows to push the rope toward the ceiling, splitting the rope at the top, then return with control.

ff_double_kettlebell_start_stop_half_sna.description: Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge, clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then pull and punch into a half snatch overhead. Lower under control and switch sides if alternating.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_sta.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge, clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then pull and punch into a half snatch overhead. Lower under control and switch sides if alternating.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_start_stop_half.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge, clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then pull and punch into a half snatch overhead. Lower under control and switch sides if alternating.

ff_double_kettlebell_kneeling_push_up.description: Kneel with hands on two kettlebell handles in a push-up position. Lower the chest between the bells with elbows at roughly 45°, then press back up. Keep the glutes and core braced so the hips do not sag.

ff_bodyweight_oblique_crunch.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and fingertips lightly behind the head. Curl up and rotate one elbow toward the opposite knee, then lower and alternate sides. Do not pull on the neck.

ff_double_kettlebell_start_stop_clean_to.description: Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack,. then alternate reverse lunges from the rack with a quiet back-knee touch. Catch overhead with a stacked wrist and soft knees.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front squat, then drive up and press overhead in one thruster. Finish the squat before driving the thruster press.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and push jerk overhead with a soft knee catch,. then stand. Dip vertically and catch with soft knees before standing to lockout.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and split jerk overhead, then stand to finish. Catch in a stable split with the front knee over the ankle before standing.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front-rack squat to depth, then stand tall. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip slightly and push press overhead. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over two kettlebells between the feet. Hinge and clean the bells to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then alternate forward lunges from the rack with control each rep. Dip vertically before leg drive on presses and jerks.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_start_stop_clea.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then step opposite the bell back into a reverse lunge and stand. Keep the bell close to the body on the pull.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and split jerk overhead, then stand to finish. Catch in a stable split with the front knee over the ankle before standing.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front squat, then drive up and press overhead in one thruster. Finish the squat before driving the thruster press.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip slightly and push press overhead. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and push jerk overhead with a soft knee catch,. then stand. Dip vertically and catch with soft knees before standing to lockout.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then step opposite the bell forward into a lunge and return to stand. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front-rack squat to depth, then stand tall. Snap the hips on the clean; do not arm-curl the bell.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then step the bell-side leg back into a reverse lunge and stand. Finish the squat before driving the thruster press.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then step the bell-side leg forward into a lunge and return to stand. Catch overhead with a stacked wrist and soft knees.

ff_alternating_single_arm_kettlebell_sta.description: Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and push jerk overhead with a soft knee catch,. then stand. Dip vertically and catch with soft knees before standing to lockout.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front squat, then drive up and press overhead in one thruster. Finish the squat before driving the thruster press.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip, drive, and split jerk overhead, then stand to finish. Catch in a stable split with the front knee over the ankle before standing.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then dip slightly and push press overhead. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then strict-press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder. Catch overhead with a stacked wrist and soft knees.

Stand over one kettlebell between the feet to alternate sides each rep. Hinge and clean the bell to the rack, pause one second at the rack, then front-rack squat to depth, then stand tall. Pause fully at the rack before the next phase of the complex.

ff_single_arm_barbell_suitcase_deadlift.description: Stand beside a barbell loaded on one side like a suitcase. Hinge at the hips with a flat back, grip the bar in the center, and stand by driving the hips forward. Fight lateral flexion toward the bar side.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_deadlift.description: Stand between two dumbbells at your sides. Hinge with a flat back, grip both bells, and stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the shoulders level and the bells close to the legs.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_bent_knee_copenha.description: Side-plank on the forearm with the top foot on a dumbbell and both knees bent. Lift the hips to a straight line and hold while pressing through the top foot. Keep the shoulders stacked.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_copenhagen_plank.description: Side-plank with the top foot on a dumbbell handle and the bottom knee on the floor or legs extended. Lift the hips and hold a straight line while pressing the foot into the bell. Do not let the top hip roll back.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_lateral.description: Kneel tall with a dumbbell in each hand at the thighs. Raise the arms out to shoulder height with a slight bend in the elbows, then lower with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging.

ff_sled_reverse_drag.description: Face the sled with a harness attached at the hips or waist. Walk backward with strong steps, keeping the hips low and the chest tall as the sled follows. Do not shuffle with straight locked knees.

ff_kettlebell_seated_overhead_tricep_ext.description: Sit on a bench holding one kettlebell overhead in both hands by the horns. Bend the elbows to lower the bell behind the head, then extend to lockout. Keep the upper arms close to the ears.

ff_kettlebell_overhead_tricep_extension.description: Stand tall holding one kettlebell overhead in both hands by the horns with upper arms near the ears. Lower the bell behind the head by bending the elbows, then extend. Squeeze the glutes to prevent rib flare.

ff_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_overhead_tri.description: Kneel tall holding one kettlebell overhead by the horns. Bend the elbows to lower the bell behind the head, then extend without leaning back. Keep the thighs vertical throughout.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_tall_kneeling_bic.description: Kneel tall crush-gripping one dumbbell at the chest with both hands. Curl the bell toward the shoulders keeping the elbows high, then lower under control. Do not lean back to finish the curl.

ff_slider_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_revers.description: Set a Bulgarian bag across the upper back. Place a slider under the back foot on a smooth floor. Slide the rear foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull the front leg back to stand. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_chest.description: Lie on an incline bench with a kettlebell in each hand over the chest, palms facing. Open the arms in a wide arc with soft elbows until a chest stretch is felt, then squeeze back to the start. Keep the shoulder blades stable on the bench.

ff_double_kettlebell_chest_fly.description: Lie on a flat bench with a kettlebell in each hand over the chest. Lower the bells out to the sides in a wide arc with slightly bent elbows, then bring them together over the chest. Do not drop the elbows below the bench.

ff_double_kettlebell_decline_bench_chest.description: Lie on a decline bench with kettlebells pressed over the chest. Open the arms in a controlled arc with soft elbows, feel the stretch, then squeeze back together. Keep the feet secured in the bench pads.

ff_single_arm_bar_chin_up.description: Hang from a bar with one hand in an underhand grip and the other hand gripping the wrist or forearm for assistance. Pull until the chin clears the bar, then lower with control. Keep the shoulder down on the working side.

ff_double_dumbbell_seated_cuban_press.description: Sit tall with a dumbbell in each hand, elbows bent near 90°. Externally rotate, press overhead, reverse the press, and rotate back in a Cuban press sequence. Use light weight and pain-free range.

ff_double_kettlebell_dive_bomber_push_up.description: Start in a pike with hands on two kettlebells, swoop the chest forward and up into an upward-dog shape, then reverse the dive back to pike. Keep the movement smooth and the shoulders away from the ears.

ff_double_kettlebell_feet_elevated_pike_.description: Place the feet on a bench and hands on two kettlebells in a pike push-up. Lower the head toward the floor between the bells, then press back up. Keep the hips high and the elbows tracking over the hands.

ff_double_kettlebell_pseudo_planche_push.description: Set up in a push-up on two kettlebells with hands near the hips and the body leaning forward. Protract the shoulders and lower with elbows back, then press up. Shift weight forward over the hands throughout.

ff_sled_low_row.description: Face the sled and grip low handles or a rope with arms extended. Row the handles toward the hips by driving the elbows back, then extend and step back to reset tension. Keep the spine neutral throughout.

ff_superband_assisted_bar_chin_up.description: Loop a band over the bar and place one foot or knee in it with an underhand shoulder-width grip. Pull until the chin clears the bar, then lower under control. Use enough band tension to keep form strict.

ff_bar_commando_pull_up.description: Grip a bar with one hand facing you and one facing away in a close staggered grip. Pull up toward one hand, then shift to the other side at the top, alternating each rep. Keep the core tight to limit swinging.

ff_single_arm_barbell_half_kneeling_bent.description: Half-kneel beside a landmine or barbell end racked at one shoulder. Shift sideways under the bar and press to lockout overhead in a bent press, then return. Keep the eyes on the end of the bar.

ff_superband_assisted_bar_commando_pull_.description: Use a band for assistance on a commando pull-up with mixed grips close together. Pull toward one hand, shift at the top, and alternate without kipping. Keep the shoulders down away from the ears.

ff_bodyweight_toe_balance_squat.description: Stand with the heels lifted and the balls of the feet on the floor or a wedge. Squat down keeping the knees forward and the torso upright, then stand by pushing through the toes. Use a support for balance if needed.

ff_climbing_rope_l_sit_pull_up.description: Hang from a climbing rope with an overhand grip and the legs extended in an L-sit. Pull until the chin passes the hands while holding the legs parallel to the floor, then lower with control. Keep the shoulders down and the core tight.

ff_climbing_rope_seated_l_sit_pull_up.description: Sit beneath a climbing rope with legs extended in an L-sit off the floor and hands on the rope. Pull the body up until the chin passes the hands, then lower without losing leg height. Reduce range if the legs drop.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_l_sit.description: Hang from a climbing rope with an overhand grip and legs extended parallel to the floor in an L-sit. Hold the position with straight arms and depressed shoulders without swinging. Reduce hold time if the legs begin to sag.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_l_sit_flutter_k.description: Hang from a climbing rope with an overhand grip and legs extended in an L-sit. Hold the L while performing small controlled flutter kicks without letting the legs drop below parallel. Keep shoulders depressed and the core braced.

ff_climbing_rope_l_sit_climb.description: Begin on a climbing rope with legs extended in an L-sit off the floor and hands on the rope. Pull the body upward while maintaining the L-sit leg height, then lower under control. Do not use the legs to wrap or kick up the rope.

ff_climbing_rope_legless_climb.description: Hang from a climbing rope with arms only and no leg wraps. Pull hand-over-hand to climb the rope using the upper body, then lower with control. Keep the core tight to limit swinging.

ff_climbing_rope_j_hook_climb.description: Hang from a climbing rope and place one leg in a J-hook wrap with the rope running outside the foot and over the thigh. Stand on the rope with the free leg, reach up, and reset the wrap to climb. Keep the wrap tight before unloading the arms.

ff_climbing_rope_s_wrap_climb.description: Hang from a climbing rope and lock an S-wrap by crossing the rope between the feet and standing on it. Reach up with the hands, then reestablish the foot lock before standing again. Do not climb with slack in the foot wrap.

ff_kettlebell_single_leg_standing_bent_k.description: Stand on one leg with the other knee bent and foot off the floor, holding a kettlebell in both hands at the chest. Circle the bell around the head in alternating directions while staying tall on the standing leg. Keep the ribs down and the knee of the standing leg softly bent.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_single_leg_stan.description: Stand on one leg with the other knee bent, racking a kettlebell on the same-side shoulder. Press overhead until the arm stacks over the shoulder, then lower under control. Keep the hips level and avoid leaning away from the bell.

ff_barbell_zercher_march.description: Cradle a barbell in the elbows at chest height and march in place with high controlled knee lifts. Stay tall through the crown of the head and keep the bar tight to the torso. Do not lean back as each knee drives up.

ff_bodyweight_march.description: Stand tall and march in place, lifting each knee to hip height with a controlled pause at the top. Pump the opposite arm naturally and land softly under the hips. Avoid leaning backward as the knee rises.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_rotational_snat.description: Stand over a kettlebell between the feet and hinge to grip with one hand. Snatch the bell overhead in one motion, allowing a controlled rotation through the thoracic spine as the bell turns over. Punch through at lockout and keep the bell close on the pull.

ff_suspension_pallof_press.description: Stand sideways to a suspension anchor at chest height with both hands on the handles at the sternum. Press the handles straight out until arms are extended, resisting rotation toward the anchor, then return. Stagger the feet and brace the core throughout.

ff_climbing_rope_dead_hang.description: Grip a climbing rope with both hands in an overhand grip and hang with arms straight and shoulders pulled down. Hold without swinging, keeping the ribs down and the grip even on both sides. Release if grip fails rather than dropping from height.

ff_single_arm_suspension_kneeling_rollou.description: Kneel facing a suspension trainer and hold one handle at shoulder height. Roll forward extending the arm while keeping the hips extended, then pull back with the lat and core. Keep the non-working hand on the hip or chest for reference.

ff_stability_ball_reverse_crunch.description: Lie on your back with calves or ankles on a stability ball and hands by your sides. Curl the pelvis off the floor by rolling the ball toward you, then lower with control. Do not swing the legs or lift with momentum from the hip flexors alone.

ff_slam_ball_overhead_slam.description: Stand with feet hip-width and raise a slam ball overhead with both hands. Hinge and drive the ball straight into the floor between the feet, then catch on the rebound. Keep the core braced and use the whole body on the slam.

ff_slam_ball_tall_kneeling_overhead_slam.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees, holding a slam ball overhead. Forcefully slam the ball straight down between the knees by hinging at the hips and driving the arms. Catch on the bounce and repeat without leaning back.

ff_slam_ball_alternating_rotational_over.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width and hold a slam ball at the chest. Rotate through the mid-back and slam the ball to the floor outside one foot, catch, and alternate sides each rep. Keep the knees softly bent and the hips facing forward.

ff_slam_ball_squat_jump_overhead_slam.description: Hold a slam ball at the chest, squat down, then jump and extend the ball overhead at the top. Slam the ball straight down as you land softly into the next squat. Do not collapse the chest forward on the slam.

ff_slam_ball_tall_kneeling_alternating_r.description: Kneel tall holding a slam ball at the chest with both hands. Rotate through the thoracic spine to one side, slam the ball into the floor beside the hip, catch on the bounce, and alternate sides. Keep the hips square forward throughout.

ff_bodyweight_shrimp_squat.description: Stand on one leg and reach the free leg behind you, grabbing the foot or ankle with the same-side hand. Lower into a single-leg squat while pulling the back knee down, then stand using the quads and hip of the standing leg. Keep the chest tall and move slowly.

ff_bodyweight_hand_assisted_shrimp_squat.description: Stand on one leg and hold a rack or pole lightly for balance while grabbing the back foot with the same-side hand. Lower into a shrimp squat with assistance from the hands as needed, then drive back up. Keep most of the load on the working leg.

ff_double_cable_bayesian_curl.description: Stand facing away from a low cable between two pulleys with handles behind you and arms extended back. Curl the handles forward toward the shoulders with elbows fixed behind the torso, then lower slowly. Keep the shoulders down and wrists neutral.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_incline_bench_pr.description: Lie on an incline bench and grip a barbell with a supinated shoulder-width grip over the upper chest. Lower the bar to the upper chest with elbows tucked, then press to lockout. Use a spotter or safeties and a controlled weight.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_decline_bench_pr.description: Lie on a decline bench with a supinated grip on the barbell and feet secured. Lower the bar to the lower chest with elbows tucked, then press back to straight arms. Keep the wrists straight and avoid bouncing off the chest.

ff_bar_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back under a fixed bar, arms extended overhead, with legs raised toward the ceiling. Rotate the straight legs side to side in a controlled arc while keeping the shoulders pinned to the floor. Move slowly and stop before the low back lifts off the floor.

ff_ring_windshield_wiper.description: Support yourself on rings at the top of a dip with legs extended toward the ceiling. Rotate the straight legs side to side in a controlled arc while keeping the shoulders pinned to the floor. Keep the rings stable and avoid swinging the body.

ff_bodyweight_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with arms out to the sides and legs extended toward the ceiling. Rotate the straight legs side to side in a controlled arc while keeping the shoulders pinned to the floor. Move slowly and stop before the low back lifts off the floor.

ff_bodyweight_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with arms out to the sides and knees bent at 90° over the hips. Rotate the knees side to side toward the floor while keeping the upper back flat on the ground, then return through center. Move slowly and stop before the low back lifts off the floor.

ff_barbell_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back holding a barbell over the chest with legs extended toward the ceiling. Rotate the straight legs side to side in a controlled arc while keeping the shoulders pinned to the floor. Move slowly and stop before the low back lifts off the floor.

ff_bar_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back holding a bar over the chest with knees bent at 90°. Rotate the knees side to side toward the floor while keeping the upper back flat on the ground, then return through center. Move slowly and stop before the low back lifts off the floor.

ff_ring_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Support yourself on rings at the top of a dip with bent knees toward the chest. Rotate the knees side to side toward the floor while keeping the upper back flat on the ground, then return through center. Keep the rings stable and avoid swinging the body.

ff_sled_lateral_drag.description: Attach a harness or handles to a sled and side-shuffle with the sled trailing, keeping tension on the straps. Stay low in an athletic stance with feet parallel and push through the outside leg. Do not cross the feet or lean away from the sled.

ff_slider_chest_fly.description: Start in a push-up plank with a slider disc under each hand on a smooth floor. Slide one or both hands outward into a wide fly while keeping the body rigid, then pull back to center. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid sagging the hips.

ff_slider_kneeling_chest_fly.description: Kneel with hands on slider discs shoulder-width on a smooth floor. Slide the hands outward into a fly while keeping the hips extended and core braced, then squeeze back to center. Do not break at the hips as the hands slide.

ff_barbell_squat_clean_to_squat_jerk.description: Stand over a barbell with a hip-width grip. Pull the bar from the floor into a full squat clean, receiving the bar in the front rack at the bottom of the squat. Stand from the squat, dip, drive, and squat jerk the bar overhead, catching in a full squat before standing to lockout. Keep the bar close on the pull and move the feet fast under the jerk.

ff_barbell_power_clean_to_squat_jerk.description: Stand over a barbell with a hip-width grip. Pull the bar from the floor into a power clean, receiving it in a partial squat with the bar in the front rack. Stand from the squat, dip, drive, and squat jerk the bar overhead, catching in a full squat before standing to lockout. Keep the bar close on the pull and move the feet fast under the jerk.

ff_barbell_hang_squat_clean_to_squat_jer.description: Stand holding a barbell at mid-thigh with a hip-width grip. Hinge and pull the bar into a full squat clean from the hang, catching in the front rack at the bottom. Stand from the squat, dip, drive, and squat jerk the bar overhead, catching in a full squat before standing to lockout. Keep the bar close on the pull and move the feet fast under the jerk.

ff_barbell_hang_power_clean_to_squat_jer.description: Stand holding a barbell at mid-thigh with a hip-width grip. Hinge and pull the bar into a power clean from the hang, catching in a partial squat with the bar in the front rack. Stand from the squat, dip, drive, and squat jerk the bar overhead, catching in a full squat before standing to lockout. Keep the bar close on the pull and move the feet fast under the jerk.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_strict_bicep_curl.description: Stand tall holding an EZ bar with a close supinated grip, elbows at your sides. Curl the bar toward the shoulders without swinging the torso, then lower until the elbows are fully extended. Keep the shoulders down throughout.

ff_plate_overhead_march.description: Press a weight plate overhead with arms stacked and march with high controlled steps. Keep the biceps near the ears and ribs down as each knee lifts. Reduce plate weight if the low back arches.

ff_slider_body_saw.description: Start in a forearm plank with both feet on slider discs. Push the body backward by extending the shoulders, then pull forward to the start. Keep the glutes tight and avoid sagging the hips.

ff_slider_parallette_mountain_climber.description: Place hands on parallettes or handles with feet on slider discs in a plank. Drive one knee toward the chest while the opposite foot slides back, alternating quickly under control. Keep the shoulders over the hands and hips level.

ff_plate_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back in a frog stance with a weight plate resting on the hip crease. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeezing the glutes at the top, then lower without losing knee width. Keep the ribs down and avoid hyperextending the low back at lockout.

ff_dumbbell_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back in a frog stance with a dumbbell on the hip crease. Place the feet on a bench in the frog stance and drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeezing the glutes at the top. Keep the ribs down and avoid hyperextending the low back at lockout.

ff_plate_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back in a frog stance with a weight plate resting on the hip crease. Place the feet on a bench in the frog stance and drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeezing the glutes at the top. Keep the ribs down and avoid hyperextending the low back at lockout.

ff_kettlebell_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back in a frog stance with a kettlebell on the hip crease. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeezing the glutes at the top, then lower without losing knee width. Keep the ribs down and avoid hyperextending the low back at lockout.

ff_kettlebell_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back in a frog stance with a kettlebell on the hip crease. Place the feet on a bench in the frog stance and drive through the heels to lift the hips, squeezing the glutes at the top. Keep the ribs down and avoid hyperextending the low back at lockout.

ff_suspension_body_saw.description: Place the feet in suspension straps and set up in a forearm plank. Saw the body backward and forward by moving at the shoulders while keeping a rigid line from head to heels. Do not let the low back drop.

ff_bodyweight_single_leg_box_jump.description: Stand on one leg facing a plyo box at an appropriate height. Dip softly, drive through the standing leg, and land on the box with the same leg in a stable athletic stance. Step down and reset; use arm swing for balance but avoid pushing off the free leg.

ff_miniband_march.description: Place a miniband just above the knees or ankles and march with exaggerated knee height against band tension. Keep the feet hip-width and resist the band pulling the knees inward. Stay tall through the torso.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_march.description: Front-rack a sandbag at the chest with elbows high and march with controlled knee lifts. Brace the core so the bag does not pull the torso forward. Keep each foot landing softly under the hip.

ff_sandbag_shoulder_march.description: Shoulder a sandbag on one side and march with high knee lifts while keeping the torso upright. Switch shoulders periodically or complete one side before changing. Do not let the bag pull you into lateral lean.

ff_sandbag_overhead_march.description: Hold a sandbag locked out overhead and march with controlled high steps. Keep the arms stacked and ribs down as each knee drives up. Use a lighter bag if the low back overextends.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_march.description: Set a sandbag across the upper back like a barbell and march with high knee lifts. Keep the chest tall and core braced against the load. Land each foot quietly under the body.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_front_rack_march.description: Crush-grip one dumbbell vertically in the front rack at the chest and march with high controlled steps. Keep the bell tight to the sternum and avoid leaning back. Brace the core on each knee drive.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_march.description: Settle a Bulgarian bag across the upper back and march with high knee lifts under control. Keep the shoulders down and the bag centered on the traps. Do not rush the foot contacts.

ff_bulgarian_bag_thruster.description: Front-rack a Bulgarian bag at the chest and squat to depth. Drive up explosively and press the bag overhead in one motion, then lower to the rack and repeat. Keep the elbows high in the rack and finish each squat before pressing.

ff_sandbag_thruster.description: Front-rack a sandbag at the chest and squat to depth. Drive up explosively and press the bag overhead in one motion, then lower to the rack and repeat. Keep the elbows high in the rack and finish each squat before pressing.

ff_sandbag_overhead_press.description: Stand tall with a sandbag racked at one shoulder or bear-hugged at the chest. Press the sandbag overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control to the rack. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back. Switch shoulders or sides as programmed.

ff_sandbag_half_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Half-kneel with the front foot flat and a sandbag racked at one shoulder. Press the sandbag overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control to the rack. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back. Switch shoulders or sides as programmed.

ff_sandbag_tall_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel tall with hips stacked over knees and a sandbag racked at one shoulder. Press the sandbag overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control to the rack. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back. Switch shoulders or sides as programmed.

ff_landmine_goblet_march.description: Hold the end of a landmine barbell in a goblet grip at the chest and march with high knee lifts. Keep the bar path vertical and the elbows inside the wrists. Stay tall as each foot lands.

ff_landmine_overhead_march.description: Press the landmine bar end overhead with both hands and march with controlled high steps. Keep the arc of the bar in line with the midline and ribs down. Reduce load if the low back arches.

ff_single_arm_landmine_suitcase_march.description: Hold the landmine bar end in one hand at thigh height like a suitcase and march with high knee lifts on the same side or alternating. Keep the shoulders level and resist side bending toward the load.

ff_bulgarian_bag_overhead_march.description: Lock a Bulgarian bag overhead with arms stacked and march with high controlled steps. Keep the biceps near the ears and the core braced. Use a manageable bag weight to maintain posture.

ff_superband_tall_kneeling_pull_through.description: Anchor a heavy band low and kneel tall facing away from the anchor with the band between the legs. Hinge at the hips and reach back through the legs, then drive the hips forward to stand tall on the knees. Squeeze the glutes at the top without hyperextending the low back.

ff_barbell_skull_crusher.description: Lie on a flat bench holding a barbell with a narrow grip, arms extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_barbell_incline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Lie on an incline bench holding a barbell with a narrow grip, arms extended over the upper chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_barbell_decline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Lie on a decline bench holding a barbell with a narrow grip, arms extended toward the ceiling. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_floor_skull_crusher.description: Lie on the floor holding an EZ bar with a narrow grip, upper arms vertical. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_barbell_floor_skull_crusher.description: Lie on the floor holding a barbell with a narrow grip, upper arms vertical. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_straight_bar_skull_crusher.description: Lie on a flat bench facing away from a low cable with a straight bar attachment, arms extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_straight_bar_incline_bench_skul.description: Lie on an incline bench facing away from a low cable with a straight bar attachment, arms extended. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_rope_incline_bench_skull_crushe.description: Lie on an incline bench facing away from a low cable with a rope attachment behind the head. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_straight_bar_decline_bench_skul.description: Lie on a decline bench facing the cable stack with a straight bar, arms extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_double_dumbbell_floor_skull_crusher.description: Lie on the floor holding a dumbbell in each hand with upper arms vertical. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_floor_skull_crush.description: Lie on the floor crush-gripping one dumbbell vertically with both hands, upper arms fixed. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_rope_decline_bench_skull_crushe.description: Lie on a decline bench with a rope attachment from a high cable, arms extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_rope_floor_skull_crusher.description: Lie on the floor with a low cable rope attachment, upper arms vertical. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_cable_straight_bar_floor_skull_crushe.description: Lie on the floor facing a low cable with a straight bar, upper arms fixed pointing up. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep constant cable tension throughout. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_skull_crusher.description: Lie on a flat bench holding one dumbbell with the working arm extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_incline_bench_sku.description: Lie on an incline bench holding one dumbbell with the working arm extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_decline_bench_sku.description: Lie on a decline bench holding one dumbbell with the working arm extended over the chest. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_floor_skull_crush.description: Lie on the floor holding one dumbbell with the upper arm vertical. Bend the elbows to lower the load toward the forehead or ears, then extend to straighten the arms without flaring the elbows wide. Keep the upper arms fixed and move only at the elbows.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_seated_overhead_t.description: Sit on a bench holding one dumbbell overhead with the upper arm close to the ear. Bend the elbow to lower the dumbbell behind the head, then extend to lockout without leaning back. Keep the ribs down and the upper arm vertical.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_tricep_e.description: Stand tall holding one dumbbell overhead with the working arm stacked over the shoulder. Bend the elbow to lower the dumbbell behind the head, then extend to lockout without leaning back. Keep the ribs down and the upper arm vertical.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_ove.description: Kneel tall holding one dumbbell overhead with the upper arm beside the ear. Bend the elbow to lower the dumbbell behind the head, then extend to lockout without leaning back. Keep the ribs down and the upper arm vertical.

ff_miniband_dead_bug.description: Lie on your back with a miniband above the knees, arms toward the ceiling, and hips and knees at 90°. Extend the opposite arm and leg while pressing the band apart with the knees, then return and alternate. Keep the low back gently pressed to the floor.

ff_stability_ball_body_saw.description: Start in a forearm plank with both feet on a stability ball. Saw the body forward and back by moving at the shoulders while keeping the glutes engaged. Move slowly to keep the ball stable.

ff_medicine_ball_alternating_single_leg_.description: Lie on your back holding a medicine ball overhead with legs extended. Lift into a V-up on one leg while reaching the ball toward the raised foot, then lower and alternate legs. Keep the movement controlled and avoid pulling on the neck.

Lie on your back with a medicine ball overhead and perform a single-leg V-up,. passing the ball under the raised leg or to the opposite hand as programmed. Lower with control and alternate sides. Keep the low back from excessive arching.

ff_medicine_ball_otis_up.description: Lie on your back holding a medicine ball overhead on the floor with legs extended. Sit up and lift the legs simultaneously to meet the ball in a V shape, then lower with control. Keep the ball path vertical and the abs driving the movement.

ff_slam_ball_otis_up.description: Lie on your back holding a slam ball overhead on the floor with legs extended. Sit up and lift the legs simultaneously to meet the ball in a V shape, then lower with control. Keep the ball path vertical and avoid pulling on the neck.

ff_ring_body_saw.description: Place the feet in rings and hold a forearm plank. Saw forward and back by protracting and retracting the shoulders while keeping the core tight. Control the rings so they do not swing wildly.

ff_stability_ball_kneeling_body_saw.description: Kneel with forearms on a stability ball in a plank. Roll the ball forward by extending the shoulders, then pull back using the core. Keep the hips stacked over the knees.

ff_stability_ball_kneeling_stir_the_pot.description: Kneel with forearms on a stability ball in a plank and move the forearms in small circles as if stirring a pot. Keep the hips stacked over the knees and the core braced against the ball movement. Make circles smooth and equal in both directions.

ff_medicine_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_hi.description: Kneel in a half-kneeling stance with the front foot flat. Hold the medicine ball at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_medicine_ball_isometric_split_squat_l.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee over the mid-foot. Hold the medicine ball at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_wall_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_high_c.description: Kneel in a half-kneeling stance with the front foot flat. Hold the wall ball at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_wall_ball_isometric_split_squat_low_t.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee over the mid-foot. Hold the wall ball at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_slam_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_high_c.description: Kneel tall in a half-kneeling stance holding a slam ball at the outside hip. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Keep the front foot flat and hips square.

ff_slam_ball_isometric_split_squat_low_t.description: Hold a slam ball at the hip in the bottom of a static split squat. Chop diagonally upward across the body while keeping the front knee stable over the mid-foot. Do not rotate from the low back.

ff_dumbbell_half_kneeling_low_to_high_ch.description: Kneel in a half-kneeling stance with the front foot flat. Hold the dumbbell at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_dumbbell_isometric_split_squat_low_to.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee over the mid-foot. Hold the dumbbell at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_plate_half_kneeling_low_to_high_chop.description: Kneel in a half-kneeling stance with the front foot flat. Hold the weight plate at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_plate_isometric_split_squat_low_to_hi.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee over the mid-foot. Hold the weight plate at the outside hip with both hands. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_wall_ball_body_saw.description: Hold a forearm plank with both feet on a wall ball against a smooth surface. Saw the body forward and back at the shoulders while keeping the core braced. Keep the ball pressed into the wall.

ff_single_arm_plate_turkish_sit_up.description: Lie on your back holding a weight plate locked out overhead with one arm. Roll up through a Turkish sit-up sequence to seated or tall kneeling while keeping the plate stacked over the shoulder, then reverse. Keep the eyes on the plate throughout.

ff_climbing_rope_pull_up.description: Hang from a climbing rope with an overhand grip and pull until the chin passes the top hand position. Lower with control without kipping. Squeeze the rope hard and keep the elbows driving down toward the ribs.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_leg_raise.description: Hang from a climbing rope with an overhand grip and raise the straight legs toward the hands by curling the pelvis. Lower slowly without swinging into the next rep. Keep the shoulders down away from the ears.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_toes_to_rope.description: Hang from a climbing rope and lift the toes toward the rope by posteriorly tilting the pelvis with minimal knee bend. Lower the legs under control without using momentum from the shoulders. Keep the grip tight on the rope.

ff_double_cable_chest_fly.description: Lie on a flat bench between two low cables with handles over the chest. Open the arms in a wide arc with slightly bent elbows, then squeeze the handles together over the chest. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_double_cable_high_to_low_chest_fly.description: Stand between high cable pulleys with handles at shoulder height. Sweep the arms down and together in a wide arc across the body, then return with control. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_double_cable_low_to_high_chest_fly.description: Stand between low cable pulleys with handles at hip height. Raise the arms up and together in a hugging arc, then lower with control. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_resistance_band_high_to_low_chest_fly.description: Anchor a resistance band high behind you and hold handles with arms wide. Bring the hands together in a hugging arc with soft elbows, then return with control. Stand in a staggered stance for balance.

ff_resistance_band_low_to_high_chest_fly.description: Anchor a resistance band low in front of you and hold handles with arms wide. Bring the hands together in a hugging arc with soft elbows, then return with control. Stand in a staggered stance for balance.

ff_cable_rope_isometric_split_squat_high.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee stable and a cable rope at the high outside shoulder. Chop diagonally down across the body toward the opposite hip, then return under control. Keep the front heel heavy and resist rotation from the low back.

ff_cable_rope_isometric_split_squat_low_.description: Hold the bottom of a split squat with the front knee over the mid-foot. Hold the rope at the outside hip with arms extended. Chop diagonally up across the body toward the opposite shoulder, then return to the hip under control. Rotate through the thoracic spine and keep the hips square.

ff_landmine_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel facing a landmine bar and hold the end with both hands at the chest. Roll forward extending the arms while keeping the hips extended, then pull back to start. Do not let the low back sag.

ff_single_arm_landmine_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel facing a landmine bar and hold the end with one hand at shoulder height. Roll the hand forward as the body extends, then pull back with the lat and core. Keep the hips extended and avoid twisting.

ff_slider_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel with both hands on slider discs shoulder-width apart. Slide forward into an extended plank, then pull back using the lats and core. Keep the hips extended throughout.

ff_slider_standing_rollout.description: Stand with both hands on slider discs shoulder-width and feet hip-width apart. Slide forward into a standing ab rollout as far as you can control, then pull back to stand. Keep the glutes tight and ribs down throughout.

ff_single_arm_slider_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel with one hand on a slider disc and the other hand planted. Slide the disc forward extending the arm while keeping the hips extended, then pull back. Avoid rotating the torso toward the sliding side.

ff_suspension_standing_rollout.description: Stand facing a suspension trainer holding both handles at chest height. Walk forward into a standing rollout as far as control allows, then walk back. Keep the body in one line from head to heels.

ff_single_arm_ring_standing_rollout.description: Stand facing a ring anchor with one hand on the ring at chest height. Lean forward into a single-arm standing rollout as far as you can control, then pull back. Keep the ring close to the midline.

ff_single_arm_slider_standing_rollout.description: Stand with one hand on a slider disc and feet hip-width. Slide the hand forward into a standing rollout as far as you can control, then pull back. Keep the glutes and core braced.

ff_single_arm_suspension_standing_rollou.description: Stand facing a suspension trainer with one handle at chest height. Walk forward into a single-arm standing rollout, then return under control. Do not let the shoulder shrug toward the ear.

ff_landmine_standing_rollout.description: Stand facing a landmine bar and hold the end with both hands at the chest. Roll forward into a standing ab rollout as far as control allows, then return. Keep the ribs down and glutes tight.

ff_single_arm_landmine_standing_rollout.description: Stand facing a landmine bar and hold the end in one hand at the chest. Roll the hand forward into a standing rollout as far as you can control, then pull back. Keep the glutes engaged to protect the low back.

ff_plate_hollow_body_flutter_kicks.description: Lie on your back in a hollow body hold with a plate pressed to the thighs or held overhead. Perform small controlled flutter kicks without letting the low back arch off the floor. Keep the ribs down and the abs engaged.

ff_superband_side_lying_hanging_hip_addu.description: Lie on your side near a low anchor with a superband looped around the top ankle and the bottom leg bent for support. Pull the top foot down toward the floor against band tension, then return with control. Keep the hips stacked.

ff_plate_side_lying_bent_knee_hip_abduct.description: Lie on your side with knees bent and a small plate resting on the top knee. Lift the top knee toward the ceiling against the plate weight, then lower slowly. Keep the feet together and pelvis stacked.

ff_bodyweight_side_lying_hip_abduction.description: Lie on your side with the bottom leg bent and the top leg straight. Lift the top leg toward the ceiling, leading with the heel, then lower under control. Do not rotate the toes toward the ceiling.

ff_bodyweight_extended_range_side_lying_.description: Lie on your side with the bottom leg bent for support and the top leg extended. Lift the top leg toward the ceiling through a full abduction range, then lower with control. Keep the toes facing forward, not up.

ff_bodyweight_side_lying_clamshell.description: Lie on your side with hips stacked, knees bent, and feet together. Lift the top knee while keeping the feet touching, then lower slowly. Keep the pelvis still and avoid rolling backward.

ff_bodyweight_kneeling_side_plank_clamsh.description: Set up in a side plank on the forearm with bottom knee bent and top knee bent in front. Lift the top knee against gravity while keeping the hips stacked, then lower with control. Do not roll the pelvis backward.

ff_double_cable_incline_bench_chest_fly.description: Lie on an incline bench between two low cables with handles over the chest. Open the arms in a wide arc with slightly bent elbows, then squeeze the handles together over the chest. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_double_cable_seated_chest_fly.description: Sit upright between two cables with handles at chest height and a tall torso. Open the arms in a wide arc with slightly bent elbows, then squeeze the handles together over the chest. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_double_cable_decline_bench_chest_fly.description: Lie on a decline bench between two high cables with handles over the chest. Open the arms in a wide arc with slightly bent elbows, then squeeze the handles together over the chest. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

ff_plate_overhead_carry.description: Press a weight plate overhead with both hands and walk for the prescribed distance with short controlled steps. Keep the biceps near the ears, ribs down, and glutes engaged. Reduce weight if the low back arches or the arms drift forward.

ff_slider_plank_jack.description: Start in a forearm or high plank with both feet on slider discs. Jump or slide the feet apart and together like a jumping jack while keeping the hips stable and shoulders over the elbows. Do not let the low back sag on the out position.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_plank.description: Place both feet in suspension straps and set up in a high plank on the hands. Hold a straight line from head to heels with the feet elevated behind you. Keep the glutes engaged and avoid piking the hips upward.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_forearm_plan.description: Place both feet in suspension straps and hold a forearm plank with elbows under the shoulders. Maintain a rigid line from head to heels without sagging the hips. Squeeze the glutes and quads to stabilize the elevated feet.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_side_plank.description: Place the top foot in a suspension strap and stack the hips in a side plank on the forearm or hand. Hold the body in a straight line without letting the hips drop or rotate forward. Keep the shoulder packed on the supporting arm.

ff_stability_ball_feet_elevated_plank.description: Place both feet on a stability ball and hold a high plank on the hands with shoulders over the wrists. Keep the core tight so the ball does not roll and the hips stay level. Avoid piking or sagging through the midsection.

ff_slider_sandbag_front_rack_reverse_lun.description: Front-rack a sandbag at the chest and place a slider under the back foot on a smooth floor. Slide the rear foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull back to stand on the front leg. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot and the elbows high.

ff_slider_sandbag_back_rack_reverse_lung.description: Set a sandbag across the upper back and place a slider under the back foot. Slide into a reverse lunge with a quiet back-knee hover, then return by pulling through the front heel. Keep the chest tall and core braced.

ff_cable_straight_bar_reverse_grip_front.description: Stand facing away from a low cable with a straight bar held behind the thighs in an underhand grip. Raise the bar forward to shoulder height with arms straight, then lower with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid swinging from the hips.

ff_ez_bar_reverse_grip_front_raise.description: Stand holding an EZ bar with an underhand grip at the thighs. Raise the bar forward to shoulder height with straight arms, then lower slowly. Keep the shoulders down and the torso still.

ff_sled_sprint.description: Attach a harness or handles to a sled and drive forward with sprint mechanics—high knee lift, aggressive arm drive, and forward lean. Push through the balls of the feet with short powerful steps. Use a load that still allows fast foot contacts.

1_arm_db_jerks.description: Stand with a dumbbell racked at one shoulder in a split or power stance. Dip slightly, drive with the legs, and jerk the dumbbell overhead, catching with a soft knee before standing. Keep the elbow tight on the dip and the bell stacked over the shoulder at lockout.

2_point_start.description: Set up in a two-point stance with one hand and one foot on the ground in a sprinter-ready position. On the cue, drive through the front foot and explode into the first powerful steps. Stay low with a forward shin angle and quick ground contacts.

2_to_1_broad_jump_land_2.description: Perform a broad jump from two feet and stick the landing on two feet with knees aligned over the toes. Reset posture before the next jump and use a distance you can land quietly. Swing the arms to assist takeoff without collapsing the chest.

2_way_shoulder_raise.description: Stand on one leg holding light dumbbells at the thighs. Raise one arm forward to shoulder height, lower, then raise the same arm laterally to shoulder height while balancing. Keep the standing knee soft and the torso still.

3_point_start.description: Set up in a three-point stance with both hands and one foot on the ground in a sprinter start. Drive out on the cue with aggressive knee lift and short, quick steps for the first few yards. Keep the hips low and the head neutral.

3_way_goblet_squat.description: Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell in a goblet grip at the chest. Squat to center, then to one side in a lateral shift, then the other side, completing one rep per direction as programmed. Keep the heels down and the chest tall in each position.

4_way_neck_stretch.description: Sit or stand tall and gently move the neck through flexion, extension, right lateral flexion, and left lateral flexion,. holding each stretch briefly. Move slowly without forcing range and keep the shoulders relaxed. Breathe steadily through each position.
