40_start.description: Start from a standing position 40 yards from the finish and accelerate on cue through maximal sprint effort for the prescribed distance. Gradually rise into upright sprint posture while maintaining quick foot strikes. Drive the knees and pump the arms aggressively.

60_start.description: Start from a standing position 60 yards from the finish and sprint on cue, building speed through the first third before holding top speed. Keep ground contacts under the hips and the torso slightly forward. Finish through the line without decelerating early.

90_90_stretch.description: Sit with the front leg bent at 90° in front of the hip and the back leg bent at 90° out to the side. Hinge forward over the front shin or rotate toward the back leg to stretch the hips, then switch sides. Keep both sit bones heavy toward the floor.

a_skip.description: Drive the knee up to hip height while skipping forward on the ball of the foot, striking the ground under the hips. Pump the opposite arm and keep the torso tall with a slight forward lean. Focus on quick, rhythmic contacts rather than long floating steps.

accelerate_to_back_pedal.description: Begin with a short forward acceleration for several yards, then transition smoothly into a controlled backpedal for the prescribed distance. Stay on the balls of the feet with short steps in both directions. Keep the hips low when changing direction.

alternating_bounds_vertical_focus.description: Push off one foot into a vertical bound and land on the opposite foot, sticking each landing before the next rep. Drive the knee up and swing the arms to maximize height with minimal forward travel. Land softly with the knee aligned over the toes.

alternating_leg_bounds.description: Bound forward alternately off each leg with exaggerated knee drive and arm swing. Cover distance with each bound while landing under control on the opposite foot. Keep the torso tall and avoid collapsing inward at the knee.

alternating_staggered_plyo_push_up.description: Set up in a push-up with one hand forward and one hand back. Lower the chest, then explosively press up and switch hand positions in the air before landing softly. Keep the core tight so the hips do not sag.

ankle_cars.description: Sit or half-kneel and slowly circle the ankle through its full range in one direction, then reverse. Move segment by segment without rushing and keep the rest of the leg still. Stop before any pinching or pain.

aplex_scrotch_stretch_with_without_band.description: Lie on your back and place one ankle on the opposite knee to open the hip, optionally adding a band pull for assistance. Gently draw the bottom leg toward the chest until a stretch is felt in the hip, then switch sides. Keep the low back relaxed on the floor.

approach_box_jump.description: Take a short approach of two to three steps, plant on two feet, and jump onto a plyo box with a soft landing. Stand tall on the box, step down under control, and reset the approach. Use a box height you can land quietly on.

approach_hurdle_jump.description: Build speed with a short approach, then take off from one or two feet to clear a hurdle and land softly on the other side. Reset and repeat with consistent hurdle clearance without clipping the bar. Keep the knees up and the torso tall over the hurdle.

approach_single_leg_vertical_jump.description: Use a short approach into a single-leg takeoff for a maximal vertical jump, swinging the arms to assist. Stick the landing on the takeoff leg with the knee aligned over the toes. Reset fully between attempts.

approach_tuck_jump.description: Take a short approach and explode into a tuck jump, pulling the knees toward the chest at peak height. Land softly on two feet with knees aligned and hips back. Reset posture before the next rep.

approach_tuck_jump_to_low_squat.description: Approach into a tuck jump and land immediately into a low squat with the chest tall. Drive out of the squat to stand before resetting the approach. Keep the landing quiet and the knees tracking over the toes.

approach_tuck_jump_to_split_lunge.description: Approach into a tuck jump and land in a split lunge with the front knee over the ankle. Absorb the landing, stand, and reset for the next approach. Avoid letting the back knee crash into the floor.

approach_vertical_jump.description: Use a short approach of two to three steps and plant to jump vertically for maximum height. Swing the arms and extend fully at takeoff, then land softly on two feet. Reset between reps to maintain jump quality.

arm_pump_drill.description: Stand in an athletic posture and pump the arms quickly through a sprint range of motion without traveling forward. Keep the elbows bent near 90° and drive hands cheek to hip. Stay relaxed through the shoulders.

arms_2.description: Perform the prescribed arm-care or mobility sequence for the shoulders and elbows using controlled range and light tension. Move deliberately through each position without forcing end range. Stop if any joint pain appears.

ascending_descending_lateral_shuffle.description: Shuffle laterally in a low athletic stance for the prescribed distance, then change level or direction as cued. Keep the feet wide enough to stay balanced and the chest over the toes. Do not cross the feet.

ascending_knee_jump.description: From a low squat, drive through the floor to jump vertically while driving the knees upward. Land softly and absorb into the next squat or reset to start. Keep the chest up and avoid collapsing forward.

ascending_skater_jumps.description: Leap laterally from one foot to the other, landing in a soft single-leg athletic stance with the free leg behind for balance. Cover progressively greater distance only if each landing stays quiet and stable. Keep the chest over the landing foot.

b_skip_with_power.description: Skip forward with a circular pawing action of the leg—knee up, then foot pulled down under the hip—with a powerful push off the ground. Pump the opposite arm and stay tall through the torso. Emphasize active foot strike under the body.

back_bend.description: Stand with feet hip-width and reach the arms overhead. Arch backward through the thoracic spine and hips only as far as control allows, then return to standing. Keep weight evenly distributed and avoid collapsing into the low back.

back_pedal_ball_drops.description: Backpedal while a partner or coach drops balls that you react to and retrieve. Stay on the balls of the feet with short backpedal steps and eyes up. Change direction quickly without crossing the feet.

back_pedal_to_accelerate.description: Backpedal for the prescribed distance, then plant and explode forward into a short acceleration. Keep the hips low during the transition and the first steps powerful. Use short, quick contacts in both directions.

back_squat.description: Set a barbell across the upper back, stand with feet shoulder-width, and sit the hips down until the thighs are near parallel. Drive through the whole foot to stand, keeping the chest tall and knees tracking over the toes. Brace the core before each rep.

backpack_stretch.description: Wear a lightly loaded backpack and gently lean forward or side to side to stretch the upper back and shoulders. Keep the movement slow and the load light. Stop before any shoulder pinching.

backpedal_to_hip_flip.description: Backpedal on cue, then plant and open the hips into a quick change-of-direction sprint or flip movement as prescribed. Stay low through the transition with knees bent and eyes up. Push off the outside foot to reaccelerate.

backwards_sled_drag.description: Face away from a loaded sled, grip the straps, and step backward with strong hip extension on each leg. Keep the arms extended and the spine neutral as the sled follows. Use a load that allows smooth steps without leaning.

backwards_toss.description: Stand with a light medicine ball at the chest and toss it backward over the head using a squat-to-throw motion. Extend the hips and arms together, then reset to catch or retrieve the ball. Keep the toss controlled to a safe landing area.

ball_drops.description: Hold an athletic ready position while a partner drops balls from varying heights for you to react and catch or field. Stay on the balls of the feet with knees bent and eyes on the ball. Move through the hips to intercept without stiff upright posture.

band_ankle_stretch.description: Loop a band around the ball of the foot with the anchor low in front of you and sit or lie with the leg extended. Gently pull the toes toward the shin until a calf or ankle stretch is felt, then release. Keep the knee straight and movement pain-free.

band_assisted_single_leg_jumps.description: Loop a band under the arms or hips from a high anchor and perform single-leg vertical jumps with assistance. Drive through the standing leg and land softly with the knee aligned over the toes. Use only enough band tension to assist, not sling-shot the body.

band_assisted_tuck_jumps.description: With a band under the arms from a high anchor, perform tuck jumps pulling the knees toward the chest at peak height. Land softly on two feet and reset before the next jump. Reduce band assistance as jump height improves.

band_corkscrew_row.description: Anchor a band at chest height and row with one arm while rotating slightly through the thoracic spine, then return under control. Keep the shoulder down and elbow close on the pull. Alternate sides or complete one side before switching.

band_dynamic_trunk_stability_circuit.description: Move through the prescribed banded anti-rotation and bracing positions—such as Pallof holds, chops,. or walks—while keeping the ribs stacked over the pelvis. Resist the band pulling you off line and breathe steadily. Switch directions as cued.

band_external_rotation.description: Anchor a band at elbow height with the working elbow bent at 90° and tucked to the side. Rotate the forearm outward against band tension, then return slowly. Keep the elbow pinned to the ribs throughout.

band_face_pull_external_rotation.description: Anchor a band at face height and pull toward the face with elbows high, then externally rotate the forearms at the end of the pull. Squeeze the upper back and keep the ribs down. Return with control without shrugging.

band_facepulls.description: Anchor a band at face height and pull toward the upper chest with elbows wide and shoulder blades squeezed together. Pause briefly at end range, then extend the arms forward with control. Keep the wrists neutral and avoid leaning back.

band_glute_bridge_with_abduction.description: Place a miniband just above the knees and lie on your back with knees bent. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, then press the knees outward against the band at the top. Lower the hips without letting the knees collapse inward.

band_goodmorning.description: Anchor a band under the feet and loop it across the upper back. Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend, then stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back long and avoid rounding at the bottom.

band_internal_rotation.description: Anchor a band at elbow height and stand with the working elbow bent to 90° at your side. Rotate the forearm inward against the band, then return slowly. Keep the elbow pinned to the ribs and avoid shrugging.

band_lat_pulldowns.description: Anchor the band overhead and kneel or sit with arms extended upward. Pull the band down toward the chest by driving elbows down, then return with control. Keep the chest up and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

band_pancake_stretch.description: Sit in a straddle with a band looped around both feet and held in the hands. Hinge forward from the hips while keeping the spine long, using light band tension to deepen the stretch. Breathe steadily and stop before the low back rounds.

band_piston_sprint.description: Anchor a band behind you at hip height and hold handles at the shoulders in an athletic stance. Drive alternating knees up quickly against the band resistance, pumping the arms in sync. Stay tall through the chest and avoid leaning back.

band_pistons.description: Anchor the band overhead and alternate pressing one arm up while the other lowers in a piston rhythm. Keep the core braced and the band taut through each rep. Avoid leaning to either side as the arms switch.

band_press.description: Stand on the center of a band and hold the ends at shoulder height. Brace the core and press overhead to straight arms, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back at lockout.

band_push_up.description: Loop a band across the upper back and hold the ends under the hands in a push-up position. Lower the chest toward the floor, then press up against the band tension. Keep the body in one line and avoid sagging at the hips.

band_resisted_pogo_jumps.description: Anchor a band at hip height around the waist with handles fixed behind you. Perform quick pogo hops with stiff ankles and minimal knee bend, spending little time on the ground. Stay tall and avoid letting the knees collapse inward.

band_resisted_squat_jump.description: Stand on a band with handles at the shoulders or hips. Squat to a controlled depth, then explode upward into a jump, landing softly with knees over toes. Reset each rep instead of rebounding if form breaks down.

band_resisted_staggered_stance_jumps.description: Stand in a staggered stance with a band adding resistance at the hips. Dip and jump, switching legs in the air or on landing as programmed, and absorb quietly through the front foot. Keep the torso stable and avoid drifting sideways.

band_rows.description: Anchor the band at chest height and hold both ends with arms extended. Row the handles toward the ribs by squeezing the shoulder blades, then return with control. Keep the torso still and avoid shrugging at the finish.

band_scarecrows.description: Anchor a light band and hold it with elbows bent to 90° at shoulder height. Externally rotate the forearms up, then press overhead, reverse the press, and rotate back down. Use a band you can control without arching the back.

band_shoulder_dislocations.description: Hold a band with a wide grip in front of the thighs. Keeping arms straight, sweep the band overhead and behind the hips in a smooth arc, then return. Reduce grip width if the shoulders pinch or the low back arches.

band_snatch.description: Stand on a band with a wide grip on the ends at mid-shin. Extend the hips and knees explosively and punch the arms overhead, catching with soft knees. Keep the band path close to the body and avoid muscle-cleaning with the arms alone.

band_static_trunk_stability_circuit.description: Anchor a band at chest height and hold it with both hands at the sternum in an athletic stance. Press or hold against the band while resisting rotation and extension through the trunk. Keep the glutes engaged and breathe steadily through each hold or rep.

band_tricep_extensions.description: Anchor the band overhead and face away with elbows bent behind the head. Extend the elbows to straighten the arms against the band, then return slowly. Keep the upper arms still and avoid flaring the elbows forward.

band_twists.description: Anchor the band to one side at chest height and stand sideways with hands at the sternum. Rotate through the thoracic spine against the band, then return to center. Turn from the mid-back and avoid twisting from the low back.

band_windmills.description: Stand on a band with one end pressed overhead in a locked arm and feet angled slightly away from the load side. Push the hips back and slide the free hand down the lead leg while keeping eyes on the top hand. Drive the hips forward to stand and keep the overhead arm vertical.

banded_hamstring_curl.description: Lie face down and loop a band around the ankles, anchoring the other end to a post. Curl the heels toward the glutes against the band, squeezing the hamstrings, then lower slowly. Keep the hips pressed to the floor and avoid lifting the chest.

banded_hip_circle_squats.description: Place a hip circle band just above the knees and stand with feet hip to shoulder width. Squat down while pushing the knees out against the band, then stand by driving through the whole foot. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

banded_hip_flexor_stretch.description: Loop a band around one thigh and anchor it behind you at hip height. Kneel in a half-kneeling lunge and let the band pull the hip into extension while squeezing the glute on that side. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the low back.

banded_kb_swing.description: Stand on the band with feet hip width and hold the kettlebell with the band adding tension at the bottom. Hinge and swing the bell to chest or eye height using the hips, then return under control. Keep the arms relaxed and avoid lifting with the shoulders alone.

banded_lat_stretch.description: Hold a band overhead with both hands and step back until the arms are straight and the lats stretch. Lean slightly to one side or keep square based on the prescribed side. Breathe into the stretch and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

banded_lying_hamstring_stretch.description: Lie on your back and loop a band around one foot, keeping the leg straight. Gently pull the leg toward the chest until you feel a hamstring stretch, then hold and breathe. Keep the opposite leg long on the floor and avoid bouncing.

banded_pec_stretch.description: Anchor a band at shoulder height behind you and hold the handle with the arm extended to the side. Step forward until you feel a chest stretch, keeping the shoulder blade set. Hold steady pressure and avoid rotating the torso away excessively.

banded_pull_aparts.description: Hold a band at chest height with arms extended. Pull the band apart by squeezing the shoulder blades, then return with control. Keep a slight elbow bend and avoid shrugging the shoulders up.

banded_tkes.description: Anchor a band behind you and loop it around the back of one knee in a standing split stance. Extend the knee against the band by squeezing the quad, then return slowly. Keep the hips level and avoid leaning back.

barbell_floor_press.description: Lie on the floor with knees bent and grip a barbell over the chest. Lower until the upper arms rest on the floor, pause briefly, then press to lockout. Keep the shoulder blades pulled back and avoid bouncing the elbows off the floor.

barbell_incline_press.description: Lie on an incline bench with eyes under the bar and feet planted. Lower the bar to the upper chest with elbows slightly tucked, then press to straight arms. Keep the wrists stacked and hips on the bench throughout.

barbell_split_squat.description: Rest the barbell across the upper back and set the rear foot on a bench in a split stance. Lower until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front knee tracking over the mid-foot.

bb_iso_squats.description: Set a barbell on the back in a squat stance and lower to a chosen depth. Hold the bottom position isometrically for the prescribed time while keeping the chest up and knees tracking over the toes. Stand smoothly when the hold ends without losing midline tension.

bb_oscillatory_low_squats.description: Hold a barbell in a low squat position and make small rhythmic pulses up and down through a short range. Keep the heels down and the torso braced throughout the oscillations. Use a load that allows smooth pulses without the knees caving.

bear_renegade_rows.description: Hold two weights in a bear crawl stance with knees hovering. Row one bell toward the hip while pressing the other hand into the floor, then alternate. Keep the hips square and avoid twisting as the elbows bend.

bear_toe_touches.description: From a bear crawl position, lift one hand to tap the opposite foot under the body, then switch sides. Keep the knees hovering and the core braced through each reach. Move with control instead of rushing and losing hip height.

bench_dips.description: Place the hands on a bench behind you with fingers forward and legs extended or bent. Lower until the upper arms are near parallel to the floor, then press back up by straightening the elbows. Keep the shoulders down and avoid sinking into the shoulder joint.

bench_lat_mobility.description: Kneel beside a bench and place one elbow on the pad with the arm bent. Sit the hips back and let the chest melt toward the floor to open the lat and thoracic spine. Breathe into the stretch and avoid forcing the shoulder into pain.

bench_pin_press.description: Set a barbell on pins at chest height in a power rack and lie on the bench beneath it. Press from a dead stop on the pins to lockout, then lower back to the pins under control. Keep the feet planted and avoid bouncing off the pins.

bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with eyes under the bar, feet planted, and shoulder blades pulled back. Lower the bar to the mid-chest with elbows slightly tucked, then press to lockout. Keep the wrists stacked and hips on the bench throughout.

bend.description: Stand tall with feet hip width and soften the knees. Hinge at the hips by pushing them back while keeping the spine long, then return by squeezing the glutes. Keep the shins relatively vertical and avoid rounding the upper back.

bent_over_row.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and grip the barbell with hands shoulder width. Pull the bar toward the lower ribs by driving elbows back, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the core braced and avoid jerking with the hips.

bicep_curl.description: Stand with dumbbells at the sides and palms facing forward. Curl the weights toward the shoulders without swinging the torso, then lower until the elbows are straight. Keep the elbows pinned at the sides.

bicep_stretch.description: Extend one arm along a wall or rack at shoulder height with the palm up. Turn the body gently away until you feel a biceps stretch, then hold and breathe. Keep the shoulder down and avoid forcing painful range.

bird_dog.description: Start on all fours with hands under shoulders and knees under hips. Extend the opposite arm and leg long while keeping the hips level, then return and switch sides. Brace the core so the low back does not arch.

bird_dog_row.description: Hold a weight in one hand in a bird dog position with the opposite leg extended. Row the weight toward the hip without rotating the trunk, then lower under control. Keep the hips square and the extended leg at hip height.

blackburns.description: Lie face down with arms in a Y, T, or W shape as prescribed. Lift the arms slightly off the floor by squeezing the upper back and rear delts, then lower slowly. Keep the forehead down and avoid shrugging into the neck.

board_press.description: Place boards on the chest and lower the barbell to the boards with control, then press to lockout. Use the partial range to overload lockout strength while keeping shoulder blades set. Do not bounce the bar off the boards.

bottoms_up_waited_walk.description: Hold a kettlebell bottoms-up at shoulder height with the elbow tucked and walk prescribed steps. Keep the wrist stacked over the elbow and the ribs down with each step. Reduce weight or distance if the bell wobbles toward the face.

bound_to_sprint.description: Perform a short bound series into an immediate acceleration sprint over the prescribed distance. Transition from elastic hops to upright sprinting without standing tall too early. Drive the knees and arms aggressively once sprinting begins.

bounds.description: Drive off one leg into a long horizontal bound, landing on the opposite foot and continuing rhythmically. Absorb each landing with a soft knee and stable hip. Keep the torso tall and avoid collapsing inward on contact.

box_jumps.description: Stand an arm's length from a sturdy box with feet hip width. Dip, swing the arms, and jump onto the box, landing softly with the whole foot on the platform. Step down under control instead of rebounding if fatigue builds.

box_squat.description: Sit back to a box with a barbell on the upper back, pausing lightly without relaxing the core. Drive through the mid-foot to stand, keeping the shins more vertical than a free squat. Do not rock or bounce off the box.

bretzel_stretch.description: Lie on your side and reach the top knee toward the floor behind you while holding the bottom ankle toward the glutes. Rotate the thoracic spine gently to open the hip flexors and quads. Hold steady pressure and avoid forcing the knee to the floor.

broad_box_jump.description: Stand facing a box and perform a broad jump onto the platform, landing with both feet fully on the box. Stick the landing with knees over toes before stepping down. Use a box height that allows a quiet, balanced landing.

broad_jump_with_plates_2.description: Hold light plates at the sides and perform a standing broad jump for maximal distance. Swing the arms and drive the hips forward on takeoff, then land softly with knees bent. Keep the torso braced and avoid collapsing forward on landing.

broad_to_hurdle_jump.description: Perform a broad jump immediately into a hurdle jump over the prescribed obstacle. Land the broad jump with stable feet, then transition into the vertical hurdle clearance without pausing too long. Clear the hurdle with knees tucked and land softly on the other side.

broad_toss.description: Hold a medicine ball at the chest, dip through the hips, and throw the ball forward for distance. Follow through with the arms and hips while keeping the feet planted until release. Avoid leaning back before the throw.

buddy_hamstring_curl.description: Kneel with ankles secured under pads or a partner holding the feet. Keep the hips extended and lower the torso toward the floor using the hamstrings, then pull back up with control. Keep the body in a straight line from knees to shoulders.

build_up_sprint.description: Start at a submaximal speed and build to full sprint speed over the prescribed distance or time. Stay relaxed in the shoulders while increasing stride length and frequency. Avoid standing upright too early in the acceleration.

bulgarian_split_squat_jumps.description: Place the rear foot on a bench and hold load as prescribed in a split squat. Dip and explode into a jump off the front leg, landing softly and stabilizing before the next rep. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot and avoid pushing off the back foot.

bulgarian_split_squats.description: Rest the rear foot on a bench behind you with the front foot far enough forward to lower straight down. Bend the front knee until the thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot.

burpee_broad_jump.description: Drop to the floor for a burpee with chest and thighs contacting, then stand and immediately perform a broad jump. Land softly with knees bent and reset before the next rep if needed. Keep the core tight on the floor portion to avoid sagging hips.

butt_kick_run.description: Run in place or forward with quick steps, kicking the heels up toward the glutes. Stay tall through the chest and land under the hips on the balls of the feet. Avoid leaning back or reaching the feet too far forward.

butterfly.description: Sit with the soles of the feet together and knees opened to the sides. Hold the feet and sit tall as you let the knees drop toward the floor with gentle pressure. Breathe steadily and avoid forcing the knees down with the hands.

cable_anti_rotation.description: Set a cable at chest height and hold the handle at the sternum with both hands. Press the handle straight out without letting the torso rotate toward the stack, then return under control. Brace the glutes and keep the feet rooted.

cable_pull_throughs.description: Attach a rope to a low cable between the legs and face away from the stack. Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend, then drive the hips forward to stand while the rope pulls through. Squeeze the glutes at the top and keep the back neutral.

cable_rows.description: Set a cable at mid-torso height and sit or stand with a neutral spine. Pull the handle toward the ribs by driving elbows back, then extend the arms with control. Keep the shoulders down and avoid rocking the torso.

cable_squat_chop.description: Set a cable high or low and hold the handle with both hands at one hip. Squat while rotating the handle across the body to the opposite hip, then return through center. Turn from the hips and thoracic spine together and keep the arms long.

cable_woodchops.description: Set a cable at high or low height and stand sideways to the stack. Pull the handle diagonally across the body by rotating through the hips and thoracic spine, then return slowly. Keep the arms straight-ish and avoid pulling with the shoulders alone.

cactus_stretch.description: Stand with the upper back on a wall and elbows bent to 90° against the wall. Slide the arms up and down the wall while keeping the ribs down and the low back neutral. Stop if the shoulders pinch or the back arches off the wall.

carioca_run.description: Run sideways crossing one foot in front and then behind the other while staying low in an athletic stance. Pump the arms opposite the legs and keep the hips facing the direction of travel. Move smoothly before adding speed.

clap_push_ups.description: Lower the chest in a push-up, then explode up so the hands leave the floor and clap before landing. Re-absorb the landing with soft elbows and a braced core. Reset rhythm if the hips sag or the clap gets sloppy.

close_grip_bench_press.description: Lie on a bench with a shoulder-width or slightly narrower grip on the bar. Lower to the lower chest with elbows tucked, then press to lockout. Keep the shoulder blades set and wrists straight over the elbows.

close_grip_partial_rep_chin_up.description: Hang with an underhand close grip and pull through a partial range at the top of the chin-up. Lower under control to the bottom position each rep or as prescribed for the partial. Keep the shoulders down and avoid kipping.

clubbell_lunges.description: Hold a clubbell in the order position and step into a lunge while arcing the bell along the prescribed path. Drive through the front foot to return to stand without losing the club path. Keep the core braced and use a light bell until the arc stays smooth.

concentration_curls.description: Sit on a bench and brace the working elbow against the inside of the knee with a dumbbell in hand. Curl the weight toward the shoulder without moving the upper arm, then lower slowly. Keep the torso still and avoid swinging.

contralateral_bss_and_goblet.description: Hold a kettlebell in the opposite hand from the front foot in a rear-foot-elevated split squat. Lower until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the bell tight to the chest and the torso upright.

copenhagens.description: Set up in a side plank with the top leg on a bench and the bottom leg hanging. Lift the hips and hold, or adduct the bottom leg up under control. Keep the body long and avoid rolling the chest toward the floor.

cossack_squat.description: Stand with feet wide and shift into one side squat while the opposite leg stays long with the toe up. Sit into the hip of the bending leg, then drive back to center and alternate sides. Keep the heel of the working leg down if mobility allows.

couch_stretch.description: Place one shin vertically against a wall with the knee on a pad and the other foot forward in a lunge. Tuck the pelvis and squeeze the glute on the back-leg side to open the hip flexor. Breathe steadily and avoid arching the low back.

couch_stretch_with_hamstring_reach.description: Set up in a couch stretch with the rear shin on the wall, then reach the same-side hand toward the front foot to add hamstring tension. Keep the pelvis tucked and the glute engaged on the wall side. Move slowly into the reach and avoid rounding the spine.

crossover_bounds.description: Bound laterally by pushing off one leg and landing on the other, crossing the body line with each contact. Absorb quietly and immediately push into the next bound. Stay low in the hips and keep the chest over the landing foot.

crossover_run.description: Sprint or run with the feet crossing in front of and behind the body along a lateral path. Stay low with quick ground contacts and pump the arms. Keep the hips facing the direction of travel.

crossover_step_up.description: Stand beside a box and step across the body onto the platform with the near foot. Drive through the whole foot to stand tall on the box, then step down under control. Keep the knee tracking over the second toe.

crouching_start.description: Begin in a low crouch with one hand forward and the opposite foot back. On the cue, drive out into a sprint for the prescribed distance. Push aggressively through the front leg and stay low for the first few steps.

cuban_press.description: Stand with dumbbells at shoulder height, elbows bent to 90°. Externally rotate, press overhead, reverse the press, and rotate back down in a smooth sequence. Use light weight and pain-free range.

curtsy_lunge.description: Stand tall and step one leg behind and across into a curtsy lunge, lowering until the front thigh is near parallel. Press through the front foot to return to center. Keep the hips level and avoid collapsing the front knee inward.

db_bb_iso_split_squats.description: Hold dumbbells or a barbell in a split stance and lower to the bottom of a split squat. Hold the isometric position for the prescribed time with the front knee over the mid-foot. Stand smoothly without losing balance or knee alignment.

db_bb_oscillatory_split_squats.description: Hold load in a split squat and pulse rhythmically through a small range at the bottom. Keep the torso braced and the front heel down during the oscillations. Use a load that allows smooth pulses without the knee caving.

db_bent_over_row.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back and let the dumbbells hang at arm's length. Row both bells toward the hips, squeezing the shoulder blades, then lower under control. Keep the neck neutral and avoid jerking with the hips.

db_chest_supported_y_raise.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with light dumbbells hanging. Raise the arms in a Y shape with thumbs up, squeezing the upper back, then lower slowly. Keep the ribs on the pad and avoid shrugging into the neck.

db_eccentric_release_box_jump.description: Stand on a box, step off to land on the floor absorbing the impact, then immediately rebound onto the box. Focus on a quiet landing and a quick triple extension on the jump up. Step down between reps if rebound quality fades.

db_front_raise.description: Stand with dumbbells at the thighs and arms straight. Raise the bells forward to shoulder height with control, then lower slowly. Keep the ribs down and avoid swinging the hips.

db_hex_press.description: Lie on a bench holding two dumbbells pressed together in a neutral grip over the chest. Lower to the chest keeping the bells touching, then press up to lockout. Keep the wrists stacked and elbows at roughly 45°.

db_larsen_press.description: Lie on a bench with legs extended off the end and feet hovering while pressing dumbbells from the chest. Press to lockout without leg drive, then lower under control. Keep the low back neutral and avoid flaring the ribs.

db_neutral_press.description: Lie on a bench with dumbbells at the chest in a neutral grip. Press up until the arms are straight and the bells meet over the chest, then lower with control. Keep the shoulder blades pulled back on the bench.

db_oscillatory_bulgarian_split_squats.description: Hold dumbbells in a rear-foot-elevated split squat and pulse through a short range at the bottom. Keep the front knee over the mid-foot and the torso tall during the oscillations. Reduce load if the rear foot slips or the knee caves.

db_pullovers.description: Lie on a bench holding one dumbbell with both hands over the chest. Lower the bell in an arc behind the head until the lats stretch, then pull back over the chest. Keep a soft elbow bend and avoid arching the low back excessively.

db_rdl.description: Stand with dumbbells in front of the thighs and knees softly bent. Push the hips back until the bells skim the legs and hamstrings load, then stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back long and the lats engaged.

db_snap_downs.description: Start tall on the balls of the feet, then quickly drop into an athletic quarter squat with hands ready. Absorb quietly and immediately rebound to tall posture or into the next drill. Keep the knees over the toes and the chest forward.

dead_bugs.description: Lie on your back with arms up and hips and knees at 90°. Lower the opposite arm and leg toward the floor while keeping the low back gently pressed down, then return and alternate. Move slowly enough that the ribs do not flare.

dead_hangs.description: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip, arms long and shoulders relaxed but not fully shrugged. Hold for time while breathing steadily and keeping the ribs down. Exit the hang if grip fails or shoulder discomfort appears.

dead_leg_run.description: Sprint or run with one leg held fixed in a high-knee or extended position while the other leg drives normally. Stay tall and land under the hips on the moving leg. Use for drill tempo work rather than max speed if balance is limited.

deadlift.description: Stand with the bar over midfoot, hinge to grip, and brace the core. Push the floor away while keeping the bar close to the legs, then stand tall by driving the hips forward. Keep the lats tight and avoid letting the hips rise before the bar leaves the floor.

decel_alternating_sprinter_step_ups.description: Face a box and alternate explosive step-ups with a soft landing on top, emphasizing braking on descent. Drive through the whole foot on the way up and control the step down. Keep the knee over the mid-foot and the torso tall.

decel_series.description: Perform the prescribed deceleration drill—such as stops, cuts, or landings—from an approach sprint or shuffle. Sink the hips on each stop and keep the knees aligned over the toes. Reset before the next rep if mechanics break down.

decel_step_ups.description: Step up onto a box with power, then lower slowly back to the floor over two to three seconds. Keep the whole foot on the box and the knee tracking over the toes during the descent. Avoid dropping off the box on the way down.

decline_push_ups.description: Place the feet on a bench and hands on the floor in a push-up position. Lower the chest toward the floor, then press back to straight arms. Keep the body in one line and avoid piking at the hips.

deficit_deadlift.description: Stand on a low platform with the bar over midfoot and grip as in a conventional deadlift. Push the floor away while keeping the bar close through the longer range, then lock out the hips. Use a deficit you can control without rounding the back.

depth_drop.description: Step off a box to the floor and land on both feet with soft knees and hips absorbing the impact. Stick the landing for a moment before the next jump or sprint if programmed. Keep the knees over the toes and avoid collapsing inward.

diagonal_band_pull_aparts.description: Hold a band at chest height with arms extended on a slight diagonal. Pull apart along that diagonal by squeezing the upper back, then return with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging.

dimmel_deadlift.description: Use a snatch grip on the bar and perform rapid hip extensions with a small knee bend, bouncing the bar at the hips as in a RDL rhythm. Keep the back neutral and the bar close to the legs. Use light to moderate load focused on hip speed.

dips.description: Support yourself on parallel bars with shoulders down and elbows back. Lower until the upper arms are near parallel to the floor, then press back to straight arms. Keep the torso slightly forward for chest emphasis or upright for triceps.

double_broad_jump.description: Perform two broad jumps in succession, landing the first jump stable before launching the second. Drive the arms and hips on each takeoff and absorb with soft knees. Mark distance only when both landings stay balanced.

dowel_lat_stretch_rockers.description: Hold a dowel overhead with a wide grip and gently rock side to side to stretch the lats. Keep the ribs down and the arms straight as you shift. Stop if the shoulders pinch or the low back arches.

dowel_rod_cue.description: Hold a dowel along the spine touching the head, upper back, and tailbone while practicing the paired movement. Move through the drill while keeping the three contact points as the dowel cues alignment. Use slow tempo until the pattern stays consistent.

dowel_rotations.description: Hold a dowel across the upper back as in a back squat and rotate through the thoracic spine within a pain-free range. Keep the hips facing forward and the knees quiet. Move smoothly without forcing end range.

downward_dog.description: Start in a high plank and lift the hips up and back into an inverted V. Press the chest toward the thighs while reaching the heels toward the floor with straight arms. Keep the spine long and avoid collapsing between the shoulder blades.

dragon_flags.description: Lie on a bench and grip behind the head while lifting the entire body rigid from shoulders to feet. Lower slowly toward the bench without breaking at the hips, then lift back up using the abs. Scale with negatives if full reps are not available.

drop_push_ups.description: Start in a push-up, drop the chest quickly to the floor, then explosively press back up. Keep the hips in line with the shoulders and absorb the drop with control. Reduce intensity if the low back sags.

drop_step_medball_side_toss.description: Take a lateral drop step and immediately throw a medicine ball across the body to a wall or partner. Load through the back hip and rotate through the thoracic spine on the throw. Catch or reset the ball before the next rep.

dumbbell_alternating_bench_press.description: Lie on a bench with dumbbells at the chest. Press one arm to lockout while the other stays at the chest, then alternate sides with control. Keep the shoulder blades set and avoid rotating the torso.

dumbbell_alternating_neutral_bench_press.description: Lie on a bench with dumbbells in a neutral grip at the chest. Press one bell up while the other remains down, alternating with steady tempo. Keep the wrists stacked and elbows at roughly 45°.

dumbbell_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells at the chest and feet planted. Press both bells to lockout over the chest, then lower until the upper arms are near parallel to the floor. Keep the shoulder blades pulled back on the bench.

dumbbell_curls.description: Stand with dumbbells at the sides and palms forward. Curl both bells toward the shoulders without swinging the torso, then lower until the elbows are straight. Keep the elbows pinned at the sides.

dumbbell_floor_press.description: Lie on the floor with knees bent and dumbbells at the chest. Press to lockout, lower until the upper arms touch the floor, pause briefly, then press again. Keep the shoulder blades pulled back throughout.

dumbbell_incline_press.description: Lie on an incline bench with dumbbells at the upper chest. Press to lockout over the upper chest, then lower with control. Keep the feet planted and avoid flaring the ribs at the top.

dumbbell_military_press.description: Stand or sit with dumbbells at shoulder height and core braced. Press overhead to straight arms without leaning back, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

dumbbell_split_squat.description: Hold dumbbells at the sides and set a long split stance with the rear foot on the toes. Lower until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot.

dump_the_buckets.description: Hold a medicine ball overhead and slam or chop it diagonally toward the floor as if emptying buckets, using the hips and core. Reset the ball between reps and keep the feet rooted. Avoid rounding the spine on the down swing.

dynamic_frog.description: Sit in a deep squat with feet flat if possible and hands inside the knees. Pulse gently in the bottom position or rock side to side to open the hips. Keep the heels down and the chest tall.

dynamic_overhead_side_toss.description: Hold a medicine ball overhead and throw it laterally to a wall or partner using a side bend and hip drive. Catch or retrieve the ball and repeat to the other side. Keep the feet planted until release.

dynamic_side_toss.description: Stand sideways to a wall with a medicine ball at the hip. Rotate and throw the ball horizontally to the wall, absorbing the catch on the return. Drive from the back hip and keep the arms long.

dynamic_single_arm_broad_toss.description: Hold a medicine ball in one hand at the chest, dip through the hips, and throw the ball forward for distance. Follow through with the same-side hip and arm. Keep the feet planted until release and avoid leaning back.

dynamic_soccer_toss.description: Hold a medicine ball and throw it with a soccer-pass motion using hip rotation and a stiff front foot. Aim at a wall or partner and reset between reps. Keep the chest over the front foot through the throw.

dynamic_warm_up.description: Move through the prescribed dynamic warm-up sequence—such as leg swings, inchworms, or lunges—with controlled tempo. Cover the full comfortable range without bouncing at end range. Stay tall and breathe steadily through transitions.

eccentric_chin_ups.description: Jump or step to the top of a chin-up position with the chin over the bar. Lower yourself slowly over three to five seconds until the arms are long, then reset. Keep the shoulders down and avoid collapsing at the bottom.

elevated_pigeon.description: Place the front shin on a box in a pigeon position with the back leg extended. Fold forward or sit tall to stretch the front hip, breathing steadily. Keep the front ankle neutral and avoid knee pain on the lead leg.

elevated_reverse_lunge.description: Stand on a low platform and step one foot back off the edge into a reverse lunge. Lower until the back knee hovers, then drive through the front foot to stand on the box. Keep the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot.

explosive_band_push_up.description: Loop a band over the upper back and perform an explosive push-up, launching the hands off the floor at the top. Land with soft elbows and a braced core. Reduce band tension if landing control is lost.

extension.description: Stand or lie with elbows fixed at the sides or overhead. Straighten the elbows to full extension, then bend back under control. Keep the shoulders down and avoid flaring the ribs.

external_rotation_holds.description: Stand with the elbow bent to 90° at the side and a light band or dumbbell resisting external rotation. Rotate the forearm outward to the prescribed hold angle and maintain without shrugging. Keep the elbow pinned to the ribs.

ez_bar_curls.description: Stand holding an EZ bar with an underhand grip at the thighs. Curl the bar toward the shoulders without moving the upper arms, then lower slowly. Keep the shoulders down and avoid leaning back.

ez_bar_reverse_curls.description: Grip an EZ bar with an overhand shoulder-width grip at the thighs. Curl the bar up while keeping the elbows at the sides, then lower under control. Use a weight that keeps the wrists comfortable.

face_pulls.description: Attach a rope to a high cable and pull toward the face with elbows high and wide. Externally rotate at the end so the hands finish beside the ears, then return slowly. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the back.

facepull.description: Attach a rope to a high cable and pull toward the face with elbows high and wide. Squeeze the upper back and rear delts, then return with control. Keep the shoulders down away from the ears.

falling_starts.description: Lean forward from a standing start until you begin to fall, then drive one knee forward and sprint out for the prescribed distance. Stay low for the first several steps and pump the arms aggressively. Keep the chest forward without hunching the upper back.

farmer_walks.description: Pick up heavy dumbbells or handles at the sides and walk with tall posture for the prescribed distance. Keep the shoulders level and take controlled steps without leaning or twisting. Set the weights down with a hip hinge, not a rounded back.

figure_8.description: Move through a figure-eight footwork or agility pattern around cones or marks at the prescribed speed. Stay low with quick, deliberate steps and eyes up. Reset if foot placement becomes sloppy.

flat_bench_flyes.description: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells over the chest and a soft elbow bend. Lower the bells out to the sides in a wide arc until the chest stretches, then squeeze back together over the chest. Keep the shoulder blades set on the bench.

flexion.description: Stand with arms at the sides holding light load if prescribed. Curl the forearms toward the shoulders by flexing the elbows, then lower slowly. Keep the upper arms still and avoid swinging the torso.

flutter_kicks.description: Lie on your back with legs extended and hands under the hips or at the sides. Kick the legs up and down in small alternating strokes without letting the low back arch off the floor. Keep the ribs down and the abs engaged.

forward_lunge.description: Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend to about 90°, keeping the front knee over the mid-foot. Push through the front heel to return to stand. Keep the torso tall and avoid letting the front knee collapse inward.

frog.description: Sit in a deep squat with feet flat and elbows inside the knees, gently pressing the knees open. Hold or pulse in the position to open the hips and ankles. Keep the heels down and the spine tall.

front_load_single_leg_box_squat.description: Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell at the chest and stand on one leg in front of a box. Sit the hips back to lightly touch the box, then stand on the working leg without pushing off the free leg. Keep the knee over the mid-foot and the chest up.

front_plate_raise.description: Hold a weight plate with both hands at the thighs. Raise the plate forward to shoulder height with straight arms, then lower slowly. Keep the ribs down and avoid using a hip swing.

front_rack_reverse_lunge.description: Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell in the front rack at one shoulder and step the opposite leg back into a reverse lunge. Lower until the back knee hovers, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the elbow high and the torso upright.

front_rack_split_squat.description: Hold a kettlebell in the front rack and set a split stance with the rear foot elevated or on the floor as prescribed. Lower until the front thigh is near parallel, then drive through the front foot. Keep the wrist stacked and the ribs down.

front_squat.description: Rest the barbell in the front rack with elbows high and feet shoulder width. Sit the hips down keeping the torso upright, then drive through the mid-foot to stand. Keep the elbows parallel to the floor and avoid letting the wrists bend back.

full_arc_or_circle_run.description: Run a full circle or arc around cones while leaning slightly into the turn. Stay on the balls of the feet with quick steps and drive the outside arm. Keep the hips level and avoid cutting the feet too short on tight turns.

glute_ham_raise.description: Anchor the feet in a GHD or partner hold with knees on the pad and hips extended. Lower the torso forward with control, then curl back up using the hamstrings and glutes. Keep the hips extended and avoid breaking at the waist.

goblet_sumo_squat.description: Hold a kettlebell at the chest and set a wide stance with toes turned out. Sit the hips down between the knees, then stand by spreading the floor with the feet. Keep the chest up and avoid collapsing the knees inward.

good_mornings.description: Rest a barbell across the upper back with a soft knee bend. Hinge at the hips until the torso is near parallel to the floor, then stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back neutral and avoid rounding at the bottom.

groiners.description: From a push-up position, step one foot outside the hand into a deep lunge and pulse gently, then switch sides. Keep the back leg long and the hips low as the foot lands by the hand. Move smoothly rather than bouncing the knee.

ground_starts.description: Begin prone or supine on the ground as prescribed, then explode up into a sprint or athletic position on the cue. Drive the arms and legs aggressively through the first steps. Keep the chest forward and avoid standing upright too early.

half_arc.description: Run a half-circle arc around cones at the prescribed direction and speed. Lean slightly into the turn with quick, short steps on the balls of the feet. Keep the chest up and avoid crossing the feet.

half_kneeling_achilles_ankle_rockers.description: Half-kneel with the front foot flat and hold the dowel or wall for balance. Rock the front knee forward over the toes keeping the heel down, then return. Move through a comfortable range without pinching the front ankle.

half_kneeling_arm_pump.description: Half-kneel in a tall posture and pump the arms through a sprinting rhythm without leaning back. Keep the glute on the back-leg side engaged and the ribs down. Use quick, short strokes matching the prescribed cadence.

half_kneeling_band_face_pull_to_y_press.description: Half-kneel facing a band anchored at chest height. Face-pull toward the face, then raise the arms into a Y press overhead, and reverse the sequence with control. Keep the pelvis neutral and avoid arching the low back.

half_kneeling_groin_stretch.description: Half-kneel with the front leg out to the side and foot flat, sitting the hips back toward the heel. Keep the spine long and breathe into the inner-thigh stretch. Avoid collapsing the front knee inward.

half_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Half-kneel with the kettlebell or dumbbell racked at one shoulder. Press overhead to lockout without leaning back, then lower under control. Squeeze the glute on the down-knee side to keep the pelvis neutral.

half_kneeling_side_toss.description: Half-kneel sideways to a wall with a medicine ball at the hip. Rotate and throw the ball horizontally to the wall, then catch and reset. Drive from the hips and keep the front foot planted.

half_kneeling_single_arm_broad_toss.description: Half-kneel with a medicine ball at one shoulder, dip through the hips, and throw the ball forward for distance. Stay tall through the down knee and follow through with the same-side arm. Avoid rotating the torso away before release.

half_kneeling_starts.description: Begin in a half-kneeling stance and drive into a sprint or shuffle on the cue. Push through the front foot and pump the arms aggressively. Keep the chest forward through the first steps.

half_split.description: Step one foot forward into a half split with hips square and both legs as straight as mobility allows. Hinge toward the front shin or stay tall to stretch the hamstring. Keep the front toes up and avoid rounding the spine.

hammer_curls.description: Stand with dumbbells at the sides in a neutral grip. Curl the bells toward the shoulders without moving the upper arms, then lower slowly. Keep the elbows pinned and avoid swinging the hips.

hamstring_focus_glute_bridge.description: Lie on your back with heels on a bench or elevated surface and knees slightly bent. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, emphasizing hamstring tension at the top, then lower slowly. Keep the ribs down and avoid over-arching the low back.

hamstrings.description: Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend or lie prone and curl the heels toward the glutes as the session prescribes for hamstring work. Move through a controlled range and pause briefly at peak tension. Keep the hips stable and avoid bouncing at end range.

hand_release_push_ups.description: Lower in a push-up until the chest rests on the floor, briefly lift the hands, place them back, and press up. Keep the body in one line and avoid sagging the hips on the press. Use a tempo that keeps each rep strict.

hanging_snatch_high_pull.description: Hang from a bar or use a barbell hang position and drive the hips to pull the weight to sternum height with elbows high. Lower under control and reset each rep. Keep the bar close and avoid arm-dominating the pull.

head_bangers.description: Lie on a bench under a Smith machine or bar and press in a short partial range near the forehead with control. Keep the shoulder blades set and avoid bouncing off the forehead area. Use a spotter or safeties and moderate load.

heel_elevated_narrow_squats.description: Stand on wedges or plates with a narrow stance and heels elevated. Squat down keeping the torso upright and knees forward, then stand by pushing through the mid-foot. Keep the heels down on the wedge and avoid collapsing inward.

heel_to_toe_walks.description: Walk forward placing the heel down first, then rolling through to the toe with tall posture. Take short controlled steps and keep the head over the feet. Use for ankle mobility and gait prep.

heel_walks.description: Walk on the heels with the toes lifted and knees relatively straight for the prescribed distance. Keep the chest tall and steps controlled. Stop if the shins cramp or the toes drop.

hex_carries.description: Grip a trap bar or hex bar at the sides, stand tall, and walk for distance with even steps. Keep the shoulders packed and avoid letting the implements tilt forward. Set down with a hip hinge.

hex_holds.description: Lift a trap bar or hex bar to a standing position and hold isometrically for time with the core braced. Keep the shoulders level and breathe steadily. Lower with control when the hold ends.

high_band_single_arm_row.description: Anchor a band at chest height and row one handle toward the ribs with a square stance. Squeeze the shoulder blade at the finish, then return with control. Keep the torso still and avoid rotating toward the band.

high_knee_butt_kick_run.description: Alternate driving high knees and heel kicks in a running rhythm for the prescribed distance or time. Stay tall through the chest and land under the hips on the balls of the feet. Keep the arms pumping in sync.

high_knee_run.description: Run in place or forward driving the knees up to hip height with quick ground contacts. Stay tall through the chest and pump the arms. Avoid leaning back or overstriding.

hip_activation_series.description: Loop a miniband just above the knees and work through side-lying clamshells, glute bridges, and standing hip abduction as prescribed. Drive each rep from the glute and keep the pelvis level instead of rolling the trunk. Breathe steadily and stay in a mild stretch on activation drills.

hip_airplanes.description: Stand on one leg with a soft knee and hinge forward while reaching the free leg back. Open the hip into a slow circle, keeping the standing foot rooted and the torso long. Move only as far as you can control without wobbling or twisting the spine.

hip_cars.description: Stand on one leg or half-kneel and trace slow, controlled hip circles through flexion, abduction, extension, and adduction. Keep the trunk still and tension low enough to stay smooth at every angle. Work both directions and avoid forcing end range.

hip_circle_squat.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width and trace a slow hip circle at the bottom of a bodyweight squat. Drop only as deep as you can keep heels down and knees tracking over the toes. Keep the chest up and avoid collapsing forward on the circle.

hollow_holds.description: Lie on your back and press the low back into the floor while lifting the shoulders and legs slightly off the mat. Reach the arms past the hips and hold the hollow shape with steady breathing. Stop if the lower back arches away from the floor.

horizontal.description: Perform the prescribed horizontal upper-body pull—row, inverted row, or cable pull variant from the session. Pull the load toward the ribs by driving the elbows back, then extend the arms long. Keep the chest up and avoid shrugging at the finish.

hurdle_jump.description: Stand facing a hurdle in an athletic stance and swing the arms to jump vertically over the bar. Land softly on both feet with hips back and knees aligned over the toes. Reset each rep and avoid clipping the hurdle with the feet.

hurdle_to_broad_jump.description: Clear a hurdle with a vertical jump, then immediately load the hips and bound forward for distance. Absorb the broad-jump landing with bent knees and a stable torso. Stay tall through the chest and avoid stutter steps between phases.

hyperextension.description: Lock the ankles in a back-extension bench with hips at the pad edge and hands crossed on the chest. Hinge forward with a long spine, then extend to neutral without hyperextending the neck. Keep the glutes engaged and avoid snapping up from the bottom.

hyperextension_with_twist.description: On a back-extension bench, rise to neutral and rotate the torso toward one side at the top. Lower under control and alternate sides each rep. Keep the movement from the mid-back and avoid cranking the neck.

hyperextensions.description: On a back-extension or GHD pad, hinge at the hips with a neutral spine and extend until the body forms one line. Pause briefly at the top without over-arching the neck. Control the descent and keep the ribs stacked over the pelvis.

incline_alternating_row.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand hanging straight down. Row one bell toward the lower ribs while the other arm stays long, then alternate. Keep the chest on the pad and avoid shrugging at the top.

incline_db_alternating_bench.description: Lie on an incline bench with dumbbells at shoulder height and feet flat on the floor. Press one arm to lockout while the other stays at the chest, then alternate smoothly. Keep the shoulder blades pinched and avoid bouncing off the bottom.

incline_db_hex_press.description: Lie on an incline bench holding two dumbbells pressed together in a neutral hex grip at the chest. Press up and slightly inward while keeping the wrists stacked over the elbows. Lower under control without flaring the elbows wide.

incline_flyes.description: Lie on an incline bench with dumbbells above the chest and a soft elbow bend. Open the arms in a wide arc until you feel a chest stretch, then squeeze back to the start. Keep the shoulder blades set and avoid dropping the wrists below the elbows.

incline_hammer_curls.description: Sit on an incline bench with arms hanging straight down and dumbbells in a neutral grip. Curl the bells toward the shoulders without moving the upper arms. Lower slowly and avoid swinging the torso back.

incline_plate_press.description: Lie on an incline bench with a light plate at the chest and press through a comfortable range as a warmup or corrective. Move slowly with ribs down and shoulders relaxed at the bottom. Reduce load if the shoulders pinch.

incline_push_ups.description: Place the hands on a bench or box and walk the feet back into a straight push-up line. Lower the chest toward the bench, then press up while keeping the body rigid from head to heels. Avoid sagging hips or piking at the waist.

incline_rear_delt_raise.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with light dumbbells hanging below the shoulders. Raise the arms out to the sides with a slight elbow bend until they align with the torso. Lead with the elbows and avoid shrugging toward the ears.

incline_rear_delt_raise_with_external_ro.description: On an incline bench, raise the arms to shoulder height in a rear-delt fly, then externally rotate so the thumbs point up. Reverse the rotation and lower with control. Keep the chest on the pad and move only through the shoulders.

incline_row.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench and row dumbbells or a bar toward the lower ribs. Squeeze the shoulder blades together at the top, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the chest on the pad and avoid jerking the load.

internal_external_rotations.description: Stand or lie with the working elbow bent to 90° and pinned to the side. Rotate the forearm inward against light band or cable resistance, then outward through the same arc. Keep the shoulder down and avoid swinging the torso.

internal_external_rotations_with_get_up.description: Hold a light load at the shoulder and perform slow internal and external shoulder rotations between get-up positions as prescribed. Keep the elbow fixed at the ribs and move only through the forearm. Reset posture between each rotation phase.

internal_external_rotations_with_reach.description: With the elbow at 90° at your side, rotate the forearm in and out while reaching the opposite arm forward for balance. Keep the shoulder blade set and the reach long through the fingertips. Avoid hiking the working shoulder.

inverted_curls.description: Hang under a bar or rings with the body straight and heels on the floor if needed. Pull the chest toward the hands while keeping elbows close, emphasizing biceps tension. Lower with control and avoid piking the hips.

inverted_facepulls.description: Set rings or a bar at chest height and hang underneath with a straight body. Pull the chest to the hands while driving elbows out and squeezing the upper back. Pause briefly at the top and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

inverted_rows.description: Hang under a fixed bar with the body straight and heels on the floor. Pull the chest to the bar by driving the elbows back, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the hips aligned and avoid sagging at the bottom.

iron_cross.description: On rings or parallettes, lean the shoulders forward past the hands with elbows locked. Press down and away while holding the body rigid in an iron-cross shape. Keep the core tight and reduce lean if the shoulders dump forward.

iso_band_back_squat.description: Loop a heavy band under the squat rack pins and sit into a back squat against the band tension at the bottom position. Hold the isometric with the chest up and knees tracking over the toes. Breathe steadily and avoid collapsing into the pins.

iso_bulgarian_split_squats.description: Place the rear foot on a bench and hold the bottom of a split squat with the front shin near vertical. Hold the isometric while keeping the torso tall and the front knee over the mid-foot. Drive evenly through the whole front foot.

iso_extreme_split_squat.description: Set a very deep split-squat bottom position with the rear foot elevated and hold isometrically for time. Keep the front heel down and the ribs stacked over the pelvis. Stop if the front knee caves inward.

iso_extreme_squat.description: Sit into a deep squat and hold the bottom position isometrically with heels down and chest up. Spread the knees in line with the toes and brace the core. Use support at the hands only if needed to keep a neutral spine.

iso_extreme_sumo_squat.description: Take a wide sumo stance and hold the bottom squat position with knees pushed out over the toes. Keep the torso upright and weight through the mid-foot. Avoid letting the hips tuck under at depth.

iso_nordic_hamstring_curls.description: Kneel with ankles fixed and lower the torso forward as slowly as possible using the hamstrings. Catch yourself with the hands if needed, then reset to the start. Keep the hips extended and avoid breaking at the waist.

iso_push_up_hold.description: Set up in a push-up with the body in one line and hold halfway down with elbows at about 45°. Brace the core and keep the shoulder blades active without sagging the hips. Breathe steadily through the hold.

iso_single_leg_hip_thrust.description: Rest the upper back on a bench with one foot planted and the other leg extended. Drive through the planted heel to lift the hips to a straight line, then hold at the top. Keep the pelvis level and avoid rotating open on the free leg.

iso_step_down.description: Stand on a box on one leg with the free foot hovering at the edge. Lower the heel of the free leg toward the floor under control and hold the bottom briefly. Keep the standing knee aligned over the toes without collapsing inward.

isometric_chin_ups.description: Hang from the bar with an underhand grip and pull up until the chin clears the bar, then hold. Keep the shoulders down and the chest lifted toward the hands. Lower with control when the hold ends.

isometric_trap_bar_deadlift_staggered.description: Stand inside the trap bar in a staggered stance with the front foot flat and the rear toe aligned behind. Pull the handles to a standing lockout and hold isometrically with a braced torso. Keep the bar centered over the mid-foot of the front leg.

isometric_trap_bar_deadlift_standard.description: Stand inside the trap bar with feet hip-width and grip the handles at the sides. Lift to a tall standing position and hold without shrugging or leaning back. Keep the lats engaged and the ribs stacked over the pelvis.

ityws.description: Lie face-down with arms in an I, T, Y, or W shape as prescribed and lift the arms off the floor using the upper back. Squeeze the shoulder blades down and back at the top, then lower slowly. Keep the forehead down and avoid shrugging.

jump_back_starts.description: Start in an athletic stance and on cue jump back into a sprint-ready position with one foot forward. Drive the arms aggressively and stay low through the first steps. Keep the chest over the toes on the transition.

jump_cut_drill.description: Jump vertically or forward, land on two feet, and immediately cut in the prescribed direction. Absorb the landing with soft knees and a stable hip before pushing off. Stay tall and avoid landing with straight legs.

jump_cut_drill_with_reaction.description: Perform a jump-cut and react to a visual or verbal cue to change direction on the next step. Reset athletic posture between reps and stay ready on the balls of the feet. Keep cuts sharp without stutter stepping.

kettlebell_corkscrew_row.description: Hinge with a kettlebell in one hand and row it toward the hip while rotating the torso slightly open at the top. Lower until the arm is long without rounding the back. Keep the bell close to the body throughout the pull.

kettlebell_swing.description: Hinge with the kettlebell between the feet and hike it back, then snap the hips to swing the bell to chest height. Let the arms stay relaxed as the hips drive the bell. Keep a neutral spine and avoid squatting the weight up.

kick_up_starts.description: Begin in a sprinter or kick-up start stance and explode into the first steps on cue. Drive the knees and arms aggressively while staying low through acceleration. Keep the shin angle aggressive without stumbling out of the start.

knee_jump.description: Start kneeling upright with hips extended and swing the arms to jump to the feet without using the hands. Land in an athletic stance with soft knees. Keep the torso tall and avoid collapsing forward on takeoff.

kneeling_band_scarecrow.description: Kneel facing a band anchored at chest height with elbows bent to 90° and arms out to the sides. Externally rotate the forearms against the band, then return with control. Keep the ribs down and avoid arching the back.

kneeling_band_twists.description: Half-kneel sideways to a band anchored at chest height and hold the handle at the sternum. Rotate the torso away from the anchor while keeping the hips square, then return slowly. Brace the core and avoid twisting from the low back.

kneeling_broad_toss.description: Half-kneel with a medicine ball at the chest, dip through the hips, and throw the ball forward for distance. Stay tall through the down knee and follow through with both hands. Avoid leaning back before release.

kneeling_dorsiflexion_stretch.description: Half-kneel with the front foot flat and gently drive the knee forward over the toes while keeping the heel down. Hold a mild ankle stretch and breathe steadily. Reduce range if the heel lifts off the floor.

kneeling_landmine_press.description: Half-kneel facing the landmine with the bar end at one shoulder and both hands on the sleeve. Press the bar up and slightly forward to lockout, then lower to the shoulder. Squeeze the glute on the down-knee side to keep the pelvis neutral.

kneeling_med_ball_slam.description: Half-kneel holding a medicine ball overhead with the core braced. Slam the ball down into the floor in front of you by hinging through the hips and arms. Catch or reset the ball and avoid rounding the back on the follow-through.

kneeling_pallof_press.description: Half-kneel sideways to a cable or band anchor with the handle at the sternum. Press the handle straight out until the arms are long, hold briefly, then return without rotating toward the anchor. Keep the hips square and ribs down.

kneeling_side_slam.description: Half-kneel sideways to a slam target with a medicine ball at the hip. Rotate through the hips and slam the ball into the wall or floor beside you. Reset between reps and keep the front foot planted.

kneeling_side_toss.description: Half-kneel sideways to a wall with a medicine ball at the hip. Rotate and throw the ball horizontally to the wall, catch, and reset. Drive from the back hip and keep the arms long through release.

kneeling_single_leg_box_jump.description: Half-kneel facing a box, swing the arms, and drive off the front leg onto the box. Land softly with the whole foot on the box and stand tall before stepping down. Keep the knee tracking over the toes on takeoff.

kneeling_soccer_toss.description: Half-kneel with a medicine ball and throw it with a soccer-pass motion to a partner or wall. Rotate through the hips while staying tall on the down knee. Follow through with the tossing-side foot planted.

kneeling_tibial_stretch.description: Sit back on the heels with the tops of the feet on the floor and gently lean back to stretch the shins and ankles. Support your weight with the hands behind you as needed. Stop if you feel pinching in the knee.

knees_to_bows.description: Hang from a pull-up bar with active shoulders and a braced core. Lift the knees toward the elbows, then extend the legs forward into a hollow bow before reversing the cycle. Avoid swinging or using momentum from the hips.

l_drill.description: Run the L-drill pattern: sprint to a cone, shuffle laterally, backpedal, and finish through the start line as prescribed. Stay low on the turns and push off the outside foot on direction changes. Keep the chest over the feet on every transition.

landmine_deadlift.description: Straddle the landmine bar with both hands on the sleeve and hinge at the hips to lift the end off the floor. Stand tall by driving the hips forward while keeping the bar close to the body. Maintain a long spine and avoid rounding at the bottom.

landmine_press.description: Stand facing the landmine with the bar end at one shoulder and both hands on the sleeve. Press the bar up and slightly forward to lockout, then lower under control. Brace the core and avoid leaning back as the bar rises.

landmine_squat.description: Hold the landmine bar end at the chest in a goblet grip and squat between the feet. Keep the elbows inside the knees at the bottom and the chest upright. Drive through the mid-foot to stand without collapsing forward.

larsen_bench_press.description: Lie on a flat bench with the legs elevated or off the floor and the bar at arm's length above the chest. Lower the bar to the mid-chest, pause briefly, and press up without leg drive. Keep the shoulder blades pinched and the wrists stacked.

lat_pull_down.description: Sit at the lat pulldown with thighs secured and grip the bar slightly outside shoulder width. Pull the bar toward the upper chest by driving the elbows down, then return until the arms are long. Keep the chest up and avoid leaning far back.

lat_stretch.description: Kneel or stand and reach one arm overhead to a fixed bar or post, then sit the hips away to stretch the lat. Keep the ribs down and breathe into the side body. Avoid flaring the ribs or shrugging the reaching shoulder.

lateral_alternating_bounds.description: Bound laterally from one foot to the other, covering distance with a stiff ankle and quick ground contact. Stick each landing for a beat before pushing off again. Keep the torso tall and avoid collapsing inward on contact.

lateral_bear_crawl.description: Set up on hands and toes with knees just off the floor and crawl sideways by moving opposite hand and foot together. Keep the hips low and the back flat throughout. Move small steps and avoid rocking side to side.

lateral_box_jump.description: Stand sideways to a box and jump up onto it, landing with both feet fully on the surface. Stand tall, then step or jump down under control on the same side. Keep the knees soft on landing and avoid clipping the box edge.

lateral_broad_jumps.description: Load the hips and bound laterally for maximum distance, landing on both feet with bent knees. Reset between reps or stick the landing as prescribed. Keep the chest up and push the ground away on takeoff.

lateral_butt_kick_run.description: Run laterally while kicking the heels toward the glutes on each step for the prescribed distance. Stay on the balls of the feet with quick, short contacts. Keep the shoulders level and avoid crossing the feet.

lateral_double_broad.description: Perform two consecutive broad jumps in a lateral direction, absorbing each landing before the next takeoff. Drive the arms on every jump and keep the feet parallel on landing. Stay tall through the chest between bounds.

lateral_ground_start.description: Begin in a lateral ground-start or three-point stance and explode into a lateral sprint on cue. Drive the outside leg and pump the arms aggressively through the first steps. Keep the hips low and the chest over the toes.

lateral_half_kneeling_starts.description: Start in a half-kneeling lateral stance and on cue drive into a lateral shuffle or sprint. Push off the front foot and stay low through the first two steps. Keep the chest forward and avoid rising upright too early.

lateral_high_knee_run.description: Run laterally driving the knees up to hip height with quick ground contacts. Stay tall through the chest and pump the arms in rhythm. Avoid leaning away from the direction of travel.

lateral_line_hops.description: Hop side to side over a line on one or two feet with quick, springy contacts. Land softly with knees slightly bent and the chest stable. Keep the feet under the hips and avoid drifting forward.

lateral_lunge.description: Hold a kettlebell goblet at the chest and step wide to one side, sitting the hips back while keeping the other leg straight. Push through the bent leg to return to center and alternate sides. Keep the heel down and the chest up.

lateral_neck_stretch.description: Sit tall and gently tilt the head toward one shoulder while keeping the opposite shoulder down. Hold a mild stretch along the side of the neck and breathe steadily. Avoid pulling on the head with the hand.

lateral_plank_walks.description: Start in a high plank and step the hand and foot out to the side together, then bring the other side in. Keep the hips level and the core braced throughout the walk. Move under control and avoid sagging between steps.
