Move with control and keep the hips or shoulders level throughout. Choose load that allows clean form without compensating at the lower back.

unweighted_oscillatory_bulgarian_split_s.description: Place the rear foot on a bench and hold the bottom of a split squat. Make small rhythmic oscillations up and down through a short range. Keep the front knee tracking over the foot and the torso tall.

upper.description: Work through the prescribed upper-body corrective—band external rotations, wall slides, or face pulls—from the session plan. Move slowly with shoulders down and shoulder blades set. Stop if you feel pinching rather than muscle work.

upright_rows.description: Stand with dumbbells or a bar at the thighs and pull the elbows up and out along the body to about chest height. Lead with the elbows and keep the bar close without shrugging excessively. Lower under control and avoid yanking with momentum.

v_jumps.description: Jump vertically and split the legs into a V shape at the peak before landing back together. Land softly with knees bent and reset between reps. Keep the torso tall and avoid collapsing forward on landing.

v_ups.description: Lie on your back with arms overhead and simultaneously lift the legs and torso to meet in a V shape. Lower both segments with control without arching the lower back at the bottom. Keep the movement smooth rather than throwing the arms for momentum.

vertical.description: Perform the prescribed vertical upper-body pull—pull-up, pulldown, or high row variant—from the session plan. Drive the elbows down and back to bring the load toward the torso. Keep the chest up and avoid shrugging at the finish.

vertical_jump.description: Start in an athletic stance and dip quickly before jumping straight up for maximum height. Land softly on both feet with hips back and knees aligned. Use a strong arm swing and reset between reps if testing height.

walking_lunges.description: Step forward into a lunge until both knees bend to about 90°, keeping the torso upright. Push through the front foot to bring the back leg forward into the next lunge. Avoid letting the front knee pass far beyond the toes or wobble side to side.

wall_drill_double_switch.description: Lean into a wall at sprint angle and drive the knees rapidly, switching both feet twice per cycle as prescribed. Keep the ankles stiff and body in a straight line from head to heel. Avoid letting the hips rise away from the wall.

wall_drill_single_switch.description: Set up in a wall sprint drill and exchange the lead leg once per cycle with quick aggressive knee drive. Stay at a consistent body angle into the wall and strike under the hips. Keep the core braced and avoid piking at the waist.

wall_drill_timed.description: Hold a wall sprint lean and drive the knees as fast as possible for the prescribed time. Maintain the same body angle and quick ground contacts throughout. Stop if the hips drop or posture breaks down.

wall_half_kneeling_thoracic_rotations.description: Half-kneel facing a wall with the outside hand on the wall and the other hand behind the head. Rotate the thoracic spine open toward the ceiling, keeping the hips still. Return slowly and avoid twisting from the lower back.

wall_handstand.description: Kick or walk the feet up to a wall handstand with hands shoulder-width and a straight body line. Push the floor away, brace the core, and breathe while holding. Keep the ribs in and avoid arching excessively through the lower back.

wall_scap_mobility.description: Stand facing a wall with forearms or hands on the surface and slide the arms upward while keeping the ribs down. Reverse the slide while maintaining contact and a neutral spine. Move slowly and stop if the lower back arches off the wall.

wall_slides_with_lift_off.description: Stand with back flat to a wall and arms in a W shape. Slide the arms up the wall, then lift the hands slightly off at the top without losing rib contact. Return with control and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

wall_sprint_drill.description: Lean into a wall at roughly 45° with arms extended and drive the knees in sprint rhythm. Keep the body straight from head to heel and strike under the hips. Avoid letting the hips rise or the ankles collapse.

weighted_box_jump.description: Hold light dumbbells or a weight vest and perform box jumps with the same arm swing and landing mechanics as bodyweight jumps. Land softly on the box with knees aligned and step down to reset. Reduce load if landing noise or knee cave increases.

weighted_chin_ups_2.description: Hang from the bar with an underhand grip and added weight via belt or dumbbell between the feet. Pull until the chin clears the bar, then lower under full control. Keep the shoulders engaged at the bottom and avoid kipping.

weighted_hip_thrust.description: Rest the upper back on a bench with a padded barbell across the hips and feet flat. Drive through the heels to lift the hips to a straight line and squeeze the glutes at the top. Lower under control without letting the ribs flare.

weighted_sit_ups.description: Anchor the feet if needed and hold a weight plate or medicine ball at the chest. Sit up until the shoulders clear the floor, then lower with control. Keep the chin tucked and avoid pulling with the arms alone.

wheel_rollouts.description: Kneel or stand with an ab wheel under the shoulders and roll forward while keeping the core braced and hips extended. Pull back with the lats and abs before the lower back arches. Start from a short range and progress distance gradually.

windshields.description: Lie on your back with legs vertical and sweep them side to side in a controlled arc like windshield wipers. Keep the shoulders down and avoid letting the lower back lift off the floor. Reduce range if the ribs flare or the back arches.

y_cuffs.description: Stand or lie prone and raise the arms into a Y shape with thumbs up, squeezing the upper back at the top. Lower with control without shrugging toward the ears. Keep the ribs down and move only through the shoulders.

y_cut_drill.description: Sprint forward, plant on one foot, and cut at a Y-shaped angle to the left or right cone. Stay low on the plant and push off the outside leg through the cut. Avoid upright posture before changing direction.

y_cut_drill_with_reaction.description: Perform a Y-cut drill but react to a visual or verbal cue to choose the cut direction at the last moment. Stay low through the plant and accelerate out of the cut. Keep the chest up and avoid false stepping before the cue.

z_press.description: Sit on the floor with legs extended and press dumbbells or a bar from shoulder height to lockout overhead. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the weight goes up. Lower under control to the shoulders without flaring the elbows excessively.

zercher_reverse_lunges.description: Cradle a barbell in the elbows at the chest and step backward into a lunge. Drop the back knee toward the floor while keeping the torso upright, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the elbows high and avoid rounding the upper back.

zercher_squat.description: Cradle the barbell in the elbows with hands clasped and feet shoulder-width. Squat between the hips while keeping the chest proud and elbows tight to the torso. Drive through the mid-foot to stand without losing the bar position.

zottman_curls.description: Curl dumbbells up with a palms-up grip, then rotate to palms-down at the top and lower slowly. Keep the upper arms still and control the eccentric with the forearm extensors. Avoid swinging the torso to start each rep.
